buckets.title: Example Dream
buckets.summary: This is an example dream to show how cool it looks when it's done. Read the about section for all the tips and tricks.

customFields.value:
# **Example Dream**

This example dream is not a real dream but only here to show how it looks when it's done.

### **What the example dream gives to Borderland**

This fictional example dream gives a great preview of how a dream can look, but holds no other intrinsic value and will most probably not be realised at the Borderland. So if you're wondering why someone has taken the time to write this text, there are no good answers whatsoever except for me enjoying words. Anyway, please imagine this text being very informative, engaging and witty.

Another purpose is purely psychological. As it can be a bit scary to post a dream on a completely blank page (like being the first person on the dancefloor), it might be cool if something is already there.

If you got any questions, start off by reading [the about page](https://cobudget.com/borderland/borderland-dreams-2025/about). If you still feel confused about something, please ask your questions on discord (in the dreams-support channel) and the dreams team (or someone else willing to help out) will try their best to help you out.

And if you're still reading this, I would suggest that you start dreaming instead of reading alot of unimportant nonsense. I just wanted to fill out the space for the example dream to look cool. So yeah, glad I had your attention, etc.
Dream Team (not a real camp)
Only an example dream, but if we were open for co-creation we would love to have an awesome facilitator of tree hugging join us.
Only an example dream, so it's extremely easy to co-exist with. Admire the clarity and beauty, and move on to create your own dream!
Medium safe. Might cause readers to dream!
Once the dream process is over, this dream will stay on the site as an example for future dreamers. This has been approved by the Dream Team.
A small amount, what is needed to run a computer while writing and editing it. We will get the electricity from the homes of the dream team members.
@Lo is our Dr. Bill-Bull, and is easiest found on the Discord!

buckets.title: The Listening Forest
buckets.summary: The Listening Forest is a place for sound installations and other listening experiences.

customFields.value: The amplification is under 1000w and the dream will follow the sound team’s guidelines

I’d like to invite other borderlanders to create sound-based works for the Listening Forest. These could play randomly during the week or happen as scheduled events. If you’re interested in contributing, helping build, or just talking about speakers, feel free to reach out.
The Listening Forest will be taken down on Saturday and will leave no trace.

Max usage is 1000 W total

3 x 300 W amplifiers, Raspberry Pi and soundcard
As safe as walking in the forest and attending a concert.
The installation will be placed so it doesn’t interfere with other sound-related events and vice versa. Other art installations and events are welcome to coexist with it.
Magnus from Foajé Villa Hutlös. m@magnusandersen.co.uk

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Magnus from Foajé Villa Hutlös

Last year I created a dream called the Whispering Forest, a sound installation built around a prototype speaker I designed. It played whispers recorded by Borderlanders. The speakers created an illusion where the sound felt like it came from the forest itself rather than from speakers.

Now I want to build larger versions of the speakers which extend lower in frequency. This opens up more possibilities for different kinds of sound experiences, not only whispers.

This will be a open platform, where everyone wanting to make sound related art can participate. It’ll be placed somewhere in the forest between the main field and the Muumima field.

The speakers are multiple entry horn speakers which play down to ca 50hz. If this dream gets enough funding I'll also build a sub woofer which extends down to 20hz so the system can play the full range from 20-20kHz.

buckets.title: Pottery - The Ember & The Earth: A Raku Alchemy
buckets.summary: Ceramic alchemy at the Borderland. A sanctuary of clay and a ritual of fire. Transform raw earth into rainbow or structural glaze art through the magic of Raku.

customFields.value:
Tomas Vintilas

[tomas.vintilas@gmail.com](mailto:tomas.vintilas@gmail.com)

+370 615 97967

For transparency, sharing a detailed budget for this Dream: [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NylKRN2uiDB1stEL8j\_O-0iNhAkLjBgggSFpfFkZzpg/edit?usp=drive\_link](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NylKRN2uiDB1stEL8j_O-0iNhAkLjBgggSFpfFkZzpg/edit?usp=drive_link)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: This dream belongs to the Lithuanian Burner's camp - Lazy Camp!

I touched clay for the first time months ago and found a language my words couldn't reach. I want to share it as it gave me so much. I hope more people can experience this. The kiln’s outcome may be unpredictable - pieces may crack or fail - but that is the point. The goal is to create, learn, and be with ourselves without expectations. We are learning alongside each other.

**The Earth** is raw potential; **The Ember** is alchemy. This is a space to share that spark.

**The Ritual:** We shape intentions into clay in the quiet of the Tipy.

**The Transformation:** We place the pottery into the "Phoenix Barrel" kiln, and after the firing, we pull out our glowing "Stars".

Yes, I am absolutely looking for co-creators! Since this is a fresh dream born from a new passion, I am looking for "Alchemists" and "Earth-shapers" to help anchor the space:

**Pottery Mentors:** If you have experience with hand-building or wheel-throwing, I would love for you to help guide participants in the Tipi as they shape their intentions into clay.

**Fire Starters & Kiln Masters:** Raku is intense! I am looking for people comfortable with fire and high temperatures to help manage the "Phoenix Barrel" kiln, monitor the reduction bins, and ensure the ritual remains safe and mesmerizing.

**Kintsugi Lovers:** If you have a steady hand and an eye for beauty in the broken, help us lead the healing station where we repair "failed" pieces with gold.

**General Magic:** Whether it's tending the fire or simply holding a calm space for those working the clay, your energy is welcome.
No amplified sound. Only the roar of the gas torch and the communal sounds of creation.

Strike: 6 hours. All clay and ash hauled out in sealed bins.

Water: "Closed-Loop" wash station (two 50L tubs). No chemicals touch the soil.

Kintsugi Safety: Dedicated trays for epoxy mixing to prevent drips; all chemical waste removed.

Fuel: Controlled Propane gas torch.

Security: Kiln is active when the Lead is present. When the kiln is not operated it is cold and safe to touch.

Perimeter: 5m radius "Hot Zone" with extinguishers.
Will need to have 5kW 220V to run an electric bisque firing kiln. Also, we’ll offer a phone charging station so people can unplug and be with the clay

Coexistence will be peaceful and quiet - no trouble with neighbours

The flow, the sequence:

**The Shaping** of Creations is an open space during the event, a self-guided Tipi station for quiet creation. At this moment, we are planning to have an open space 24/7, but not all the time someone will be from our team to assist you, but radical expression and common sense of carrying the space is welcoming

**The Fire Ritual** (or firing the kiln) is planned to have 4-5 hours each day. There are two ways to fire your art: Single-Fire (raw clay for black-and-white carbon patterns) or Two-Fire (bisqued pieces for metallic/crackle glazes).

**The Golden Healing**, where a "Modern Kintsugi" station to repair participants' personal ceramics (where we encourage Bordelings to bring their beloved broken or cracked ceramics - mugs, plates, art pieces) or pieces that crack during the firing ritual using fast-setting epoxy and gold dust.

buckets.title: The Bin
buckets.summary: An art installation physically indistinguishable from a wheelie bin

customFields.value: @Minnie (minna5130 on Discord)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Frog Plaza

Many taboos have been broken at The Borderland. There's nudity, sex, and I even read an Aftonbladet article that claimed that some participants take illegal substances. But one taboo remains mysteriously unbroken - having a public bin.

What will happen to The Borderland if such a thing is allowed on site? Will the principle of Leave No Trace crumble bringing the other nine (ten) principles down with it?

Will people put gifts in it? Will people put trash in it? Is there a difference? If they do, do they not _get it_? Or are they deliberately participating in a piece of performance art? Why was there a guy in a frog costume sitting in the bin for two hours on Wednesday?

There's only one way to find out.

\====

It will start as a literal empty bin but we'll have some weird art and gifts in there by Friday.
The contents of the bin will be decided by the community.
The bin will be CE marked.
Good public amenities enhance the experience of the surrounding area.
None.
It will be exactly as loud as a bin.
The offerings to the bin will be disposed of according to local regulations.

buckets.title: Ambrosyeah
buckets.summary: A portable liquid dispensing sensory experience for the good of humankind.

customFields.value: Everything we will use is either easily packable with our possessions, or consumable upon site. The only trace we will not be able to clean up are the memories of ecstatic liquid consumption.

After 5 years of amprenticeship under a master Ammer\*, two amicable boys left a mountain with knowledge to run amok in the world. The last words of their master was a command: to go unto the world and distribute copious amounts of liquids to the thirstquenched throats of the people of world Earth. They pledged to honour the name of their great teacher. Combining a passion for teas with a passion for making them, drinking them, and making others drink them, Ambros(yeah!) was born.

After a first mission successfully performed in December of 2025, the wind has called to these two young men to make one more. The parched throats soundeded from the summery future and we had to honour them. Hence, we will make our way to borderland with a cornucopia of liquids, complicated liquid application devices and a wheeled device to transport them. The will in our hearts will be to bless each and every tongue present with these sweet ambrosias, whilst regaling the people with stories of distant lands and peculiar people, and esoteric rituals for the eternal health of the receiver.

\***to am** /toʊm/ _v._ To apply liquids to the drinking organ of a living being. \[_see:_ **feed**\]. In [Merriam-Webster.com](//Merriam-Webster.com) _dictionary._

We are a fleeting manifestation that sweeps through and provides joy where it can, our whole world is our neighbour and we are neighbourly. Since we are not noisy or physically placed anywhere, our imprint is minimal.
Rambling nonsense from our mouths will hit max 60 decibels. Glorious slurps of appreciation might tear into the 80s however.

Any scenario where thirst may be an issue, we are willing to come and deliver nectar to satisfy. Any kind of rituals that require spiritual connection, that can be ensured by the application of holy liquid and friendship, we'd be willing to jump in. If you can handle or perhaps even enjoy the presence of two bumbling idiots, please reach out and let's make something beautiful.
Boiled water will be used, but we will ensure that a safe temperature is reached before application. This is both an art and a science and due attention will be applied.
We will prepare all the beverages using electricity at camp. Electricity will not be mixed with the liquid for matters of safety.

buckets.title: Erotic Oscillations II
buckets.summary: Following enthusiastic support & reactions, the naughty swings are back to once again elicit much laughter (& maybe also, as we've been told, spontaneous sex!)

customFields.value: Noam Cohen (noamcee99@gmail.com)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Our erotic and interactive installation consists of 2 innocent looking swings. Yes - Swings, as in playground: A small wooden bench suspended with ropes from a tree. However - these swings are anything but innocent. After a few unsuspecting back and forth motions, they start to moan. Softly at first, but the more & harder you swing - the more intense the moans. The moans are distinctly sexual; and - they are ethically - and very enthusiastically sourced - from community members who wish to participate and co-create this installation; By donating their recorded moans! We'll again reach out to the community and invite people to contribute their voices, so that later they, their partners, friends, and the community can merilly swing along and enjoy their ecstasy!!!  
Annnd - MEN - we're talking to you too!! Last year there was (justified!) criticism of our having only female voices. Yes, we know that often it is more difficult for the more vocally inhibited sex to express themselves in this way. But we're enthusiasticaly soliciting male participation too - Please send us MALE sexual vocalisations as well!

Come and play (quite literally…)! We want YOU! Our mischievous Borderling friends, to partake in our shenanigans. How, you ask?

 ✨🦊 **Record and send us your  sexiest sounding escapades** 🦊✨

Guidelines:

*   Capture & send us a clear recording. Using your smartphone will do.
    
*   Ideally starting from the softest moans, slowly building to squeals, grunts, and groans of pleasure, and finally building up to full-bodied screams of rapture!!! Want to include some kinky words of encouragement? Yes please! Any enthusiastically (and - consensually!) human-vocalized erotics will do just fine.
    
*   In case of more than one moaning voice, try to keep the moans of each participant separate, as it will make the editing viable and easier.
    
*   Try to minimize background noises. Bus horns aren’t unanimously sexy (but hey, no kink shaming!)
    

We will select technically good recordings, edit them into a sequence of short clips, and load them into the controller that will be embedded in each of the swings. The identity of contributors will naturally remain a secret, but - hey, if you wanna brag, we won't stop you...

(annnnd, we most emphatically refute those vile rumors alleging the recordings were surreptitiously made outside that infamous camp's party last year. Even if you think you've heard that person before!).
A clear area of 3m front and back on each side of the swings will be maintained & marked, to avoid collisions. Swings will be suspended with thick rope to a very thick beam ratcheted to the trees.

On strike, swings will be removed from the suspension beam, and the beam itself will be un-ratcheted from the trees, Any leftovers, moop, marks or other debris will be collected and removed. The beam will be left in the barn, for future community use.
Yes - a low power (<100W) mains connection, to power some lights.
Sound footprint is around 10 meters, (we use a small 5 Watt speaker in each swing).

We plan to place this installation in an area with "proven" trees & some amount of passerby traffic & other activity - Same as last year, nearby the Cheeky Badger. So, not a super quiet area. And will be in touch with it's likely inhabitants & neighbours regarding any likely environmental (or just any mental) impact.

buckets.title: Black Gold Rites
buckets.summary: "There is no sincerer love than the love for liquorice" - half of Scandinavia

customFields.value:
**Foul Borderlings!**

Cleanse your tarnished palette with irresistible flavors, and join us in a dark tasting ritual; a rite of passage for anyone calling themselves a zealot of the true black gold. It will be sweet, it will be salty, it will be savory, and it will be **sacrilegious**.

We once again wish to invite you to enjoy the **tastiest candy ever made**, in all shapes and forms. Whether you like it sweet, salty, spicy, sour, in a cup, on your body, in a cake, in flames or as an apéritif, we're here to satisfy your needs!

The two of us held liquorice tastings the last two years, and were overwhelmed by both the turnout and the warm greetings. This year we want to turn it into a ritual experience, where the taste is further deepened through a dark and eerie setting.

All funds go towards liquorice and the setting to serve such a magical substance to the people. We have already started the research, and we wish to bring both famous classics and new experiences to your taste buds.

We will also serve the dark master's favorite liquorice throughout the **entirety of the magical week**, to satisfy your needs for sweet and salty treats.

**Come find us for the tastiest experience on the playa this year!**
We're more than happy to join forces if you also do dabble with the devils candy
A swift event troubling none but the haters of salt (might they spread their hate somewhere else!)
Not loud at all
Safe for all but those with really high blood pressure
All will be consumed...
None needed

Jewish Mitzvot and legacy are full of agonizing ceremonies, torturous history, and really dull food; so why won't we enjoy them together!

We want to share a new way to devote to ourselves to the Hebrew god: spank people with Tefillin leather bands, bring a wailing wall where people can put notes of prey that afterwards are used as a toilet paper, and other weird ideas.

The highlight is to re-enact the Via Dolorosa and the crucifixion, cause since we last killed him he is all over the place.

P.S. We are Jewish and this dream's intention is to have some fun with Jewish traditions, and turn the religious tensions that divide the world into a fun burn experience that can unite the community.

buckets.title: HYPERSTITION: Chrome Room
buckets.summary: 50% dance-floor extension. 50% lounge. 100% vibes. Full aesthetic and conceptual immersion.

customFields.value:
Want to join the camp OR volunteer to help out on site? register at [https://hyperstition-analytica.info/](https://hyperstition-analytica.info/)

If you have any reflective/ mirror/ chrome dreams we are interested! Please reach out on discord to @seblaarouchi with your ideas

A well executed strike is important to Hyperstition. The vast majority of our structure and it's components are reusable. The single use material we will dispose of correctly. We will ensure that we Leave A Better Trace for the future borderlings.
Our venue may see 500 visitors at peak. The Chrome Room acts as a buffer for our dance floor and a large dedicated indoor space for personal items. We take the safety of everyone very seriously.

HYPERSTITION

_2026 is the_ **_final year_** _for_ **_HYPERSTITION_** _at Borderland. We are stepping up to take on the Valley_ (**_the legendary Muumima spot)_**_, more than_ **_doubling our size, light and sound._**

The **Chrome Room** is part of the Hyperstition dream universe, which also include the **Black Box** and **Moon Dome**.

The Chrome Room is the middle structure in the HYPERSTITION Moon Base. It will be integrated into the Moon Dome and the Black Box. As a sound camp with ambitions to throw many big parties that go long this year, we are well aware of the disruptive impacts of our dreams. We are currently involved in the pre-placement process and in contact with S.O.U.N.D. to ensure suitable placement to minimize the impact of our sound on the Borderland residents and the neighbours.

**TL;DR** The historic HYPERSTITION main party tent will be turned into an epic lounge COVERED in reflective chrome material. In the event of a party with 250 + attendees, the Chrome Room will open up into the Black Box to create one massive dance floor. The Chrome Room will also include a dedicated wardrobe space and a smoking area that's worth its salt.

**Hyperstition Chrome Room**

Modular lounge/dance floor extension. The Chrome Room provides an indispensable zone for hosting, allowing HYPERSTITION to adapt the party depending on the density and intensity of what is happening. Chrome and reflective material, such as mirrors, are a recognisable feature of our identity, and now we get to indulge in creating a space completely dedicated to that aesthetic.

Inside the same tent we will have a dedicated wardrobe. We want to be prepared for 250+ guests dropping off and retrieving their belongings.

**Making the Chrome Room a Reality**

We are repurposing our beloved party tent and furniture. We are asking for funds to totally pimp out the lounge, and for a wardrobe space that has the capacity for 250+ visitors. This will require structurally sound poles for hanging coats, shelves for vertical storage and adequate lighting.
We will need around 25kw in total across all Hyperstition dreams. We will stay close to power team throughout.
@seblaarouchi (Discord)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We are a sound camp. We are in close communication with S.O.U.N.D. to ensure that we are compliant with S.O.U.N.D. restrictions.

buckets.title: Juggling Workshop
buckets.summary: Beginner juggling workshop: learn the basic patterns to juggle three balls in a fun and accessible way. Perfect for anyone curious to get started.

customFields.value: The workshop uses only juggling balls, which makes cleanup simple and efficient. After the session, I will collect all equipment and ensure that no materials are left behind. Participants will also be encouraged to help gather the balls as part of closing the workshop. Since there is no waste or disposable materials involved, the area can be quickly restored to its original condition. Maintaining a clean space is a priority, and I will make sure the workshop leaves no trace.

The workshop is aimed entirely at beginners and focuses on teaching the classic juggling patterns step by step. I guide participants through the process of learning how to juggle with three balls, breaking it down into simple and approachable stages.

I have never applied for funding for this workshop and have instead used tennis balls as a budget solution. While that has made the workshop possible, tennis balls are not at all the same as proper juggling balls.

That is why I am now applying for funding to purchase real juggling balls for my annual workshop. With the right equipment, the workshop will be more fun, more accessible, and much better suited for teaching beginners successfully.

I set the budget to allow at least five participants to practice with three balls each. If the funding reaches the full amount of 1,500 SEK, I will be able to provide ten participants with three juggling balls each.

Workshop attendance is usually between 10 and 20 people, so I will also bring some tennis balls to ensure that as many participants as possible can take part.

In addition, the juggling balls will be available throughout the week for anyone who wants to drop by and practice.
Very safe
Max Hultman [maxhultman@hotmail.com](mailto:maxhultman@hotmail.com)

buckets.title: The Baby Badgers Youth Corps
buckets.summary: The children of Borderland need some discipline! Let's give our kids an afternoon of military fun and set them up for guaranteed real-world success.

customFields.value: Crispy. Discord: @crispy440

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Occasional drill instructor shouting and kids laughter.
You won't make your kids safe by sheltering them from danger. You'll make them safe by giving them the confidence and competence needed to handle danger, when it arrives.
The Green Zone - by Blackwater Operations

Dear Parent or Guardian,

Let's be honest. The world is a rough place - and it's not getting any softer. Many of you have been asking; "How do we prepare our kids for the world they'll be growing up in?".

## A new approach to education

Your prayers have been heard. While other camps want to teach your kids to hula-hoop and "express their inner dolphin", the Baby Badgers offer to make your child braver, stronger and more resilient.

We give them actual life skills. Skills schools won't teach. Skills that matter, like:

*   Tactical face paint (not the butterfly kind)
    
*   Basic reconnaissance
    
*   Spy craft
    
*   Obstacle course
    
*   Marching in formation
    
*   And more!
    

## Give your child a chance to win at life

By joining the Baby Badgers program, they'll have an amazing afternoon and come home full of discipline, purpose, and the ability to low-crawl under barbed wire. 

## Go Badgers, go!

### OPERATIONAL EXPENDITURES

Your generous funding will enable 12 young Borderlings to have an unforgettable afternoon, covering props, face paint - and for each participant, their very own military scarf and ‘Baby Badgers’-badge. Don't let these brave kids have an impoverished childhood.

#freedomdontcomefree

**Don't Pull Out Pledge:**

All reusable materials we buy will be available to the community afterwards, stored in Copenhagen or Alversjö.

buckets.title: The Schorle Bar 🐠🍸🐬
buckets.summary: Dive into our underwater bar for bubbly drinks and surprises that fulfill your deepest desires

customFields.value: We are looking to place ourselves in a quieter area -- the bar is a place to chat and be playful with the bartenders, old friends, or new friends so won't disturb the surrounding camps.
No big safety issues.

We will strike on Sunday and head home on Monday, making sure to take everything we brought with us, and making sure there is no trace left by us or our guests in the area around our Bar before we leave site.
We will need a small amount of electricity for lights
Nick R - nickrchen on discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Everyone who comes into the bar is co-creating with us. Name a new drink and challenge us to make a Schorle that lives up to that name. You might need to sing us a song to inspire us to serve your Schorle.
We will have a small bluetooth speaker playing music sometimes. But this isn't critical to our dream, so are flexible if our neighbors request us to turn it down.

### **When diving into the Schorle Bar, your future is in the hands of whichever bartender you meet.**

Our bartenders can be **playful & silly** 💦, or offer a spontaneous therapy session you didn't know you needed. Another bartender might slip you a secret menu that would **make your mother blush** 🔥

The last two years have been a **dream come true**, surprising you in a swirling current of home-made syrups, stickers, smooches & singing✨.

Enjoy your Schorle: a delicious blend of sparkling water and exquisite fruit syrups 🥝

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Last year we built a wooden structure with a clear roof so you could enjoy the sunshine even while inside the bar. The basics of the structure will remain the same this year, so we will re-use the wood and other building materials from last year's dream.

This year our pre-burn energy has been going towards making the bar even more beautiful, painting it both inside and out. customFields.value:
The Gaia Spirit Tree stands as an ancient yet ever-evolving symbol of unity, creation, and interconnectedness. This tree has long represented the bridge between Earth and Sky, past and future, self and the infinite.

Within our vibrant world of Borderland, Gaia rises anew - a luminous beacon of wisdom and transformation, a fusion of nature, technology, and human potential. From her core, light pulses like heartbeats, flowing through her branches like neural pathways - a living representation of the energy networks that connect us all, a universal life force. This is a **space where divine science and innovation meet consciousness, exploring how modern technology can enhance our sensory experience and deepen our connection to the world around us.** It’s where physics meets the metaphysical, where the unseen forces of the universe align with the psychic potential within us all.

Gaia invites you to step into a multi-sensory realm, engaging your body, mind, soul, and spirit. Come. Breathe. Observe. Listen. Awaken. Connect. Expand. Illuminate. Let her roots ground you, her branching light inspire and ignite you, and her presence remind you that we are all part of a vast, intelligent, and evolving system, far greater than ourselves.

buckets.title: Burners Time Capsule
buckets.summary:
This dream lets you preserve your treasures, thoughts or wishes in a special container, designed to withstand the test of time. 
Burner legacy

customFields.value: The 4 capsules will be given to different neighborhoods who will, in the spirit of co-creation, contribute with content for it and seal it at the end of this year's Borderland.

The capsules will be collected and stored for 2027, where they will be buried under rock solid art that solidifies our presence on the land, only to be discovered again with determination and willpower, not by chance.  
In conjunction with a true permanent art project we will leave a legacy that will stand the test of time.

Time capsules are portals to the past, carefully buried and filled with memories to be preserved for future generations.  
Whether you want to capture a moment of joy or create confusion, by sealing photographs, letters or trinkets, we capture the life, culture and story of us. 

When uncovered decades or centuries later, these capsules will provide a unique glimpse into the lives, values, and experiences of us who came before. They convey the abstract idea of history into something personal and possibly tangible. Burrowing a time capsule is not just about saving objects, it’s about telling the story of Borderland, our here and now. Preserving our presence.  
  
4 time capsules, one for each cardinal direction (North, south, east and west).  
  
You can be part of this, and have a part of you stored for potential eternity. Perhaps for archaeologists or extraterrestrials to eventually find and wonder what happened here and what kind of strange not-a-cult that walked this land.

These capsules, filled with memorabilia from eccentric creatures, will be buried in a magical setting on Borderland.land and conserved for the far away future. With this, we create a link across ages.
JazzPrr

buckets.title: Cuddle Cloud
buckets.summary: Come cuddle and huddle in the cozy cuddle cloud to escape the loud.

customFields.value: The Good, the Bad and the Cuddly

Our Cloud will disappear as quickly as it emerged, removing all traces, leaving nothing but clear, blue skies behind.

Everything will be taken down and packed on Sunday, to be stored at Älversjö for future burns.

We are actively spreading a cuddly (and slightly foolish) energy around us, and are already in talks with other cozy-minded camps and dreams to create a cuddly neighborhood.

Cuddle Cove Piazza: [https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnvhz075000lmk228mrolhg3](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnvhz075000lmk228mrolhg3)
Small portable speaker for atmospheric purposes exclusively.
We need electricity for the lights, heater rig, and speaker.
As the third iteration of this tent, our troupe has solid experience on safety standards regarding construction, fire safety and grounded electricity. Special attention given to heater rig and timer.

Citizens of Borderland! Cuddle Cloud is back in town!

After earlier success, our troupe of fools and cuddly cats are settling up tent in Alversjö yet again.

The Cuddle Cloud is a space for winding down tired bodies and yearning souls as much as a place for general unpretentious make pretend. Envision time for workshops, soft surfaces to lay down on and be warm, or a space to share a silly or deep discussion about the nature of reality and all there is. Or about cats being cute.

Our Cuddle Cloud is a spacious bell tent figuratively filled with possibilities, and literally filled with:

*   Foldable foam mattresses. Perfect for rolling, massage, practicing falling down, and laying down.
    
*   Heater Rig: a group of crazy cat engineers devised a system to maintain the Cloud warm even in the coldest night. This contraption works with a timer and has been deemed safe by many cats.
    
*   Blankets: For the extra cozyness that only being covered by a blanket can provide.
    
*   Music Machine: Laying in a mattress, covered by a blanket, and some lo-fi atmospheric music = peak hygge.
    
*   Plushie Toys: Mostly of the feline kind. Their origin is uncertain and their purpose yet unclear. But they will be there.

The Cuddle Cloud welcomes anyone with cozy intentions in mind, or the need for a warm and calmer environment.

The Cloud is open for any workshops, activities, or make pretend games which can benefit from a cozy and creative atmosphere. Let our troupe know what your idea is or what you envision happening in our space, and together we will make sure to turn it into a reality.

The bell tent etc has been co-created and funded in earlier iterations of this camp: Cat-Art-ic '24 and Stray Cats' Haven '25.

buckets.summary: A classy, dangerous place for high-rolling gamblers, hard-drinking cowboys and treacherous ladies. Will luck smile upon you?

customFields.value: None, we'll piggy-back off the Green Zone
Who wouldn't want to have an unlicensed casino next door?
Gambling is hazardous to your wallet. That's the point.
Low/medium
Feel free to dress up for the role of a 1970s/80s casino-guest. Feather boas, suits, dark shades.... You know the look.
The Green Zone - by Blackwater Operations

It's deep in the Borderland night. You're bored with the playa-tech and cheap validation. You step inside our smoky, warm tent, brimming with hard gambling, cowboy hats, laughter and classic blues on the sound system. 

You quickly trade in your TEMU-accessories for a handful of our house currency and proceed to the tables. The dealer, a woman in a bulletproof vest, gives you the once-over before dealing your cards. As you size up the other players, you realize this was just the place you didn't know you were looking for. 

## A new way to serve

For years, Blackwater Operations has been serving our community, safeguarding Borderlings from hazards such as eye-gazing competitions and didgeridoo jam circles.

This year we're diversifying our portfolio; adding BUCK - the Blackwater Unconscious Community Kasino - to our list of offerings.

Will you break the bank and win the big jackpot? Or maybe make new friends as you drown your sorrows at our bar? You'll have to play to find out. 

See you at the tables, civilian.

### OPERATIONAL EXPENDITURES

Your generous funding will cover expenses for blackjack, roulette and poker tables, casino decor - and of course, epic prizes and our custom branded BUCK casino chips. #freedomdontcomefree

**Don't Pull Out Pledge:**

All reusable materials we buy will be available to the community afterwards, stored in Copenhagen or Alversjö.

Camp Holy Mess

We will make sure that we don't leave flyers around to become moop, and be sure to hand them out to individuals who can decide to take them or not. We will take down any posters we put up at the end of the burn.

We have a very small footprint, mainly flyers and stickers and some signs for toilets and such. We will be present at the welcome table at the threshhold, and also at sound camp bars if they want. We will of course ask before we leave stickers anywhere and make sure that they don't blow away in the wind.

Let's celebrate the principle of Imediacy and leave our phones in our tents, and take only photos with our hearts at borderland! In the last few years we have seen more and more phones on the playa and more people taking photos and selifes. We find the presence of phones disturbing, and want to spread the culture of immediacy and phone free burns. You have the rest of the year to scroll, text, and selfie, let's make borderland a phone free space!

Lost your friends? Make new ones!

Don't make plans, be present where you are!

Take a photo with your heart, it will last longer (Seriously!)

This dream will produce info materials about immediacy, cool phone camera club stickers to remind people not to take photos (especially of other people without their consent), and we will distribute them at the Threshold/Port and at the sound camps, the Bunny Horse Bar, and other places around borderland. We will also make fun cup stickers saying that your phone is in your tent. We will make positive flyers to hand out to people we see using their phones on the playa. Our stretch goal will be to get some of those toy cameras with prisms for those who really want to shoot and pose.

**The Genie’s Lamp is inspired by the world of _One Thousand and One Nights_ - a dream of what it might feel like to step inside a Genie’s lamp.**

An intimate oasis of sensuality, where satin fabrics drape from the ceiling, soft plush pillows invite you to sink in, and the scent of incense lingers in the air. As you enter, you are welcomed by the Djinn - enchanting, playful, and otherworldly beings who inhabit this space.

Step inside, and you may find it hard to leave… perhaps even forever under their spell.

We create an aesthetic sanctuary of calm, connection, sensuality, and beauty. Here, the Djinn weave subtle magic, gently playing with the senses and inviting you to slow down, soften, and explore.

We delight in praise and flattery… and if you charm us just right, you might even be granted a wish.  
  
**With extended funding,** The Genie’s Lamp can expand to include a dedicated space for workshops, dance, and intimate gatherings - inviting deeper participation and co-creation within the oasis.

Enter the Temple of Vibrations. Here, the ones who enter, will be through this journey of vibrations leave more whole than how they arrived.

Enter through a an entrances so nondescript, that what meets you inside takes you aback in its glowing luminosity. From that grey outside, you enter into a space filled with colors. The walls and cecling are clouds that glows in pure effervescent light, dancing in delightful soft vibrations, lulling you into a deep trances of peace. Taking your first step inside, you notice that the floor itself is vibrating as well, moving you into sync with the whole space. You notice a calm like never before, and find yourself drawn towards the pille of soft pillows on the floor, lying down you find that time and space starts to melt apart.

At some time after, you dont know for how long, you feel the urge to move around the Borderlands again, and in leaving you notice that something is different. Difficult to pinpoint what, but somehow your are more "you", and it feels like everything just fits; and from that you glide back into your journey of explorations.

customFields.value: The Tahinians

The Tahinians welcome you to indulge in the wonderful godly amazing deliciousness of Tahini at our beautiful Tahini temple this year at borderland.

As you might know from our previous years The Tahinians offer a chill safe space with self serve Tahini fika, fun workshops and of course our opening and closing ceremonies of the big bucket of sacred Tahini. Workshops we wish to host include, Tahini yoga and Tahini improv theatre (and maybe others that we haven't thought of yet).

This year we are planning on doing a day party. We will play some Tahini tunes and dance as a celebration the great Tahini goddess and of course serve lots and lots of Tahini.

Because more and more people have realized that our religion (NOT A CULT) is the answer to all problems we are in need of a bigger Tahini temple. We are looking for a tent between 4x8-5x10 m in size.

Come join us honouring the Tahini whether it is thru chatting about Tahini, bringing your guitar and making Tahini songs, making Tahini art on your body using Tahini (note that all Tahini still has to be eaten), praying to the Tahini goddess or simpliy just eating Tahini. Any silly Tahini related shenanigans is encouraged as long as it is nice and is within the principles of the burn. Last year we had Tahini baptisms which might make a comback this year.

We wish to honour the Tahini with you all!! You can of course also bring sweet or savoury things to add to the Tahini fika if you wish.

We would love to afflict our neighboring camps with the love drug that is Tahini! It would be perfect to have some other chill camps as neighbors that could accept our Tahini religion into their hearts.

buckets.title: The Tiny Institute of Sensory Discoveries
buckets.summary: A cozy Borderland haven using sensory objects, textures and playful tools to gently anchor you in the present, the here & now.

customFields.value: The Camp at The End of The Universe

Welcome to the Tiny Institute of Sensory Discoveries, a safe haven by the edges of all the borderland magic. Where land meets the forest, by the end of a rainbow, it awaits you. Soft, childlike, and full of tactile curiosities, glowing objects, and tiny sensory surprises. For the curious, your Borderland adventures will inevitably lead you here.

Inside, you will find a small, cozy installation filled with objects to touch, explore and experience. From strange lenses and hidden textures to playful tools that awaken the senses, allowing you to drop into the present moment. There is nothing to understand here. Nothing to be thought of or solved. You are not here to perform, but simply observe.

Move slowly, follow your curiosity, and let your body guide you through moments of noticing. You may arrive alone or with a friend, and stay for as long or as briefly as you like, in the here & now.

This is not a sexual space, but a space for innocence, playfulness, and gentle meditative discovery.
Adina & John [(adinamortsell@gmail.com](mailto:\(adinamortsell@gmail.com))

buckets.title: WYSIWYG
buckets.summary: An augmented telescope that transforms reality in real-time. Look through and watch the landscape dissolve into a dreamlike, shifting vision.

customFields.value: If you feel like modelling things to be viewed in AR (or, to be heard in the headphones), contact: [jns.johansson@gmail.com](mailto:jns.johansson@gmail.com)!
Around 50W (device plus display). Needs power run to installation site.
Silent installation. Small ambient sound from embedded speaker only audible up close.
No.
Headphones.
Telescope is ground-anchored and cannot tip. No strobe or flashing elements. AR visuals are smooth and continuous.
All components are portable and reusable. Easy disassembly.
Jonas Johansson, [jns.johansson@gmail.com](mailto:jns.johansson@gmail.com)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
A lone telescope stands in an open field, unmarked and inviting. To a passerby, it appears as nothing more than an ordinary viewing device, in an unordinary place. But the moment someone looks through it, reality gets company: herds of creatures stampede across the horizon, strange figures drift between the trees, and the familiar landscape becomes a stage for the unexpected.

WYSIWYG uses augmented reality to overlay animated 3D creatures and visions onto the real world, visible through the telescope eyepiece. "What you see is what you get" was a term coined in the 70s, and used heavily in the 90s and 2000s as software and hardware lessened the gap between vision and reality.

The AR system runs on a smartphone device housed inside the telescope base, feeding a small high-resolution display at the eyepiece, while also providing the camera feed.

As participants rotate the telescope, the AR world moves with them. Creatures respond to the terrain. The experience is continuous and surprising — not a slideshow, but a living layer on top of reality.

The name says it all: what you see is what you get, plus a little more.

buckets.title: BorderLAN 2002
buckets.summary: Descend into the earth cellar. It is 2002. You are handed a hoodie. You are served Billy's Pan Pizza. You play classic LAN games. Reservations required.

customFields.value: Jonas Johansson, jns.johansson@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Around 500W total. Power needs to be run to the earth cellar.
All electronics packed and transported back. Furniture returned or repurposed. Perishable food consumed or disposed of responsibly.
Know your way around Raspberry Pi networking, LED control, or retro game setup? Want to co-host as game master? Get in touch: [jns.johansson@gmail.com](mailto:jns.johansson@gmail.com)
Speakers for background music and game audio at moderate volume. Headphones available for full immersion during gameplay.
Located in the earth cellar, naturally sound-isolated. Headphones available for gameplay. Speakers at moderate volume. Minimal impact on surroundings.
No

BorderLAN is back, but different. In 2025, it lived above ground. In 2026, it moves into the earth cellar and becomes a performance piece: a faithful recreation of a LAN party from 2002.

Guests descend into the cellar to find a makeshift basement living room. A couch, rugs, lamps, posters on the walls, and four gaming stations scattered across the space. Some sit at tables, some on the couch, one might be perched on a crate with a monitor on a couch table. Upon arrival, the game master, your host for the evening, hands you the dress code: hoodie and sweatpants. You put them on. You sit down. The ritual begins.

Two menus are presented. The food menu features the finest in LAN cuisine: Billy's Pan Pizza, Gorby's Piroger, and an assortment of classic snacks. To drink: a curated selection of perfectly aged beverages, remnants from the early 2000s; Jolt Cola, Dr. Pepper, Glocken Gold. The game menu offers multiplayer classics: Quake III Arena, Counter-Strike 1.6, Age of Empires 2, Diablo 2 and more.

Part installation, part LARP, part fine dining. A portal back to 2002, served with a napkin over the arm.

Music and ambiance is provided courtesy of the game master.

Outside of the event hours, BorderLAN is open for free play.
Low-profile setup. Cables secured. All electronics low-voltage, enclosed, and weather-protected inside the cellar. Space will be ventilated and proper precautions will be taken to ensure safety.

buckets.title: The Cabinets of Half-Remembered Lies
buckets.summary: Interactive Art Piece: Find something from a childhood that might not have been yours but somehow was.

customFields.value: Put into borderland storage or driven to Återvinning on Sunday of Burn.

Three second-hand dressers, worn and maybe white, stand side by side under a small shelter. Each has somewhere between five and eight drawers. Each drawer holds something from childhood, a plastic animal, a note that says something someone's mother once believed, a report card, a friendship bracelet, a matchbox with something inside it, a sticker sheet half-used. Objects that once felt enormous and now fit in the palm of your hand.

The theme is the things we believed completely, and then quietly stopped believing. Not with bitterness. With the particular tenderness of remembering yourself before you knew better. Santa. That adults have it figured out. That your best friend would be your best friend forever. That you were special in the way you thought you were special.

Every drawer is different. Some are lined with fabric and gold leaf. Some are sparse. Some are strange. Many are weird and silly. There is no order to them, no right way to explore. You just open things. And maybe something else closes.
Kitty Champagne

We’ll place 3–4 phone booths around Borderland, each connected to a small, local network and an old-school telephone. Pick it up, dial a number, reach another booth somewhere across the fields — see who answers 🤙

Pricing scales with the number of booths, and simpler approaches could probably also bring this to life.  
  
BOOTH 1 (CPE510 + ATA → Phone) ⇄ BOOTH 2 (CPE510 + ATA → Phone) ⇄ HUB (SBC + Router + CPE510) ⇄ BOOTH 3 (CPE510 + ATA → Phone) ⇄ BOOTH 4 (CPE510 + ATA → Phone)

Components:

*   Asterisk (open source software)
    
*   Single board computer
    
*   Router / Switch
    
*   TP-Link CPE510 (x2 per link)
    
*   ATA (Analog Telephone Adapter)
    
*   Analog telephone / rotary phone
    
*   Power banks
    
*   Ethernet cables
    
*   PoE injector (for CPE510)

buckets.title: Dovregubbens hall by Glittertind
buckets.summary: Where fjord-folk roam and basslines ring, we worship the wild old Mountain King. Trolls, witches, ravers—creatures all—are welcome here inside the hall 🧙🧌🪄🎶

customFields.value:
Absolutely. _Dovregubbens Hall_ isn’t just a sound camp; it’s a chaotic community cauldron bubbling with bass, love, and collective delusion. We thrive on co-creation like trolls thrive on goat memes and root vegetables. 

Bring your kazoo orchestra. Your noise poetry about moss. Your lecture on the metaphysics of mayonnaise. Your dance duet with an invisible elk. If you’ve got a weird idea and questionable judgment, congratulations - you’re one of us. 

We don’t just allow co-creation. We depend on it. Without you, it’s just a large hall with a fog machine and a haunting sense of potential. 

So, come. Add your flavor to the stew. The Mountain King demands it.
Glittertind. And is written by human hands.

Total Estimated Peak Usage: 3000-4000W

Note that usage will be staggered where needed.
We’ll be running a full PA, but with intention. We’ll aim for clear, contained, and considerate sound: speakers angled inward; volumes tailored to time of day. Our goal is immersive, not invasive.

_Dovregubbens Hall_ may be loud, but we're not lawless (okay, a little). We’re deeply committed to being excellent mythical neighbors - trolls with manners, if you will. 

Our sounds will be scheduled, directional, and respectful of the dreamscape around us. We'll keep the bass pointing inward, check in with nearby camps, and make sure the fog doesn’t swallow your tent (unless invited). 

We’re all for magical chaos, but never at someone else's expense. If there's ever an issue, just yell “TROLL!” and we’ll come running with stew and apologies.
Communication is key, and all creatures, mythical or otherwise, will be held in a space of care and mutual respect. We’ll have clear guidelines, plus a sober troll or two keeping an eye on things.

When the last bassline fades and the stew pot is licked clean, Dovregubbens Hall will vanish like a troll at sunrise. 

We have a clear and committed strike plan: full teardown of our structure, stage, and decor, and a dedicated MOOP-lead to ensure every last sequin, spoon, and stray pølse wrapper is found and removed. 

We'll leave the land better than we found it - no trace, no troll droppings, no lingering fog (unless it's emotional).
Eva Vikmane eva@vikmane.no

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: This is Dovregubbens Hall - part sound camp, part sacred troll rave, a fantastical oasis. Our sun rises, the air thick with the scent of pine and possibility. Stumble into sound baths, ritual nonsense, and the occasional spontaneous musical about pickled herring and heartbreak. Bring your journal, an instrument, or your silence to watch the fog drift. There are cushions scented of old stories for rest, mossy rugs for bare feet dancing, corners for co-creating art or magic. Come to move. Come to make something strange and beautiful. Come to do absolutely nothing and call it sacred. When the waxing gibbous Moon passes the heart of Scorpius, the portal opens. Trolls stomp. Elves rap. Goblins twerk. Fey-folk sing. The Mountain King sits rules by nodding solemnly to the beat like a heavily bearded metronome. Huldra reaches her full power, Nøkken doesn´t stand a chance. Genres melt, timelines bend, and someone inevitably ends up dancing with a ladle. Dovregubbens Hall is an open invitation to all mythical beings, borderline creatures, and anarchists with rhythm in their blood and wonder in their eyes. It’s a place to get lost, recharge, and maybe find your troll soul.

Yes, anyone keen on spending time in Alversjö this spring.
Maybe the water sprinklers will wet you at early dawn.

One of the main points people bring up as a winning factor of burning in Alversjö is that we are immersed so deeply in Nature.

Our 80 ha land has many topographies and new ones are being developed along with our all year round presence. Many of us care for its long-term welfare and like to steward the land in a healthy and sustainably inspiring way forward. Gardens are such a way to me, and have so far been a successful and appreciated way to give people unique experiences being on the land. The secret garden gave that 'wow' effect in 2024, and the square continued to puzzle peoples minds of what we can dream of and do with owning land to burn on.

As a co-creator of both these projects, with all year round presence on the land, at work weekends and the ongoing building of community - allow me to further develop and add to these spaces with edible plants, berry bushes, fruit trees, edible mushrooms, ornamental plants, flowers, etc.

With enough funding this can spill over into new spaces around down-town that I see contain land art, flower mazes, willow huts and more.

Let's use more plants to create rooms to be in and lift this old farm into something unique beyond the borderland event!
Simon O'Connell

customFields.value:
Since the very first people began wandering this earth, they have gathered in caves, in tents or under the stars around a campfire to tell each other stories.

Throughout their travels through time and space the storyteller has gathered innumerable tales about all manner of wondrous things. Some stories are cheerful, some tragic, some about love, some about hate, some exciting, some mundane, some inspiring and some even terrifying.

Uniting them is that they have never ever been told before to anyone and the storyteller now invites curious listeners to sit down and listen for a few minutes.

Each story has been put to paper and will only be told once, and after it has been told the paper will be burned, never to be told again. Those who listened are welcome to try and re-tell it to others, but it will never be told again exactly as it was, making each storytelling session a completely unique experience.

Depending on funding, listeners might be treated to a cup of hot cocoa to warm them up for late night storytelling session on those cold Alversjö nights.
Sounds levels will likely be kept to a minimum, unless of course a particularly scary story will cause the audience to scream in terror.

The storyteller will disappear as mysteriously as they appeared and will clean up any rubbish left behind after each session. We might make a wind shelter with some twigs but that will also be cleaned up.

Co-creation is welcome, especially if someone is good at making improvised windshelters in the woods for story telling. People are also welcome to write stories to be told by the storyteller, and while this is highly encouraged you must agree to letting this be only time the story is told so please remove any copies you might have after submitting. The sky really is the limit when it comes to themes and submission should be around 400-500 words and can be sent to [thestorytelleroftheborderland@proton.me](mailto:thestorytelleroftheborderland@proton.me)

buckets.title: Inconvenient Popsicles
buckets.summary: Handmade popsicles with unexpected flavors and a salty edge. Shaped like something that no longer exists. You’ll make it melt. Deal with it.

customFields.value: The molds will be food-grade silicone. Standard hygiene applies.
The freezer goes home with me. The laser-cut sticks are gifts, but I’ll be collecting any that get left behind.
Enough to keep one small chest freezer cold.
PeterBul on Discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Saltrock City
I’ll be based out of a small chest freezer at camp, but I’ll also be roaming the landscape with a freezer box. No loud music, no flashing lights—just a quiet, cold interaction.

The cycle is completed when you consume the popsicle. You are the final part—the one who holds the weight while it disappears. If there is an idea for a flavor that shouldn't exist, or a story about something lost track of, come find me before it's all gone.

My intention is to recreate a one-trillion-tonne entity at a scale of roughly 1:1,000,000,000. It was a massive, silent presence that arrived in 2017 and had entirely vanished by 2021.

Technically, you could have licked it in its original form—though back then it was the size of Luxembourg and required a fairly inconvenient trek to reach. Now, it fits in your hand.

I’m planning to translate the data and jagged contours of this vanished thing into 3D-printed molds. The flavors will be built from unexpected ingredients, borrowing from the teachings of cocktail alchemy.

You'll make it melt. Deal with it. It’s sweet, it’s cold, and it’s meant to be felt twice.

Come find me at Salt Rock City, or look for the roaming freezer bag out in the wild.

buckets.title: Hexology
buckets.summary: A collaborative musical mashup game!

customFields.value: Benjamin Pollack @wildbappy

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
This is a sound experience at the level of a home audio system at high volume.

It is important that we are not next to any loud camps.

We will work on sound-proofing as to not annoy our neighbors, but some sounds will be heard outside.

By using a 4 speaker system all pointed inwards, we keep the volume very low for the type of experience that we offer. This is designed for 4-8 players to enjoy the highest quality sound possible.

Our operating hours are **13h - 17h and 21h-22h.**

**Hexology is an interactive art and music game!**

1) Players enter into our witchy den and learn the ways of magic  
2) They select ingredients off the shelf on the walls and place them on the pillars.  
3) They get to remix our magic with our secret spell book.  
  
There are over 150 different ingredients and a dozen musical genres to choose from!

Check out our video here:

[https://photos.app.goo.gl/WzHQRh7QJP2MgRCe6](https://photos.app.goo.gl/WzHQRh7QJP2MgRCe6)

Detailed budget in the pictures!
The installation includes the optional use of a hazer - we will warn participants with a sign and they can request that we disable it for their session.

Here is the circuit map:

1-3, Sound: 48 Amps  
4, Hazers: 20 Amps  
5, Lighting: 10 Amps  
6, Misc: 8 Amps

Total: 6 Circuits, 86 Amps
Hexology
We run the sound roughly between **~85 and 90db.**

We do not use things like glitter or feathers in our deco to specifically avoid moop.

  
We will be dismantling everything Sunday morning.  
  
It takes approximately 2 hours to pack everything up.

  
Once everything has been loaded out, we will sweep to make sure nothing has been left behind.  
  
This installation generates no trash but we will pack out all leftover garbage the participants might have created.

buckets.title: The EGGzistence
buckets.summary: Get inside and dive deep into yourself by listening to eggzistential music notes!

customFields.value: It will be removed on the last day of the event, duration approximately 4 hours, and YES, the place will be left better than we found it!
This dream belongs to the Lithuanian Burner's camp - Lazy Camp!

The EGGzistence art installation represents the legend about the creation of the world. It is believed that _Perkūnas_ or Thunderer (Thor) – the god of thunder and lightning in Baltic mythology- created the world by laying an egg, from which fire was born, and that is how life in the whole world was created. 

The art installation symbolizes the birth of the world and invites you to be reborn through the eternal fire, to dive into the moment and discover your inner fire by watching the dancing flames at the top of the egg.

This is an interactive, engaging, artistic fire installation, where you can constantly observe the soothing and engaging flame of fire when you lie down.
Very low ambient music, which will bring you to yourself. A quieter and more remote location is needed.

Safety will be provided by hiding all equipment and having a fire extinguisher and a fire blanket in a visible place. Someone from the team will take a look to ensure that everything is under control.
We will need one extension cable to connect to the main electricity source for the LED lights and the sound bar.

The art installation would love to be in a bit more remote area, where Borderlings could find it unexpectedly and enjoy the calmer surrounding space, allowing them to deep dive into themself during this experience.

We would not be affecting our neighbours negatively, as there is a low sound and low light installation.
Co-create only in the meaning to explore this art installation and explore the depth of the university.

buckets.title: A Pancake Boner
buckets.summary: Indulge in sweet & savory delicious vegan pancakes for all Borderlings 12:00-15:00, Monday through Friday.

customFields.value: Safety is our top priority. We will be cooking with induction stovetops. Our head pancake chef has worked in professional kitchens for 8 years.
We will be playing disco tunes at a low to moderate volume, just to keep the kitchen going and to bring all pancake enthusiasts into the vibe. No sound system above 1000W.

We warmly welcome any and all aspiring pancake chefs. Our goal is to feed the masses, the masses willing, and our collective ability to churn out pancakes is heavily dependent on the number of cocks in the kitchen. Sorry– _COOKS_ in the kitchen. The more pancake cooks, the more pancake batter, and the bigger the pancake boner.
SeedsNHugs on discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We will ask pancake enthusiasts to bring their own plates or serve it in their hands. Hence, our moop is limited and contained within our premises. Our stand will be deconstructed and put away early Sunday.

In the wee hours around noon, burners start emerging from their tents– some well-rested, some sleep-deprived, some with a new personality. In the midst of this collective waking up there can be heard a gentle rumbling of empty stomachs, yearning for sustenance. Most are so caught up in the hustle and bustle, the rhyme and the lack of reason, the glitter and the goo, that they simply forget to get the meals in to keep their bodies going and their minds flying. _Let it not be so_.  

Our dream is to rectify this collective caloric deficit by means of an erection. An erection of a glorious pancake boner, which will spray out pancakes _en masse_. It does not matter if you are hungry, if you did not have time to cook, or if you just want to enjoy a delicious pancake. Be it for breakfast, brunch or lunch– we will serve you.  

Just like any boner, our pancake boner is sometimes up, and sometimes it simply can’t perform. We will be open 12:00 to 15:00, Monday through Friday.  

We will be serving two main options, one _sweet_ and one _savory_, with a variety of toppings and jams. All vegan and delicious.

As we are a daytime activity, we are aiming to locate ourselves in the noisier parts of town. We do not mind loud music, and we will be playing some music of our own, but within our own premises, and with great consideration for our dear neighbors.
We are estimating that we’ll be using between 3 and 8 kW, approximately 4 hours a day.

customFields.value: The Secret Sailors
Orgone has never hurt anyone, quite the opposite. It has been used to heal fascists since the early 1900s.
Very quiet. We will make announcements with a megafon of sorts. Daytime activity.

Absolutely! We depend on fellow borderlings to build, use and spread the Orgone. Our minimum budget is for 1 human size accumulator, 1 small size accumulator with shooter and funnel, and one wand. If we get more funding we will build more, and distribute all over the Borderland. Come join us! And please contact us if you want to co-create in any possible weird way. Maybe a dance floor in an Orgonite pyramide.

We also need study objects for the research project and If there is a researcher that can help write a paper that would be mostly appreciated.

This is also a service, where Borderlings who feel drained, empty, disillusioned and sad, can come and get embraced by Orgone energy.

The Orgone will affect everyone in a positive way. Most likely we will have more sunshine and good weather. Probably kids friendly.

During day time we are open for collaboration with play spaces by charging their future guests, and their toys, with Orgone.

Will be removed by the end of Borderland. We can disassemble the accumulators for the next BL or the materials will be recycled. We will make minimum alteration of the materials so they may be reused.

We're bringing Orgone back to the Borderland! Maybe you remember the Orgone toilet in 2015? Now Orgone is accumulating once again. This will be the largest Orgone accumulation project in history. Ancient forgotten civilizations may have done something similar, but the records are annoyingly vague.

Orgone is life force, cosmic energy, present in the atmosphere in free form and concentrated by the accumulator. Wilhelm Reich described it in the 1930s, and while Orgone has since been overshadowed by chi, prana, kundalini, and also sex-negative forces, such as slut shaming and fascism, we believe the time has come for its return.

We will host an open workshop area where we will construct Orgone accumulators. We have had long and serious studies in the science of Orgone. We will provide drawings, materials, tools, guidance. Once the accumulators are built, we will gather Orgone at Borderland and invite participants to be soaked in it, showered with it, and possibly transformed by it. This is likely a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to expose a large population to Orgone.

It's a workshop, an experiment, a ritual. A trip into the muddy waters of pseudo-science. It is about rebuilding lost technologies and gathering life positive energy.

We do not serve food—we facilitate a multi-sensory immersion into the essence of cheese. True healing begins at the temple, where cheese becomes the medium for spiritual and physical realignment.

**Last year, we served you ~600 liters of fresh black coffee** from a small automated grind-and-brew coffee stand. Always open, always there for you. ..until we ran out of beans.

So **this year we scale up.** More beans, vegan milk, sugar, and most importantly; A low investment meeting point, for you to sit and drink your coffee, whether it rains or the sun is too bright for your tired soul.

# The automated Café

Will be a cosy hangout spot, with small tables, comfy bossanova, dim warm light in the night, and of course our tried and tested setup for endless fresh coffee, whenever you need it.

\* **It's not actually all about the coffee.** When we built the setup last year, we were all about the black magic. But the real magic happened in the queue and in the tent while you were sipping. Reminded that borderlings are hyper social creatures, we want the café to be a low investment meeting point, where you can get together on the common ground of a shared caffeine addiction. We will ready a few board games, and might even offer a local news paper if you are into radical reality.

buckets.title: Fantasy roleplay - by the Fuckery
buckets.summary: A workshop where seasoned kinksters together with theatre professionals help you safely act out your most forbidden fantasies.

customFields.value: **The Fuckery**

The chance of getting to play with your fantasies and desires, and then maybe even to boldly show them for a wider audience, might create a liberating joy that could spill over to the rest of Borderland  - and from there to the world!

We will be operating inside the main event tent of the Fuckery camp—a broader play space designed with care and consent at its core. We will clearly communicate our operating hours. We aim to harmonize with nearby camps and spaces, avoiding overlap with events that might clash in vibe or volume. We are open only during scheduled times to preserve possibilities for other events and activities within the space.

We all have them — forbidden fantasies, hidden desires, that one scenario you've replayed more times than you'd care to admit. Here, we bring them to life.

Do you dream of being adored like a piece of art? Of being told what to do by a stern superior? Of erotic encounters in unlikely settings — being ravaged, crossing lines of age and status, surrendering to a mystic stranger, a dirty car mechanic, a sultry schoolgirl, a catholic priest…?

What if you had a chance to safely explore exactly what happens next?

In a warm, judgment-free setting, we refresh consent and do some playful exercises to loosen the mind. Then, in small groups, we share our secret erotic daydreams — and with the gentle guidance of facilitators experienced in both theatre and real-world fantases, we help each other enact them in intimate scenarios.

How far you go is entirely up to you. We build the safe container, you bring a curious mind and a glint in your eye.

Come join us at The Fuckery for a juicy dive into desire — together with fellow curious kinksters.

_(Feeling extra bold? The bravest get to perform their creation live, in front of a full house, on The Erotic Theatre…)_
This is a workshop, based on what the participants bring, want to express - and the chemistry between them.
Only moans, some low key music and the occasional dirty talk… operating in alignment with The Fuckery's soundscape and sound levels.
The space will be held by experienced facilitators who will introduce the rules and ensure a safe, respectful, and welcoming atmosphere. All participation is strictly consensual.
Will go down with the rest of The Fuckery. We build Sat-Monday July 19th-20th and are done with Strike no later than Sunday July 26th.
Lights, fans and some music. This dream relies on electricity estimations of The Fuckery’s infrastructure, in coordination with the camp team.

customFields.value:
Everything we bring, we take back.  
Everything we create, we either remove or respectfully redistribute.

Leave no trace — except in people.
We aim to create a soft, respectful and chillout space.

In the middle of the intensity, the music, the movement — there is a space to slow down.

The Art Sanctuary is a calm, grounding space where you can step away from everything and reconnect through creativity. Instead of talking things through, you can paint them. Instead of performing, you can just exist.

This is not a workshop.  
This is not therapy.  
This is something in between.

Here, you’ll find canvases, colors, and a quiet invitation to express whatever is present — no expectations, no right or wrong. Some will paint for five minutes, others will stay for hours. Some will sit in silence, others will connect with strangers through shared creation.

Over time, the space becomes a reflection of the people passing through it — layered, emotional, abstract, real.

Some of the artworks may organically find their way into small pop-up exhibitions or collaborations with other dreams during the week.

Low risk.

We’ll provide basic guidance for materials and tools.
Minimal. Soft lighting for evenings.

customFields.value: Striking will begin on Sunday morning and continue until the tub is drained, the ash is cold, the wood is stacked, the platform is cleared, and every last screw, splinter, bottle cap, and suspicious wet fabric has been dealt with.

We want Wildwater to live by the shore as a dreamy, dirty, and respectful little heat ritual. We’ll keep it welcoming, sturdy, safe-ish, and in good relationship with the lake, the trees, the path, the neighbors, and anyone nearby who did not specifically ask to wander into an accidental pagan spa tableau.

Wildwater is for everyone who’s stared at a cold lake, a pile of pallets, a galvanized tub, and a wood fire and thought: yes, this is exactly the kind of terrible idea that might become perfect.

Instead of behaving like sensible people and merely going for a swim, we want to build a raised little bath platform by the shore: a rough wooden deck, a steel tub, a hungry firewood heater, and a steaming soak spot for hot skin, cold plunges, smoky hair, dirty feet, and the kind of feral luxury that only makes sense at Borderland.
Want to make steps, benches, a little changing nook, lanterns, a woodpile shrine, or some kind of shameless lakeside seduction architecture? Come help.

buckets.title: Chaos Synth: a collaborative musical art experience
buckets.summary: A glowing synth shrine that turns strangers into a band.

customFields.value:
We will place the art piece somewhere where people travel, but not near habitats, so that the sound doesn't annoy people who live near it.

  
With that said, it's not a rave machine -- it will not be loud.
Nevyn Bengtsson -- hello@nevyn.dev

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
You're walking through camp at dusk. A low drone catches your ear, and coloured light pulses gently from behind an acrylic panel. You step closer and find a side panel covered in buttons and knobs. You start fiddling. The drone shifts. The lights respond. Someone appears on the other side and starts adding a melody. A third person joins. None of you know each other, none of you are musicians, but you're making music anyway.

Chaos Synth is a three-sided LED-lit instrument designed to be discovered. Each side has its own set of controls: one shapes a droning bass layer, another triggers melodic sequences, and a third sculpts textures with filters and effects. No wrong notes, no instructions needed. Just walk up and play.

_Cover images are concept art. The finished piece will look different, but in this vibe._

**How it works**

Three microcontrollers read inputs from each side's controls and send MIDI to a Raspberry Pi running the synth engine. The Pi handles sound synthesis and drives the LED animations so light and sound stay in sync. Sound comes out through a modest built-in speaker. Think portable JBL at conversation volume, not PA system.
The Chaos Synth will have amplified speakers, but think "JBL portable speaker", not "rave". The sound is intended to be atmospheric and melodic, not intense.
The Chaos Synth is sturdy and made to come apart for transportation into flat chunks. We will install it on arrival, and tear it down at strike.
The Chaos Synth is small enough to not be dangerous. It will be weather protected (probably a tent around it, plus weather protecting the acrylic case as much as possible).
Wired power is ideal. We can run on a large power bank as a fallback, but wired would mean a lot.

We're Madde, Gustav and Nevyn. We've been running the Shiny Art LED light art workshops at Borderland for a few years now, and we want to channel that into something that stays up all week. We're good at lights, aesthetics, electronics and construction.

**Looking for a sound collaborator**

Our strengths are in hardware, LEDs and interaction design. If you're a musician or sound designer who wants to help shape the synth engine, get in touch!
Explorers

buckets.title: The Last Supper of Camp CC
buckets.summary: A banquet fit for the doomed aristocracy. Bring your own chair. Leave your allergies at the gate.

customFields.value: Low, under 1000w of offect

Camp CC cordially — nay, _royally_ — invites you to a Grand Banquet in the style of those who dined magnificently and governed poorly.

Fifty seats. One course. Meat. We will not be entertaining dietary negotiations — the kitchen is sovereign and its decrees are final. You may, however, bring your own chair (BYOC), as the revolution has claimed most of the furniture.

You will be received as honoured guests of the court. There will be entertainment befitting a dying regime — performances, toasts, and merriment of the sort that only those blissfully unaware of the sharpening blades beyond the courtyard can truly enjoy. The evening air may carry a faint metallic sound. Pay it no mind. Have more wine.

Dress code: As if tomorrow is uncertain.

This is not a dinner party. This is _the_ dinner party. The last one that matters. Come hungry. Come dressed. Come while you still can.

**What we need funding for:** The aristocracy requires provisions. Our budget covers ingredients for a single magnificent meat course for 50 guests, table settings worthy of a court that refuses to acknowledge its own decline, candles, decorations, and whatever theatrical elements are needed to maintain the illusion of grandeur until the very last toast.

The Poetree  
An organic performance art piece exploring the cycle of the forest, and eternity as transformation through connection.  
The Birch Spirit emerges from the forest floor at dusk, rooted in a mound of trailing bark and moss. She begins low to the ground, speaking a poem of ancestral growth, a spoken word piece tracing the lineage of trees, soil, and the ones who came before. As the poem reaches its climax, she is slowly hoisted up into the canopy, her birch bark body unfurling as she ascends, until she becomes a towering Poet-Tree suspended in the branches. She holds there. She speaks from above. And then she dies, descending in stillness back to the earth, where the bark shell opens and the spirit sheds her tree form to reveal a... mushroom! She becomes a mushroom on the forest floor, curled into the moss.

After the two times I'll do this perfomance, , people will be able to put on the costume (without flying), use some available headphones and go on a TREE-SALIS meditation  
The costume will be made with birch bark, as it's local ( in the pictures it was eucalyptus because it was in portugal) and then composted :)  
The intention is to evoke a sense of wonder, enable others to be their tree and embodied belonging
