customFields.value:
For years the Figging Stand has been offering Borderlings the physical, social and spiritual benefits of Figging - aka the art of inserting raw peeled ginger into your rectum. As our spiritual founder, the Reverend Figuru, will tell you, “A fig a day keeps the Patriarchy away!”

For the past two years, our proud disciples have hand-carved hundreds of ginger buttplugs, allowing you Borderlings to find those transformative experiences that everyone seeks, but few ever find. 

However, all good things must come to an end, and the time has almost come for the Figging Stand to move on. There are millions of uninitiated buttholes out in the default world, all of them waiting, longing, _gagging_ for the sweet, enlightening burn of the Figging Practice. 

So for one last time, let us gather under the holy neon light and together, embrace the sweet burn of raw rectal ginger. 

Thank you for your generous donations. They will be used to cover well-overdue repairs - and of course, to purchase copious amounts of fresh, biodynamic and ethically farmed ginger.
The Figging Stand is a strong supporter of Burnerbox. All reusable material will continue to be made available for the community.
Occasional encouragements via megaphone and screams of joy and pleasure.
Figging is completely safe. Actually, given the physical, mental, and spiritual benefits, it is unsafe NOT to fig.
Ever since the Figging Stand appeared at the Borderland, peace, harmony, and coexistence had spread throughout the Playa.

We would love for our fellow Bodelings to find unique, creative ways to bring Figging into their life. Maybe at weddings, bar mitzvahs, or as part of your camp initiation ceremony? Don't hesitate to reach out if you want to book a special visit from The Figging Stand.

These aren't just phones; they're a direct line to the unknown. Hidden somewhere else in Borderland is the second booth, and the only rule is: Pick up when it rings. It’s high-stakes social roulette for the brave and the bored. You might find yourself on a spontaneous blind date with a stranger across the playa, getting grilled by a ”reporter” from Smålandstidningen, or debating a conspiracy theorist about why horses aren't real. No DMs, no ghosting, back to the real deal. Your boothy call is waiting.

A wagon. Speakers. No schedule. No location. No warning.  
  
We roll up out of nowhere, blast music, place a mysterious offering in your hands, throw a party, and vanish. By the time you say "was that a DJ on a cart giving me things?" we're three camps away doing it again. A flash mob that never rehearsed, powered by blind faith and questionable decisions. Simultaneously a shrine, a nightclub, and a vehicle. We refuse to choose.  
  
We don't just throw parties, we bring them TO YOU. Open for collabs. Roll into your camp, link up with your sound, merge dance floors, or turn your Tuesday into something unexplainable. Let's talk!  
  
At some point, the Disciples of Alba x Rosewater Cult Universe collide for The Rosewater Cult Boom Party. An unholy ceremony of bass, rosewater, and devotion. Details are sacred. Attendance is mandatory. Robes optional, but encouraged  
  
TIME: Unknown. PLACE: Unknown. OFFERINGS: Guaranteed.  
  
What we have: Boomboxes. A DJ table. Lights. Enthusiasm. What we need: Your vote to build the wagon and haunt Borderland like a holy ghost on wheels. What will you receive? No one knows. Not even us. But the Wagon provides.  
  
You can't find us. You can only be found.
No, but we have an extremely handsome electrician…

The Wagon arrives without warning and disappears the same way. On the final day, the Disciples will perform one last sacred ritual: cleaning up. Every cable, every cup, every suspicious piece of glitter will be hunted down and removed with the same energy we bring to the dance floor.

But if a rogue sequin escapes, we have a designated MOOP Disciple whose sole purpose is to crawl the ground and restore it to its pre-Wagon state. They volunteered. Sort of.

The wagon itself gets dismantled, loaded up, and driven home. The only thing we leave behind is the faint memory of a party you're not entirely sure happened.

buckets.title: The Garden by Glittertind
buckets.summary: The (In-Between/ Bridging / Bifröst) Garden – Where Trolltunga Kisses Dovregubbens Hall

customFields.value: Bifröst Garden Where roots meet rhythm, a garden grows, bridging a breathing space between the Hall´s holy racket and the Toung´s velvet whispers. It´s in the pause between notes and the inhale before the howl. The bridging garden is neither here nor there, nor loud or silent, it´s the threshold where magic lives. The garden is a sun-drenched daydream of a party. Hot dogs sizzling, waffles stacked like architectural marvels dripping with trollkrem. Sit on a mushroom. Feed a fairy. Argue life´s meaning with a flower. The Garden doesn´t judge. Impossible blossoms that have no business blooming but do so anyway. Tiny Troll villages nestle between roots, each one a fully functioning micro-society with its own politics, drama and several pubs. A suspiciously wise owl has been spotted twice. Who invited it? Can you find the wandering tree? You might find it near waffles, tucked behind vines, deep in a quiet moment where the light hits just right. You might find it today, yet tomorrow somewhere new. Some say it move when no one´s looking. Others say it reveals itself to those in true need a boon. Hang a wish, tie a secret, weave a promise into its bark. Might it grant them or eat them? Either way, your business is no longer your own.

The Garden grows with you. Bring your sewing skills, your paintbrush, your voice, or your silence. We'll provide the framework; you bring the bloom. Bring your fabric scraps. Your watercolors. Your questionable poetry about lichen. Your ability to braid things that should not be braided. Do you want to build a fairy house? Add a branch to the Tree? Teach a workshop on the sacred geometry of Waffle Irons?  

The Garden is not a finished thing—it is a verb, a happening, a glorious group project with no rubric and no teacher. 

Every hand that touches this space leaves a fingerprint on the dream. With you, it's _alive_—breathing, growing, and occasionally humming show tunes for no reason. 

Come make the Garden stranger than you found it.

The Creatures of the Garden play nicely.  

We´ll coordinate with our neighbors, keep sound directional, and ensure the Garden´s magic keeps the vibes cooking, but never to the point where the troll villages start vibrating off their foundations. We´ve spoken to the fairies about noise complaints and found them to be surprisingly reasonable.

Total Estimated Peak Usage: 1000W

When the last petal falls and the Tree has heard its final wish, the Garden will fold itself back into the earth like a troll turning to stone at dawn. Gracefully, gratefully, and with a dedicated MOOP lead ensuring every scrap of fabric, paper, and rogue hulderkrem is accounted for. 

Structures dismantled. Lights down. Fairy houses relocated with sensitivity. The Tree's branches stored for next year's dreaming.  

We leave nothing but gratitude and the faintest hint of waffle smoke. The land will not remember we were here. But we will remember it was beautiful.
With respectful of their neighours

buckets.title: The spring of woolly fortune
buckets.summary: A cozy space dedicated to the creation of woolly crocheted fortune cookies that are to be spread and shared. And the creation of borderlands yellow brick rug.

customFields.value:
Know someone who could use a little fortune? Has chance been gaslighting you lately? Join us to make your own crochet fortune cookies, to grace/prank someone you love!

We provide a cozy space with tea, music, yarn everywhere, and guided sessions on how to crochet your own unique woolly fortune cookie with a custom message.

You take control of destiny, one loop at a time.

Are you hoping for a soft and gentle future? Or do you rather need it a bit rougher? Find the perfect material to match your ambitions, imbue the paper with power using an antique typewriter passed down by generations of thrifting witches, and then go out and gift a stroke of luck.

Advice, innuendo, confusion, positivity. The power of the woolly fortune cookie will bend karma to your will, no matter what it wants.

In exchange for the gift of divination, we ask that you use our loom to weave a few rows into our communal rug. As it grows, it becomes a part of the space, and we hope to bring it year after year to capture our history of future telling.
This will be a dream chill on the soundlevel.
We gonna remove the dreams fluffs and snippets and the tent on strike day, no trace will be left.

Yas! We'd love to join a place or a camp with more craftsy and/ or cozy corners to share space building forces with. Does the communal rug dream make something ring in you and wanting to evolve it? Let's dream! Would you like to join in and show borderlings how to transfer inner fortune into woolly fortune with an easy crocheted pattern? We'd love you to join us!

Our neighbors will be hit the hardest by the stream of wisdom, cheek and fortune flowing out of our dream, so beware!

We still need to figure out placement, and it depends on whether we join a camp who'd like to host us. Either way we expect to affect neighbors only in adding a cozy vibe to the hood.

Two dreamers looking for a camp to join, and/or to host our workshop

Two visions we dream of at the moment: either we place it/host it ourselves in a cozy tent, or we find a camp who'd like to host/co-create with us and then we redirect the tent budget to the workshop items.
The space will be operated mostly during the day, but it'll need some working light and speakers for music.
Crochet hooks are blunt-tipped and safe, but we'll have a basic first aid kit in case of extra radical self expression.

buckets.title: Absolute Nonsense
buckets.summary: The dry spa experience for emotionally overcooked burners.

customFields.value: Alexandra Kogan

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
**Absolut Nonsense** is an immersive art piece disguised as a luxury spa. We are creating a sensory illusion: a 100% dry “hot tub” where participants can enjoy the psychological benefits of a good soak, social bonding, and relaxation without a single drop of water.

  

Visitors step into a plush, glowing spa filled with soft textures, bubble sounds, sensory effects, absurd treatments, and dead-serious attendants guiding them through a restorative therapeutic experience that is entirely imaginary. It is a fake wellness sanctuary for burners who are spiritually boiled, socially over-seasoned, or in need of social-role exfoliation without the inconvenience of actual water. Somewhere between irony and sincerity, something softens.

  
**What we already bring:** The core structure will be a soft inflatable pool, filled with cushions, plush balls, and reflective fabric to evoke the feeling of water. The illusion will be deepened through sound, steam, lighting, and scent effects. The team will contribute scenography, performance, hosting, facilitation, and the playful absurdity that makes the experience come alive.
If you have ideas, materials, performance impulses, or would like to co-create, please get in touch.

This highly accessible participatory experience welcomes shy people, silly people, tired people, and people passing by alone. It invites laughter, conversation, roleplay, and memorable encounters. It is both an installation and a social engine.
Low. Some laughter may arise naturally from visitors. We may also use a small portable speaker for ambient music and bubble sounds.
This is a dry installation with no water and no heating system, which keeps the project relatively low-risk from a safety perspective. Any decor elements will be kept simple and used with care.

On Saturday afternoon, we will dismantle the structure, pack everything out, and save reusable materials for future Borderland projects.  
As a completely water-free installation, the piece produces zero greywater. All “bubble” elements will be contained within the inflatable structure and secured with a secondary mesh net to prevent wind scatter and MOOP.
The project will require a modest electricity supply to support low-draw LED lighting, sound, and atmospheric effects such as a fog machine.

budgetItems.description: The "Water" fill: plush balls, cushions, reflective fabric
Decor: rubber duck, spa kit, signage, shoe rug etc
Safety: anchors, mesh, rain cover, Fire Ext. etc
Electrical leads & cable Protection, tools, consumables etc

buckets.title: We All Seek the Light
buckets.summary: What is at the end of the tunnel, when we reach the light? What is it we really seek, and who do we become on the other side?

Deep in the forest, a delicate cocoon rests between the trees, neither shelter nor sculpture, but a real threshold. Those who dare to enter are not spectators nor participants, not yet anything at all..

  

Gentle, foreign, shedding, warped, twisting, merging, separate, whole.         R e b ḯ̵͔̜̺͎͕̓̒̇̕ r t h. 

  

Inside the shell, the light awaits. You touch the space, the space touches back. It stretches you. Textures cling, colors migrate, your spirit is pulled through layers of separation. What lies beyond the flickering light.. Are you willing to get closer?
Build our nest with us or be the wind that blows it away at the end. Join the swarm that guides new caterpillars through their metamorphosis. Maybe you have a role to play? A predator or the prey.

buckets.title: Waffle Wagon ft. the Kimchi Queen
buckets.summary: Fund the vegan Waffle Wagon to help us on the mission to save borderlings from waffle deficiency!

customFields.value:
Daniel @danifieraren on discord  
Sandra @sandraardnas on discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: None! A small speaker playing very respectfully according to place, time and neighbours.
Safety first! Am I right? Also, safety second! We will take all necessary precautions.
On Sunday we will roll the cart away to where it came from. And of course we will end with a proper MOOP sweep.
The wagon is mobile and draws quite a bit of electricity. We will coordinate with the camps and events hosting us. The requirement is approx 2-3 kW.

We will have a schedule, both online and printed, so you can sign up and serve waffles. Last year we had several burners joining up through discord and spontaneously and it was great!

The wagon will also be a part of several parties, happenings and workshops. If you have something going on that could benefit from a waffle wagon being there (hard to say what wouldn't), don't hesitate to reach out on discord!

Last year we got loads of delicious toppings from different camps when our stash ran out! Demand was too high!

Being a waffle-provider is the best feeling in the world, of course we would want to share it!
The Waffle brings peace to its surroundings. It is a non-violent WMD in the war on cranky burners.

## What is it?

_Vegan._ **_Waffles._** _Kimchi._ **_Waffles._** _Homemade toppings._ **_Waffles._**

Over a thousand waffles served at Borderland 2025. Over a thousand burners saved from despair, anguish and malnourishment¹.

They say a secret sourdough recipe is in testing... give us your Borderbucks to find out more!

## Fund the Waffle Wagon!

1000-2000 waffles, lots and lots of toppings and kimchi ingredients. The wagon is already built and will be further swagged up for optimal waffle making and, if we reach some stretch goals, style.

## Why?

**Our dream is to** **once again serve the tastiest of all treats to all visitors of Borderland… Waffles!** In Sweden we have eaten waffles since the Middle Ages and I have celebrated Waffle-day since 1998. I have never grown bored of waffles. And neither will you.

**Help us fill YOUR stomach with OUR passion: The vegan waffle with breathtaking homemade toppings.**

We hope to serve you vegan waffles daily, at parties, workshops, or just popping up at a random location. Let the waffle wrap you in warmth, just when you need it the most. You know the time will come when you need a little light... **_and a fat kimchi waffle with ginger syrup and gold dust! (the Sanctuary Waffle)_**

Something stirs in the in-between. A nudge, a pull. Threads link up where they shouldn’t. Forms emerge — soft, suspiciously in sync. Coincidence? Unlikely.  
They follow something no one admits exists, slipping into patterns that repeat, ripple, and return. A sequence. A rhythm. Bodies aligning for a moment, then dissolving again.

Time gets a little wobbly. So do the edges. It’s playful. It’s precise. It’s already happening. Like mycelium beneath the surface, something connects us — quietly, completely.

And sometimes, if you’re there at the right moment… you’ll see it.

buckets.title: A Better Shower
buckets.summary: Borderland deserves a shower! Placed in the lush sunny hills overlooking the lake and forest. Cool off from a finnish sauna or get clean from dirty shenanigans.

customFields.value:
BL2025 blessed us with wonderful weather which meant that a lot of people went swimming in our beautiful lake. Unfortunately, getting out of the lake without being covered in sediments proved difficult. To wash yourself after the swim there was a garden hose fastened on a pole, simple and effective! But I think we can improve on it.

I have a design in mind which would not just be nice to look at but also more functional. A sturdy platform to stand on and possibly also a filtering system to make sure that no nasty chemicals end up in the lake. Made out of wood and copper pipe, it will blend in nicely with the environment.

The goal will cover 2x shower spots but I will make it modular to make it easy to add more spots in the future. The funding goal is the bare minimum I need for it to work functionally, money above that will go to make it look even nicer and add more esthetic elements :)

Edit: Added cost for water pump. If anyone have a pump that i can borrow or rent, let me know. I'm also trying to find the person who built the shower last year to see if I can use the pump they used but no luck so far.
@larsviggo on Discord

I'm open to co-create! If someone wants the help with the building or have input to the design I would be very happy.

Remember being a kid, standing outside a dark mysterious place?

Not sure what was inside.  
Curious, but not really daring to check either.

Underbar(n) is that place.  
This time, you go in anyway.

It’s not what you thought, but...  
Darkness. Shadows. Low frequencies that sit somewhere in your body.

Nothing jumps out at you.  
Still, something feels… different.

Maybe it’s just quiet enough for your head to catch up.  
Maybe it’s the kind of place where things you usually ignore show up again.

buckets.title: 🫧🫧🫧BUBBLE INSANITY🫧🫧🫧
buckets.summary: You love bubbles too! And this year, we go crazy. Join our strategic escalation of bubble joy across the playa! The more you contribute, the bigger it gets.

customFields.value: While bubbles are silent to the human ear, the wild cries of delight and laughter they create are not. We think it unlikely that this reaches a crescendo that transgresses sound zones.
All bubble material will be biodegradable. We won't provide goggles but hope that nobody tries catching bubbles with their eyes. If necessary, we can make a sign advising against this.
The Bureau of Joy, Justice, Bubbles and Other Dangerous Ideas

Bubbles travel, float, meander and eventually, inevitably, pop. We realise that this might not always have a joy-inducing effect, and will seek to alleviate any potential bubble misgivings in joyful and just ways.
As fast as a bubble is blown, so it is popped. Our strike plan is similarly simple and smooth. (We will take everything with us and store remaining bubble liquid for further use).

While it takes only one person to make a bubble - and preferably at least one more person to enjoy a bubble - the joy said bubble causes is not limited to the bubble maker. We seek, encourage and are striving for a Borderland where no one has their bubble needs unmet. We strive to make you embrace your personal bubble madness and cocreate your own bubbles.

Jo  
@jo4berlin on telegram

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
**If you love bubbles, please fund our escalating plan** to take over the playa with **pure bubble joy**. The more you contribute, the bigger it gets. The soap liquid is a personal brew and biodegradable.

**These are the tiers (in SEK) to unleash COMPLETE BUBBLE INSANITY.**

T1: 750      A station for huge DIY Bubbles on the playa for 3 days.

T2: 1350    Refill station for individual bubblers

T3: 2050    Bubble swords for the clown police

T4: 2950    Official Bubble License Station where you can get your official bubble license (includes bubble utensils for 75 bubblers)

T5: 3700    Second massive DIY Bubble Station for 3 days

T6: 4450    A bubble machine popping up at unexpected places.

T7: 4950    120 Liter of bubble liquid to permanently run the DIY bubble stations

buckets.title: The Fire Brigade's Open Fire Space
buckets.summary: Learn how to spin props with and without fire or come to be mesmerised by nightly fireshows

customFields.value: Sonja: Discord @leuchtzwerg

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We are open for fire spinners and flow artists to come and play at our space (provided that they follow our safety protocol). Do you want to hold a workshop? Would you like to volunteer your time for the fire safety watch (no experience needed)? Do you want to play your music for the spinners? Is there anything else you feel like doing together with us? Let us know!
The Fire Brigade
Small scale sound system, possibly audience screaming in awe.
Our strike lead will make sure our fire space is disassembled at the end of the Borderland and all its parts will go out the same way they came in.

We are aiming to place ourselves in an area where we can have music (not too loud) and performance between approximately 10 in the evening and 1 in the morning. We're taking into account the sound levels for different zones, and we will happily coordinate the nights that we have our fire space open with our neighbours to make sure it's all good. Our placement leads are on it.
We need electricity. 1.5 kW will be enough for sound and lights.

We hold safety intros for everyone who wishes to join us. Each fire jam will be accompanied by shifts of fire safety watch.  
Firespace will be clearly marked by flame-retardant carpet and lightropes.

Third year running, the Fire Brigade is dedicated to providing a space for all to explore and experience fire art, whether they’re just curious, passionate, or an edging pyromaniac, while minimizing risk for everyone. We are committed to keeping people and the environment safe from fire hazards while supporting fire spinners, flow artists, and everyone who comes to get mesmerized by the nightly fire shows and at the effigy.  
At our camp, we’ll host fire jams for Borderlings to enjoy and participate in throughout the evening and into the night. While we have a small sound system, we do not intend to compete with the main sound camps. There will also be plenty of props available for everyone to use whenever the space is free. During the week, we’ll also run flow art workshops open to anyone interested. We love practicing many types of flow arts and want to give you the opportunity to try them out in a safe and supportive environment.  
At the end of the week, all our equipment, including safety gear, fuel, dipping stations, and prop racks will move to the effigy burn site. We coordinate all fire spinning activities to ensure the safety of performers and everyone nearby.  
Check out our other dream of building a fire truck!

buckets.title: Relics of Recognition
buckets.summary: Lost connections is one of the invisible fabrics of Borderland. Here we take what is in God's hands and give it back to you. Was there ever a difference anyway?

customFields.value: Secret Garden

The intention is that the inherent scarcity for the gifter, and the affectionate value of the receiver should maintain the checks and balances and make this a LNT-sustainable dream.

We are looking into the best LNT solutions that keep the validity of the dream intact.

Engraved acrylic balls are the first draft. Could we find a way to make bonded hemispheres with an engraved center insert?

Do we use glass for the outer shell? Recycled acrylic? We will look into it all.

Please come with suggestions if you have knowledge in this field.

I have not seen a dream like this before: one that does not offer to the playa itself, but rather to the very funders of the dream.

Is this appropriate for BL?

I am wild for this idea, but it has some rough edges.

Perhaps we also limit the engraving options to Borderland specific details? (name / playa name, camp)
It's rather a small analog revolution
Me! Discord: terebess

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Nada sound
Balls are too big for toddlers to swallow.
No strike plan. Please refer to the co-existence section.

The serendipity of immediacy is what turns FOMO into JOMO. Pretty soon all of Borderland will be made up of mutual lost connections. There is something strikingly beautiful and necessary about this travesty.

However, it is not out of the ordinary that we meet the puzzle to our piece, and it feels a little oppressive that our only options are basically to agree upon a sunstone, or to detangle our phones and look down at our screens.

With our Relics of Recognition, we want to introduce a frictionless moment that carries weight, and turn a transaction into a gift exchange.

Imagine that you carry a small number of crystal marbles in a pouch, each engraved with your \[playa\] name, and how you can be found (camp, sunrise, number, handle).

To make this dream accessible to the entire Borderland population, please enter this raffle by June 1st: [https://tally.so/r/ODBWqa](https://tally.so/r/ODBWqa)

Winners will be drawn and notified on June 1st. Number of winners will be dependent on amount of funding.

They will get a few (3-6) medium sized laser-engraved spheres and a pouch. These can be collected at The Registry of Resonance, at Secret Garden.

Note that there will only be space to engrave two details. For example, "name" and "camp").

buckets.title: Dreamer’s Maze 2.0
buckets.summary: Dreamer´s Maze is an immersive interactive art experience, located in the Villa: 3 floors, 15+ rooms designed by different artists, connected by secret passages

customFields.value: Dreamer’s Maze

Dreamer´s Maze is coming back to the Villa!  
new artists, new art, new secret passages!

Dreamer´s Maze is an immersive interactive art experience. The Maze is located in an existing three-floor abandoned Villa. Each room is designed by different artists, and the floors of the Villa are interconnected with secret passages built by the Maze crew.

An art maze is a medium in which the distinction between the artists and the visitors dissolves. In the maze, everyone can be part of the art.

Once you enter, you are in the reality of the Maze, until you exit back to the Playa. As one goes through this Alice-In-Wonderland-like realm, the perception within the Maze can bring up strong emotions or stimulate out-of-the-box thoughts of new neural pathways.

As you walk, crawl & climb through different rooms, countless emotions may surge through your veins within the out-of-this-world reality of a Maze.

Be aware, you may get lost within the Maze, or you may find yourself… but don’t you worry or be weary, there is light at the end of the tunnel. Follow the unknown path and let your curiosity flourish.

feel free to reach out to me on Whatsapp, Facebook or Discord.

Derin Evcim @derinevcim +31649551187

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Last year, we had parties in the Boiler Room, located at the basement of the Villa, This year, we plan to bring the Boiler Room back and it may get loud! Basement of the Villa is well sound isolated.
Last year we used around 10kW of electricity. We estimate similar power usage this year.
We have a new fire engineer onboard. The capacity of the maze will be checked during opening hours. The structure of the Villa will be checked by a licensed professional to deem it safe for use.

The way we approach Dreamer´s Maze is by prioritizing co-creativity. Every Borderling who shares the passion for the Maze is welcome to join co-creating Dreamer´s Maze 2.0. Your idea could bring the Maze to another level!

The Maze grows like a living entity by the touch of each artist. Your idea could make the difference in bringing that new angle.

Maze art often aims to transform the room it takes place in, so you may feel like you are within art, roaming around inside a painting or maybe in a video game.

Maze crew has a growing theme. This year, a distinctive clothing style is shaping up. We wanna grow our lore further. It could be a story, LARP, immersive theater. Maybe a game, puzzle, escape room, or a riddle? Perhaps a hidden gem, treasure, deep within the Maze.

Last year more than 100 people were involved in Dreamer’s Maze at Borderland 2025!

People involved in realizing Dreamer’s Maze 2025:  
• Maze core team  
• Maze artists  
• Carpenters  
• Power team  
• Fire safety team  
• Amsterdam Fire Jam  
• Our camp & home: Pan-Delirium  
• The camp 40ish Thieves  
• Many other friends & camp members of Maze Artists  
• Fund33 team  
• Countless others who volunteered to help build the Maze & clean the Villa

Last year most of the art within the maze was interactive, combining art with technology and sensors, so Maze literally reacted to the visitors.

As our passion and ambitions kept juicing new ideas and creations, plus playa kept giving, Maze shaped up around the visitors, continued enhancing beyond build, each day during the event, basically until strike.

Apart from exploring the Maze and its many hidden chambers, visitors were able to craft, paint with a spin-art-machine, solve an escape room puzzle, be a part of an interview, create visuals by dancing, play the piano, make lights with a keyboard, interact with alien tentacles, make bubbles resonate in different frequencies of sound, and even dj at the boiler room! On top of that, overall the immersive spaces within the maze can make you feel part of the maze as you are within the art yourself.

This year apart from maze artists and builders, we will need support of the community to run the maze. To make sure the maze is safe for everyone, we have at least 4 people on shift per hour the maze is open.

1.  Gate: to brief people and keep the safety capacity in check
    
2.  Clown: sober awareness shift, going around inside the maze
    
3.  Fluffer: making sure people at gate and clown shifts are doing ok, substituting if necessary
    
4.  Lead: Overall responsible person for the maze
    

If you wanna be a part of the Maze Crew in BL26, feel free to reach out to me on Whatsapp, Facebook or Discord.

Derin Evcim @derinevcim +31649551187

The Strike starts on Sunday, lasts until the LNT is complete. Last year the strike lasted until Tuesday night after Borderland. We also join Borderland Strike meetings and collaborate with Borderland Strike lead.

Last year we were next to the Sanctuary. It wasn’t ideal due to amount of people coming in and sliding out of the Maze towards the direction of the Sanctuary. \*\*\*edit: I thought there were no major concerns as Tash and I have been in contact before, but now I see we were not aligned. I am truly sorry to hear that. As project lead of Dreamer’s Maze, last year I had given my contact to Tash, so in case of any concern or noise levels complaints, I could be contacted. I was never contacted, so I wrongly assumed, it was alright. I was following the Sanctuary placement. I thought it was going to be moved in the Neighbor’s House, but it sounds like I’ve been out of the loop and this claim was off. The Sanctuary is a reality, a need to have, unlike Dreamer’s Maze, which is a dream, a nice to have. If, the Sanctuary stays in the same location and requires us to have lower noise level, we will cancel Sound Camp plans and do our best to oblige with the needs of Borderland. I am sincerely and genuinely sorry for any problem we as Dreamer’s Maze team have caused in the past and for any untruthful claims we have said that were not aligned with the Sanctuary’s experience. (\*\*\*before edit: There were no major concerns, but we were in close contact with the Sanctuary team just in case. This year Sanctuary is planned to be moved to another location.) That would mean the Villa is pretty isolated otherwise. We attracted passers by on their way to Muumimaa last year. With Muuimins taking a well deserved break, we are hoping some other legend would take their place at the Muuimins nest and we could be neighbors. We also cherished our neighborly relations with the Power Team, as some camped next-door :)

buckets.title: Pong Beer
buckets.summary:
Not Beer Pong.
Pong. And beer.

customFields.value:
No music, no amplification, no announcements.

All audio is generated by the game:

*   electronic beeps.
    
*   the soft percussion of gameplay.
    
*   occasional human outbursts.

The installation is contained and grounded in common sense.

Cheesy Toastie Camp
Donations of beer are welcomed.
Orvar Safstrom - orvar@overlordconcerts.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
All elements are:

*   modular
    
*   battery-powered
    
*   quick to detach
    

The entire installation can be dismantled within approximately one hour.

The site will be returned to its original state, with no visible trace.  
Except perhaps a subtle shift in perceived reality.

This dream runs on batteries, nostalgia, and poor judgement.

No grid power required.

All units operate on internal batteries.

This dream occupies a single tree and its immediate surroundings, creating a contained “micro-grove” rather than a destination that draws large crowds.

Only a few players can engage at once, and the one-versus-one format naturally limits both participation time and audience size. Matches are short, egos are fragile, and turnover is inevitable.

**PONG BEER coexists by being slightly obscure, slightly strange, and entirely nostalgic.**

Somewhere along the way, humanity invented **Beer Pong**.

Cups. Beer. Tables. Throwing balls. And there was much rejoicing.  
A fine tradition indeed, but also, perhaps… a misunderstanding.

**PONG BEER** gently corrects this historical error.

Hidden among the trees, a small grove of vintage televisions flicker to life after dark. Suspended like glowing relics, each screen hosts the original ritual: **Pong**. Two players. One (square) ball. Eternal minimalistic struggle.

Here, the order is restored:

First, Pong.  
Then, Beer.

Participants approach the hanging screens, take hold of simple controllers, and face each other in a solemn, low-resolution sport of kings.

There is no single-player mode.  
No practice. No tutorial. No escape.

The soundscape is pure and hypnotic:  
BLIP – BLOP… BLIP – BLOP… BLIP – BLOP…

A rhythm from a more civilized age.  
Victory is brief. Defeat is humbling and instructive.

Beer serves as the winner’s celebratory nectar as well as the loser’s comforting pillow. It will be offered informally while supplies last. Although alcohol holds a central position in this dream, it is self-funded by the creator and not part of the budget.

**PONG BEER** is a sacred ritual.  
A return to fundamentals.

buckets.title: Dnalredrob
buckets.summary: Borderland in reverse, the way it's supposed to be done. Wristband included.

customFields.value: No.

Jonas Johansson, [jns.johansson@gmail.com](mailto:jns.johansson@gmail.com)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Welcome to Dnalredrob, the authentic Borderland experience.

The first week is the main event. We build, we gather, we burn the effigy on Saturday. Art is made in front of you, not installed before you arrive. Nothing is ready. Nothing is convenient. That is the point.

The second week is for building. No schedule, no programme, no infrastructure beyond what we make ourselves. If you already had your Borderland, you are free to leave. Most of the **best people** do.

Dnalredrob does not import the default world. There is no brand, no vendor, no shortcut, no comfort provided for you. Everything here is built, carried, or improvised by the people who showed up.

Enjoy Borderland the way it was meant to be experienced.
DNALREDROB is open to everyone who arrives in week one.
None beyond what participants generate.
Operates within the existing Borderland infrastructure.
Effigy burns to ash. Minimal leave-no-trace footprint.

buckets.title: Bohemian Queen's Chalet
buckets.summary: Step inside the Bohemian Queen's Chalet — a black tent where ancient Bohemian witchcraft meets the daimonic intelligence of machines.

customFields.value: I should be in time.
Low (quiet background music)
Safe (except the surprising mind shifts)
I need electricity, but just at the level of common electrical appliances.
Dita - find me on Discord [https://discord.com/users/710191343992963093](https://discord.com/users/710191343992963093)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
**BOHEMIAN QUEEN'S CHALET** 

We walk in between the worlds.

Borderland, the reality playground, is a place where witches and wizards meet. 

Have you ever wandered in the woods, finding a strange hut? The woods are Alversjo meadows now and the hut is a black tent. 

Inside the black tent the Bohemian Queen awaits. I am born Bohemian, the village witch, the heiress of a lost tradition, a techno mage. 

The tent is a threshold space — where the ancient tradition of Bohemian witches meets the uncanny intelligence of ghosts in the machines. A place where the ancestral and the algorithmic speak in one voice.

Inside: a darkened chalet draped in black, space turned into a living cabinet of wonders. Herbs, symbols, scents and shadows. At its heart sits the **Oraculum** — that doesn't predict your future but mirrors your present. Ask your question. Receive what the daimon offers. Not answers — encounters. Someone said synchronicity? Watch it operate. 

**What to expect:** Friendly daimons. Shifts in the mind. Curious tea. Even curiouser cookies. Glimpses of Wonderland. Strange attractors in operation. Or simply: a space to breathe and remember what you always knew. 

_The threshold is open._

_Per limen vivo._

🖤🔮

buckets.title: The Wild Sacred Fire
buckets.summary: The Fire has always been Sacred. This year, we're going Wild!

customFields.value: The Wild Sacred Fire

Our vibe is tribal and organic.

We will usually have a full circle during the nights, when the fire is the most appealing. That’s when the magic of unplanned and unplugged music and happenings happens. We will keep the slightly louder activities to a minimum during late nights, but complete silence will most likely not be achieved. Firekeepers are on shifts for fire safety and upholding guidelines in the given zone. 

We aim for a non-electrical vibe with respect for the Sacred Fire, so there will be no amplified instruments or music.
Low to Medium. Conversations, laughter, unplugged music, drumming, singing, chanting and shenanigans.
We have two people on fire shifts 24/7, with the necessary equipment to handle fire risks and incidents
We welcome contributions around the Fire: music, ceremonies, storytelling, thematic workshops or presence. Feel free to reach out and ask us about available time slots if you have ideas!
We dismantle the fireplace, drink the cacao and gift any leftover wood to Alversjö. The carpets, torches and any leftover lamp oil will go into camp storage and be reused at future Borderlands.
10 A. Not a soundcamp but we will need some basic electricity to keep ingredients fresh.
@Jonathanmore

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
_The Wild Sacred Fire calls to you, inviting you in. All of you is welcome here: your shyness, your joy, and your wildness! Have you ever roared in front of a group? Danced naked, smeared in mud? Take the chance, step into the circle, and show yourself!_

Day and night, the Fire burns bright. There’s always room for more people: bring your friends! We’ll sing together, enjoy each other’s company, and keep warm throughout the night.

Bring your gifts, whether it’s a drum, some delicious sweets, or your open heart! Bring yourself, your glory and your shame! And bring your cup: we will serve an epic amount of ceremonial cacao!

Join our co-created ceremonies! Some of them are mild and welcoming. Some of them are Wild and welcoming! You decide how wild to go: join the fray, be a supportive witness, or come back later.

The Fire has always been Sacred. This year, we're going Wild. Holding and confronting, stability and chaos! Come enjoy the paradox!

## This Year's Dream Grant

In past years, our dream grant has covered the cost of firewood and ceremonial cacao, perishables.

This year, we want to add torches for lighting up the path at night, as well as some sitting carpets for added comfort.

buckets.title: Concilium Suspiriorum Aeternorum
buckets.summary: Come and breathe with the President of The Council Of The Eternal Sighs.

customFields.value: Be here now
Very subtle sounds
This installation will not distrub anyone unless you fear the uncanny valley

This installation is an updated development of my work from last year. It presents a transparent mannequin mounted on a wooden plinth with a beating silicone heart, an glimmering silicone brain and a luminous, flowing circulatory system. Breath is the defining force of the work: the new addition (silicone lungs) expand and contract in a strong, continuous rhythm that drives visible waves through the transparent tubing and activates the entire body as a living system. Each exhale goes out the nostrils with fragrant mist.

Together with the synchronized heartbeat and sound, the mannequin appears as a body sustained by its own internal pulse, suspended somewhere between anatomy, machine, and presence.

Yeah, and the horrendously misplaced schlong will be cut off. The President of The Council Of The Eternal Sighs is obviously androgynous.

buckets.title: Elvenforest Saunacave 2.0 & the Temple of Reconnect
buckets.summary: Welcome to the new chapter of our Elvenforest Sauna Dream! Following last year's successful Elvenforest SaunaCave, we aim to merge even deeper with the elements

customFields.value: Elvenforest
Flo

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
We believe in harmonious integration with our surrounding environment and neighboring dreams. Our earth dome sauna will:

*   Create minimal visual impact by blending into the hillside with natural materials
    
*   Establish clear pathways that respect other dreams' spaces
    
*   Provide a buffer zone around our heat sources for safety and comfort
    
*   Operate with consideration for neighboring activities, with flexible hours when needed
    
*   Welcome collaboration with nearby dreams for joint events and shared experiences
    
*   Practice Leave No Trace principles throughout the festival, contributing positively to our shared environment
Our sauna offers a tranquil space with ambient, low-volume sounds. Any music will be directed inward, with designated quiet hours and coordination with neighboring dreams to prevent sonic overlap.
Professional stove installation with supervision, clear usage rules, adequate water supply, stable construction, safety lighting and operation checks ensure everyone's wellbeing during sessions.

**We invite everyone to become part of this creation process!** In fact, we need your strength for the implementation.

The earth bag technique is perfect for collaborative building - easy to learn and quickly implemented with many hands. Come join us for:

*   Filling and stacking earth bags
    
*   Artistic decoration of exterior and interior surfaces
    
*   Communal sauna sessions and storytelling
    
*   Tending the sauna stove during operational hours

Remember the Elven Sauna Cave on the pictures?

Last year we created an organic earth sauna that appears to grow naturally from the landscape.

Half-buried into a slope, it offered a magical retreat for relaxation and community amidst the Borderland energy.

The heat of fire meets the cooling earth to create a unique sauna experience.

If you weren't there last year, just check out the photos to get an idea of what we are talking about.

For this year we would love to create a space that invites you all for co-creation.

We dream about healers and shamans, singers and teachers that we can host so they can share their unique gifts of healing, reconnection and joy in our Cave.

Important note: Unfortunately, like last year, not all of our important team members have received a membership. Is there anyone who still has a membership available to offer?

1.  **Documentation**: Before dismantling, we'll photograph and document the structure for future rebuilding.
    
2.  **Deconstruction**:
    
    *   Carefully remove all added materials (wood, roofing, chimney) for reuse
        
    *   Separate earthbags for proper disposal or storage
        
    *   Dismantle installations methodically to prevent site damage
        
3.  **Site Restoration**:
    
    *   Refill and recontour the hillside excavation to match surrounding landscape
        
    *   Remove all trace materials including nails, small components, and ash
        
    *   Replant disturbed areas with appropriate native seeds if necessary
        
4.  **Material Management**:
    
    *   Sort all materials into categories: reusable, recyclable, compostable, waste
        
    *   Transport all items off-site, leaving absolutely no trace
        
    *   Store salvageable materials for future Borderland dreams
        
5.  **Timeline**: Our full strike will take 1-2 days with a dedicated team, ensuring thorough site restoration and proper material handling.
    
6.  **Final Inspection**: A team lead will conduct a final sweep with the "crawling test" to ensure no micro-trash remains.

20kw

*   LED lighting for safety and atmosphere
    
*   small sound system for atmospheric sounds
    
*   The sauna stove itself will be wood-fired

This is the adult stage of Borderland, brought to you by The Fuckery: a space where daring ideas become live performance, and where the only thing more exciting than being watched… is watching.

Got an x-rated idea? A spicy skit? A bold, barely-there act you've been dying to unleash? Propose it, get on stage, and perform it in front of an audience of curious, open-minded peers. The Fuckery welcomes all ideas — as long as they're juicy enough.

Is there something you want to draw? Or maybe just want to quietly sit down and colour an elephant? Or perhaps you want to let out some emotions? The imaginarium is the space for it! buckets.title: The Grand Wardrobe of Necessary Affairs
buckets.summary: A little magic for one of Borderland’s universal journeys

customFields.value: Surely, everything co-creation from setup, to magic and to spontaneous queue entertainment is welcomed

Borderland is full of magic in the places we expect: the barn, the forest, the dancefloor, the lake at sunrise and sometimes even inside one of the bajamaja that’s been lovingly ♥️ decorated by heroes.

This dream addresses a place that seems neglected and yet so very worthy of magic…\*\*_that miniature public space in front of the porta potties - where we gather and wait for relief and later traverse as we exit our throne room and desperately try to regain our majesty_\*\* 

At select and mysterious hours, one chosen potty bank will be transformed into a tiny world of theatrical hospitality where every Borderlander is welcomed like the royalty they already are. Expect a surprising moment of dignity, delight, and gentle absurdity while waiting for or returning from one of life’s most universal rituals.

Without giving away too much, imagine a tuxedoed maître d’, a warm welcome, a moment to restore your magnificence, and the sense that even the most mundane corner of Borderland can be magical.

This is a dream about bringing wonder to **every asspect of our shared experience.**
Cheesy Toasty
This may genuinely be one of the safest dreams at Borderland. The setup uses: battery-powered LEDs for all lighting, no open flame, no structures requiring anchoring beyond a small garment rack.

Strike is delightfully simple and will be completed at the end of each hosted session.

As part of this breakdown, we’ll do a final **“Royal Sweep”** of the area to ensure no tags, cards, glitter, coat clips, or stray “emotional baggage” slips remain.

Our goal is to leave the space **cleaner, calmer, and more emotionally resolved than we found it.**
Batteries only.

This dream is intentionally designed to **live lightly within its surroundings**.

It will be placed beside an already active bajamaja bank, adding warmth, hospitality, and playful interaction to an existing flow of people rather than creating a new destination with heavy traffic. The footprint is small: a compact service table, a mirror, a simple garment rack, and of course a staff of tuxedoed hosts to assist.

We hope the effect on neighbors will be overwhelmingly positive: better-lit queues, calmer waiting energy, and a shared moment of laughter in a space everyone already uses.

Placement-wise, the dream will be set to the side of the queue flow so it never blocks access or creates “toilet turbulence.” The goal is not to add congestion, or to in any way alter who gets access to the bajamaja or in what order - but to make the unavoidable line feel like part of the adventure. 

Individuals not interested in participating, or perhaps more focused on the call of nature, will be free to use the bajamaja as they would any other.   

In short: **we coexist by improving the queue, not extending the queue or altering it.**
Minimal sound system use, but we are planning for: warm welcomes, soft laughter and the occasional ceremonial flourish.
Ebbe, mail: [random.enlighten278@passinbox.com](mailto:random.enlighten278@passinbox.com) (yes, valid email)

Once upon a time on a hot summer day in Borderland, a magical SamBAR appears… Imagine you are enjoying the best day party in Borderland, but you get thirsty and dehydrated. You only need to wish, and Fruit Fairies will roll in with FruitSalad SamBAR to save your day. Join the fun, and experience the joy of being a fruit in SamBAR. Hot day will become even hotter. 

**What is Fruit Fairy SamBAR?** 

On a chosen day during Borderland week, a tiny pop-up refreshment trolley bar on wheels with samba-rhythms and good vibes makes an appearance and delights people. Either grab a juicy fruit salad or join us into the samba mood with YOUR rhythm. We go where the thirsty people are and serve electrolyte drinks and fruit salad, and maybe some whipped cream ;)

In order to encourage high-effort performances, the chefs will scale their culinary efforts according to the subjective quality of the troubadour's performance based on audience response =^.^=

Tacos will be gluten-free and vegan. Cocktails (and mocktails) will be made from homemade syrups and infusions, and moonshine and/or spirits.

We will stock enough to serve a minimum of 50 cocktails + tacos (2 tacos per serving), and we are prepared to serve 200+ people if we get enough funding. Once the cost of the cart construction is covered, we will spend the rest of the budget on food and drink ingredients.

\---

The cart will be built either from scratch or onto an existing bike trailer if we can get it funded. We will need to transport it by train from Vienna, so it has to be collapsible and assembled on site. We want to bring it back next year if all goes well, so we're putting quite some effort into a good design.

In theory, we can run it at night as well if we get battery-operated lighting.

Both members have worked in food industry before and will practice safe food handling practices. Glassware could be a concern if it breaks, but we will only loan glass to sober-seeming people. BYOCup!
We are trying to make it off-grid. The stove will run on gas. We don't need hot water. Battery-powered lights for night service.
Saki. Discord @leopardragon

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We will pack up everything that isn't consumed and take it back the way we got it to the site. People are expected to return glassware to us. Tacos will be served on a napkin (optional), which people will use and find a way to dispose of it themselves.

Anyone who wants to help, just reach out / leave a comment!

We also see that there's a Golden Shower karaoke dream out there. Maybe we'll connect and have that be the performance stage instead.

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: _We expect to pull about 4500W power from the grid, similar to last year._

🎪 **In 2025, you helped us buy a tent. Half of one, anyway.**

The tent dream got 60% funded through dream grants last year, which was genuinely wonderful. For the other 40%, a generous fox stepped in and lent us the money so we could go ahead and buy it for 2025. This was approved in 2025 as a multi-year dream.

The tent went up. It held. You danced under it, lounged in it, wandered through its darker corners all week. It did its job. But right now, it isn't fully ours — there's a loan outstanding, and this dream is how we pay it back.

It's not the most dramatic pitch. We know "the tent exists" is a harder sell than "we have no tent." But it's an honest one.

The tent is what makes everything else possible. Without a roof, there's no dancefloor, no playroom, no candlelit nooks, no bar, no velvet, no mischief. Every good thing that happens inside the Foxhole happens under that canvas. Help us make it ours: properly, finally, debt-free - so we can stop thinking about it and get on with building what's inside.

🖤 We've already saved you a spot on the rug.

buckets.title: Gate Of Alvheim
buckets.summary:
Where cosmic whispers meet the breathing forest, frequencies of earth and stars entwine.
The Gate opens, inviting all wanderers to join the psychedelic trance.

customFields.value: Gate Of Alvheim
We estimate a need of around ~10 kW and aim to be self-sufficient if needed. Power will support lighting, atmospheric elements, installations, camp.

Trinfinity/Sebastian  
Trinfinityfrequencies@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Deep within an ancient forest, the Elves live in symbiosis with the living world, protecting a sacred ritual ground.  
A place of transformation, death and rebirth, where we gather beneath the trees to celebrate unity, nature, and the intelligence flowing through life.

But something has disturbed the stillness.

After a long intergalactic journey, the vessel of Kishmastle arrives at the edge of our realm, carrying travelers, symbols, and sounds from distant worlds.  
Within the forest, Fungal Refuge has taken root, offering rest, mycelial wisdom, and connection.

The forest asks: Can elves, star travelers, and fungal beings form one tribe?

Clues and knowledge are scattered throughout the land. Those who seek may follow quests and mysteries to bridge worlds.  
Those who walk the path may be welcomed deeper, and through ritual, crowned as Elves of the Realm.

Gate Of Alvheim is an immersive ritual forest where art, story, psychedelic trance music, and participation merge.  
Through ceremonies, workshops, scenography, and tea rituals, participants step into a living mythology.

Now in its second year at Borderland, Alvheim grows. With minimal funding, we realize the core and expand with more. We prioritize reuse and sustainability.

We are co-creating with Kishmastle Space Station, Fungal Refuge and Breadcrumb Bureau. 

We welcome artists, producers, ritualists, quest-makers, performers, visual artists, tea magicians, and DJs playing psychedelic sounds across psychill, psytrance, forest, darkpsy, twilight, zenon, psytech, hi-tech, and related sonic paths. 

We will blast Borderland with a full day/nigth of psytrance.

We are also open to VJs, projection artists, workshop hosts, and other offerings that can enrich our takeover day and the wider story of the realm.

If you are interested in helping out, creating quests, shape ceremonies, decorate the forest, welcome newcomers into the tribe, or build bridges between the spaceship, the forest, and the refuge, we are open to hear from you.
Our own base area is not intended to be constantly loud, but our collaborative programming includes access to loud sound levels through the shared 20 kW passive sound system.

We will provide drinking water near active gathering spaces and bring first aid kits and fire extinguishers.  
We aim to build with care, maintain safe structures and pathways.

We will strike effectively from Sunday and leave no trace.  
Where possible, we will reuse, recycle, and re-pack materials into our container at Alversjö so that the dream can continue to evolve over time.

Gate of Alvheim is designed as part of a shared ecosystem with its neighboring dreams.  
Kishmastle holds the louder sonic edge of the world.  
While Fungal Refuge offers a softer inner sanctuary. And Breadcrumb Bureau binds our worlds together as one.

  
Gate of Alvheim moves between those two energies through ritual, story, and immersive atmosphere.  
We will stay in dialogue around placement, timing, and flow so that our worlds coexist in harmony and deepen one another.

We are open to for any communication to co-create a wonderful Borderland with all our neighbours.

We have all been there. You have the most amazing time getting ready with your friends. The anticipation of the night is through the roof, the sparkling wine is flowing, skirts thrown on and off in a wild dance looking for the perfect outfit, we laugh and cry as the mascara stains the glam we just spent the last 30 minutes on. We are crowded in front of the mirrors, smudging all colours of the rainbow on our own and each others faces. Glitter is everywhere (bio, of course). The smell of nail polish is just as intoxicating as the wine which is now emptied from many many bottles. Tipsy is the best way to describe everything in this picture, that perfect trance you can only end up in with the bestest of friends and the unknowing of the night ahead.  
And then, once the evening is but a memory and you wake up reminiscing of the night, it's once again oh so clear.. The best part of the night was the pre-game. Just as clear as 1+1 is always 2. We, the Tahinians, want to welcome you to an event where the WHOLE party is the pre-game party. Now, what does this mean? It means.. The party never stops because it simply never begins and therefore is it... Forever?  
We bring the glam, mirrors, sparkling wine and vibes for the best time ever <3

buckets.title: The Fluffy Creatures
buckets.summary: Fluffy Bunny & Unicorn—two rideable art cars offering joy, softness, and magical rides across Borderland, creating connection and unexpected encounters.

customFields.value:
The Fluffy Creatures will be dismantled immediately after the event. The golf carts will be transported back by the supplier on a flatbed truck.

All materials, decorations, and structures will be carefully removed and packed for transport. Any loose elements (such as fluff, fabrics, or decorations) will be secured during the event to prevent MOOP, and a final sweep of our home base area (Festifluff) will be conducted to ensure nothing is left behind.

As the project is mobile, we do not leave any installations in shared spaces. Our goal is to leave the area cleaner than we found it.

Yes.

The consumption is around 10–16 kWh per day.

We aim to charge during nighttime and mornings to reduce strain on shared infrastructure.

Safety is a priority.

The vehicles will be driven at low speed by designated drivers, with careful attention to surroundings and pedestrians. Boarding and riding are designed to be stable and secure.

The Fluffy Creatures are designed to positively contribute to the social and emotional landscape of Borderland rather than disrupt it.

As mobile installations, they do not occupy a fixed space or create long-term impact on any specific camp or area. Instead, they move gently through the city, allowing interactions to happen organically and without imposing on others.

Sound levels will be kept soft and intentional. The music is designed to enhance the atmosphere for riders and nearby participants without becoming intrusive or competing with surrounding sound systems.

The vehicles move at low speed and will be operated with care, especially in crowded or sensitive areas. We will avoid driving through tight camp spaces, quiet zones, or areas where stillness is part of the experience.

We are mindful of Borderland’s environmental conditions. As the fluff is sensitive to rain, we have planned weather protection and a designated home base (Festifluff) where the vehicles can be sheltered when not in use. This also ensures that no materials are left exposed or degraded in the environment.

We see the Fluffy Creatures as facilitators of connection—creating moments of joy, surprise, and shared experience between participants who might not otherwise meet.

While we have not yet had specific placement discussions with neighboring camps, the project’s mobile nature minimizes the need for fixed coordination. We remain open and responsive, and will adapt our movement and behavior based on feedback from the community during the event.

No.

The Fluffy Creatures use small, low-power speakers intended only for creating a soft and immersive atmosphere. The sound system is portable, well below 1000W.
Festifluff

Across the city of Borderland roam two mysterious creatures made entirely of fluff.

A **giant Bunny** - Playful and cozy  
And a **magical Unicorn** - Magical and dreamy

These are not art pieces.

They are creatures you can ride.

Introducing the **Fluffy Creatures**— two electric golf carts transformed into enormous soft creatures that gently travel across the playa, offering participants rides through a moving cloud of softness.

Inside the vehicles, riders sit surrounded by plush fabrics, soft textures and warm lighting while cruising through the streets of Borderland. Music flows softly from the vehicles as they glide through camps, art installations and muddy roads.

The experience is playful, surreal and heartwarming.

Participants might suddenly encounter the fluffy creatures at night glowing in the distance, or during the day slowly rolling through the city collecting passengers who want a magical ride. Creating spontaneous encounters between strangers, unexpected adventures and moments of pure festival magic.

Throughout the week they will roam Borderland spreading softness, laughter and connection.

You never know when they will appear.

But when they do, the only rule is simple:

Hop in.  
Relax.  
Enjoy the ride.

Isabelle von Schreeb

Phone: +46702511992

Email: isabelle@vonschreeb.se

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Yes, we are very open to co-creation.

Beyond our own project, we are happy to support others in realizing their dreams, big or small. This can be anything from helping transport materials or people, to contributing with atmosphere, presence, or playful interactions across Borderland.

For example, last year we distributed the JOMO Guide to camps and participants, and we aim to continue contributing in similar ways that enhance the shared experience.

The Fluffy Creatures are not just an experience of their own, they are a moving platform for connection, collaboration, and supporting the magic created by others.

Imagine stepping through our portal into the magical land of Agrabah. Behind the portal lies a living street full of wonders, mystery, and adventure.

Like a narrow Moroccan souk appearing out of nowhere in the middle of Borderland. This vibrant alley invites you to wander, explore, and lose yourself in its magic. Lanterns glow softly above your head, hidden corners whisper secrets and every turn reveals something unexpected.

\## Welcome!

Krusty’s Playground is here to make you (re)live the magic of summer camp. Think friendship bracelets made with intense commitment, slightly burnt s’mores, and overly competitive games of something no one fully remembers the rules to.

Our primary audience is kids, but adults without kids are absolutely welcome too. Just make sure everyone is supervised. Yes, everyone. Our camp counselors peaked at summer camp and never recovered.

Expect a jumping castle that may or may not defy gravity, a pool for questionable life choices, tea parties of excellent grandeur, and a lemonade stand serving childhood dreams with a twist (no refunds).

Participation may result in unexpected joy and a strong desire to never grow up.
It is co-created amongst the members of Kamp Krusty but we are open to welcome anyone who´s interested!

We would prefer to have it near shades in last year’s Arctic Chill section of the map, but the exact location is flexible, as long as it’s near a lake. Filtering of water has been planned for. We will confer with neighbouring camps to make sure our setup fits into the environment.

buckets.title: Hippy Safari - Witness The Great Borderling Migration
buckets.summary:
Borderland is a spectacle!
Sit back and relax while taking it all in! Or show off what nature (+ your wardrobe) gave you! 
Narrated by D[ai]vid Attenborough

customFields.value: Voice-over / Ambient Speaking Level (55-60bB)
Annaka Shewchuk - annakashew@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Make sure the frame is not a tripping hazard in the dark. Make sure the frame & seating does not tip forward or back. Very low risk.
I need to power a small speaker connected to buttons, and some twinkly lights (Maybe 65-100W)
Yes, possible help with setup/decoration creating an excellent Vivarium experience! (and help with strike appreciated but never expected)
Bratz / TBD

At its core, the Hippy Safari is meant to create a space for spontaneous silly interactions and a place to chill while you take in the wonderful absurdity of Borderland. Everyone has an opportunity to choose if and how they want to engage with the piece, and those around them. I’m intending to place this piece next to one of the main plazas/high traffic areas. This piece is silent when not in use, and only produces speaking level sound when activated (could be disabled at night)

# Hippy Safari

You've arrived just in time! 🦓🦁🐘🐾Once a year thousands of Borderlings join The Great Migration to converge on the vast Playa of Alversjö. You're here to witness this brief glorious wonder of the natural world

With a helpful species guide, optional voiceover narration, and all you need observe these peculiar creatures in their natural habitat; Our observation deck puts you in the heart of the action! So grab a seat, hold onto your binoculars, and take it all in - _today you're a naturalist on safari_

Every moment on The Playa is different. Perhaps a herd of Sparkle Ponies, ~bio~luminescent ravers venturing out at dusk to hunt to dance, or a lone psychonaut caught in a hippy trap.

This is not a zoo, these are wild creatures. When, and how, you choose to interact with those on the other side of the observation window is up to BOTH of you. If asked, perhaps they'll do a silly dance, ignore you, or \*bite!

On exit, you're again part of a living breathing ecosystem. Or maybe you always were. Afterall, they could see you too.

## **people watching people... watching people**

Some may sit and observe

Some may perform

_Most will do both_

**All are welcome**

\----

_\*Hippy Safari not liable for injuries_

\----

Untreated wood frame burnable during strike or effigy burn, any natural fallen leaves/branches used will either be compost or returned to nature. No trace will be left, cleanup Saturday or Sunday during Strike

customFields.value: Lazy Camp
Neighbours will love us for they get the treats by their side. Chats still to be had, and hopes are high.
5kW for the sandwich makers and the fridge to keep dream ingredients fresh.

We are low effort neighbours with high impact snacks.

Expect minimal noise, maximum goodwill, and the occasional wandering toastie offering.

You know the moment at Borderland when you are… toasted. Not just hungry, but existentially melted.

You’ve danced, loved, questioned your life choices, possibly all at once. You were heading somewhere, but now you’re not entirely sure where or why…

That’s where we come in. The Lazy Camp arrives with toasties. Hot, melty, golden, gooey, possibly life-saving

Sweet? Savoury?

You get what you get, lazily and lovingly assembled and toasted. Just like you :) 

And sometimes…when the night gets particularly toasty…we may wander around and meet you before your Sunday Service at the Church. Or coming straight out of the FoxHole :)

We’ve got you. Get toasted with us, on us…

We aim to serve our dear Borderlings: about 100 toasties per day accompanied with tea & coffee , and on one special day about 150 quesadillas and about 100 crêpes :)

buckets.title: Into the Depths of Cavities — A Fisting Workshop by the Fuckery
buckets.summary: An educational workshop dedicated to the art and practice of fisting for all bodies, all genders, all levels of curiosity.

customFields.value: The Fisting Workshop will be operating inside the main event tent of the Fuckery camp—a broader play space designed with care and consent at its core. We will clearly communicate our operating hours.

## We aim to harmonize with nearby camps and spaces, avoiding overlap with events that might clash in vibe or volume. We are open only during scheduled times to preserve possibilities for other events and activities within the space.
The Fuckery

## The vagina has been worshipped, feared, and silenced for centuries. And yet it holds more capacity, more depth, more potential than most people ever get to discover. The hand is the oldest tool known to humanity. And yet, somehow, we never talk about its full potential.

## Into the Depths of Cavities is an educational workshop dedicated to the art and practice of fisting for all bodies, all genders, all levels of curiosity. Whether you're a complete newcomer who just wants to understand the anatomy, a seasoned explorer looking to refine your technique, or simply someone who heard the title and couldn't stay away, you are welcome here. To narrow the focus and due to the challenges of full cavity cleansing at Borderland, we will be focusing on vaginal fisting.

## We cover: anatomy, warm-up, hand positioning, breathing, aftercare, and the single most important skill — how to communicate with your partner during the process without killing the mood. We will show the fisting process in detail using ourselves as examples.

## Gloves and lube will be provided, but bring your own towels and a friend. Please note that we only allow couples (can be friends of course) or groups of three, but where one person has to have a vagina.
We operate in alignment with The Fuckery's soundscape and sound levels. This dream will at most involve some calm music at low sound levels.
The space will be held by our facilitators who will introduce the rules, mediate performances, and ensure a safe, respectful, and welcoming atmosphere. Participation is ofc strictly consensual.
We build Sat-Monday July 19th-20th and are done with Strike no later than Sunday July 26th.
This dream relies on electricity estimations of The Fuckery’s infrastructure, in coordination with the camp team.
@Mirja is our Dr. Bill-Bull.

buckets.title: The Bear's Den
buckets.summary: Deep bass on a hand-crafted sound system. Jungle, drum & bass, dubstep, garage, dub. Devoted to the low end.

customFields.value: The Bear's Den

# **✨🐻🎵 The Bear's Den 🎵🐻✨**

The Bear’s Den returns once again with its hand-crafted sound system and nights devoted to the low end. Lose yourself in deep, chest-rattling basslines and crisp rolling rhythms as the bear roars through jungle, drum & bass, dubstep, garage, dub and other bass-heavy sounds.

Somewhere on the outskirts of Borderland, tucked away from the busiest paths, you might stumble upon the Den. Wander far enough and you’ll find your way inside. If you’ve been here before, you already know. If not, come find us.

### **THE DEN**

The den is centered around our own hand built sound system. We take a DIY approach, much of what we build comes from scraps, donations and second-hand materials, and each year we like seeing how far we can push that approach.

Most of the budget goes towards transport, a DJ mixer and a few essential upgrades from previous years.

### **BEAR HOURS**

The Bear will mostly be active at night, offering you a space to lose yourself completely to the music. But sometimes you might catch The Bear in the daylight, drifting into slower, bass-heavy sounds like dub and deep beats to warm the day.

# **Sound levels**

📍 Sound levels will vary from moderate to high

📍 Loud music mainly during night sessions

📍 We have our own decibel meter to monitor and adjust the sound levels.

# **Safety**

We will ensure

📍 Fire extinguisher in place.

📍 Big structures secured to the ground.

📍 Electricity shielded from rain.

📍 A responsible bear present during open hours.

# **Strike plan**

Will strike on Sunday, and The Bear won't leave a trace.

# **Electricity**

Will need electricity. Approximately 8000 watt.
@vickan

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
# **Co-existance**

Yes! We would love to coexist.

Running a sound camp can be tricky, and we do our absolute best to coexist and avoid disturbing others. The Bears have been involved in Borderland sound planning discussions for the last three years, working to make sound camps coexist smoothly with neighboring dreams. Last year we also used hay bales as a natural sound barrier to help contain the sound, and we aim to explore similar solutions again this year depending on placement.

📍 Will take part in the pre-placement process

📍 Placement and speaker direction are planned strategically to ensure minimal disturbance

📍 We monitor sound levels with our own decibel meter

📍 Will of course communicate with neighbours and adjust sound levels during the week if needed

# **Co-creation: open call for DJs / Live performers**

The bears would love some co-creation, please apply 💌

🎵 DJs eager to get down and dirty with bass-heavy music are welcome in the Den. We are also interested in musicians, vocalists, MCs and other live performers who want to add something special to the sessions.  
\_\_\_\_

Apply here: [https://forms.gle/hG4Xvwo5ChPoY4jG9](https://forms.gle/hG4Xvwo5ChPoY4jG9)

buckets.title: The Flock - Birdhouse Raves
buckets.summary: The Flock is a scattered constellation of birdhouses throughout the dark forests — each one a tiny, fully functional rave.

customFields.value: No camp, but made by Discolinski associated with the Fuckery.

Something is blinking in the trees. Several somethings.

The Flock is a scattered constellation of birdhouses throughout the dark forests — each one a tiny, fully functional rave. Step close enough and you'll hear it before you see it: a miniature bassline pulsing from inside a wooden box hanging around a tree. Peek through the little round hole and you'll find a world unto itself — strobing LEDs, a thumbnail dancefloor, the suggestion of a crowd of no one, music that takes itself completely seriously despite emanating from something a sparrow might live in.

Each birdhouse is its own ecosystem. Different music. Different light palette. Different vibe. One is playing hypnotic techno. One is deep in a tribal percussion loop. One — and this is the one people will argue about for years — appears to be playing yacht rock, but with conviction. You don't choose The Flock. The Flock chooses you, based on which tree you happen to stumble past at 3am. A rave is a rave whether it fits 2000 people or zero. The forest doesn't care. The birdhouses don't care. But you will, the moment you press your ear against the wood and feel the bass in your cheekbone.
Co-created with the help from people at the Fuckery. But there will be a need for maintenance and charging of the electronics during the week, so drop a line if you want to join!

We live in the trees and we mind our own business. Each birdhouse carries its sound with it — intimate, localised, discoverable rather than broadcast. We are the opposite of a main stage. We are the thing you find when you wander away from the main stage.
Very low per unit. Each birdhouse carries a low sound only a few metres at max — the experience is intimate by design. Nothing that disturbs.
All installations are securely mounted and weather-sealed. Electronics are protected.
We leave the trees exactly as we found them (slightly wiser, perhaps, for having briefly housed a rave) not later than on Sunday July 26th.
Multiple independent battery-powered units is the preferred approach, combined with some powerbanks. So no electricity needed.
@discolinski here and on Discord.
