customFields.value:
We are looking for a deco/design person who can help us take this to next level. Eternal glory is on offer!  
Join the S.O.U.N.D shifts here: [https://members.theborderland.se/burn/the-borderland-2026/rea](https://members.theborderland.se/burn/the-borderland-2026/rea)  
Other co-creation also welcome!
We coexsist with sound camps, ravers and sleepers alike.

The Reality S.O.U.N.D is on a mission to harmonize sound across borderland and towards outside neighbours.  
[S.O.U.N.D on Realites](https://coda.io/d/Realities-2026_dFvRNS5423Z/Links_su2HPA3L#Borderland-Links_tuTRLPB9/r25)

We roam the streets at night, Sunday to Sunday, to check sound levels and make the sound experience better for all. This year, its time to do it in style!  
We want to pimp the sound patrol with a set of warm funky Sound Hats to endure the cold nights, and turn the sound golfcar into a matching artcar.  
Also, Sound camps get our dB-loggers in their camp to allow us to measure their sound, and sometimes they jsut don't fit with their vibe, so we are dreaming up covers to make the loggers more fun looking: tiny birds nests, umbrellas, mystical artifacts -- really anything to make it blend in and be an add-on rather than an ugly-on for sound camps.

Our plan in order of prio:  
\- Sound hats to make us recognizable across the land (as easy to spot as the clowns)  
\- Sound dB-logger decorations  
\- Art car with sign and deco for the sound team theme  
\- Equip artcar with a hot water thermos for late night tea for the sound camp dwellers.  
  
For transparency: S.O.U.N.D is a reality with its own budget for Reality-critical things, but not for this "dreamy" stuff here

Ah, Borderland...

One minute you’re racing a shopping cart downhill with full confidence, the next you’re swimming across a lake to rescue an inflatable llama like it’s a life-or-death mission. You surface, triumphant, only to get taken out by a rogue paper airplane. And now, here you are. Alive, barely. Exhausted, definitely. As you gaze out over the madness you ask yourself, what now?

Enter Chilldome! Pillows. Blankets. A rotating cast of humans who are all one deep exhale away from becoming part of the furniture. Low-effort. High-comfort. A place where horizontal excellence is encouraged. Just lie down. Stop moving. Maybe nap. Maybe plot your next chaotic move. Maybe just laugh at the absurdity of everything you just survived.

Stay five minutes, five hours, or until you forget what day it is. Wait… Is Borderland even still going? And… Where is everyone? What the… Why is there snow outside?
@pallepallepalle on Discord

buckets.title: Foxhole Bar - now with ice
buckets.summary:
The cocktails were great. The ice... let us down.
Help us fix the one thing that kept the bar from being perfect. 🧊

customFields.value: _We expect to pull about 4500W power from the grid, similar to last year._

_Condor (see co-creators)  
On discord:_ **_condor5555,_** _or message me on cobudget_

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: The Foxhole

_We are looking forward to taking part in the placement process and the sound zones /policy discussions. We want to find a neighbourhood where we can have good synergy and relations with our neighbours, like we did in the Citrus Plaza in 2025_
_We always have 3 foxes (one for each part of the Foxhole) ensuring our guests are safe and comfortable, rotating on 2-3hour shifts. We plan to really improve our fire safety this year._
_We plan to strike mainly on Sunday, last moop sweep done on Monday._

🍹 **Let's talk about ice.**

The Foxhole bar had an amazing 2025. High end cocktails, a proper menu, serving from opening through to near-close most nights.

But we had a critical problem: ice.

We were making our own 2" ice cubes in a freezer we'd bought cheap on Blocket. But the freezer struggled badly and we had a small crisis most nights. Ice was the first thing to run out each night, before the drinks. The bar fridge needs replacing too.

So this year, before anything else: we're sorting the cold infrastructure.

🎯 **What this dream funds:** A reliable freezer. A new bar fridge. Enough capacity to double last year's ice production — so we're not rationing at peak hour, we're just serving drinks.

The bar is already good. With proper equipment behind it, we can stop managing a nightly crisis and just do what we do well.

🍸 **Why it matters** The Foxhole bar isn't just where we serve drinks — it's where moments begin. First sips and lingering glances. The backdrop to stories you'll blush about later. Whether you're into mezcal or mocktails, we want every guest to feel welcomed, nourished, and just a little bit enchanted. We proved we could do that last year. We have a new menu and new ideas. We just need the ice to hold up.
_We have a sound system which is more precise than loud, so it's a good starting point. We will coordinate with neighbours about timing, & levels. We will fine tune our decibel meter based on 2025._

_Are you a musician and you think you fit our vibe? Come collaborate with us, we are looking for collaborations and live acts. Contact us at_ **_foxholeborderland @gmail .com_**

_Also see our main_ [Foxhole dream](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnp2gjtc000co1pjbl8p2vq2) _and_ [Tent dream](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnp3kvsy000qz8vv3h12vtn8)

buckets.title: The Living Heart
buckets.summary: A living breathing heart portal with spiraling LED tubes

customFields.value: 200w peak
The Heart
Low
230v PSU in plastic container. 2-4 rails of power with separate fuses. Will secure structure by driving iron bars or rebar into the ground, or using weights, and/or by strong cord.

The living heart is a heart shaped portal made up of plastic tubing with LED strips attached (read more below). The heart will measure over two meters so you can stand inside it. Standing inside the heart you will notice your presence has an effect on the light show, and you'll hear the sound of a beating heart.

The dream will be housed within the camp of 'The Heart'. Either as a gate or as a separate structure.

The spiraling tubes in the drawing are transparent PVC tubes, lit from the side by LED strips. The light from the LEDs will scatter inside the tube and make the tube light up so it seems like the entire tube is glowing. (see the attached picture for demo) Every LED can be individually controlled offering extensive possibilities of creating swirls, pulsing, different colors, 'sparkle', and other things that my mind has not dreamed up at the time of writing this.

In total there will be about 20m of tube (or hose if you will) with a diameter of 30mm, and 20m of LED strip. The tube will likely be wrapped tighter than the drawing suggests, and the frame will be a lot thinner.

buckets.title: Women who support women
buckets.summary:
“Women Who Support Women” — A Dream for Borderland
A dream about co-creating a new neighborhood at Borderland — a soft, heart-centered sanctuary.

customFields.value: Women who support women

A soft, heart-centered sanctuary rooted in connection, presence, and feminine support.

At the center of this space stands a large, open pavilion — a warm and inviting structure held by nature and intention. Beneath it: layers of soft carpets, cushions, blankets, and low seating. A space you can sink into.

Surrounding the pavilion, a small village emerges — tents and shared living spaces forming a calm and cohesive neighborhood. Not a party camp, but a refuge. A place to land and be held.

This camp is designed as a gentle contrast to the intensity and stimulation of the festival. A place where the nervous system can soften.

Throughout the days, the space wants to offer:

*   _A cacao ceremony_
    
*   Intuitive dance
    
*   Soft music and shared stillness
    
*   Breathwork, meditation, and gentle yoga
    
*   Quiet conversations and deep listening
    
*   Invite men into a circle of curiosity. Where any questions are welcome to gain deeper insight into the inner world and lived experiences of women.
    

We envision as a **neighborhood** within Borderland — a distinct zone with a shared atmosphere of calm, openness, and emotional safety.

A place people know they can return to when they need softness.

Yes — we are very open to co-creation.

We warmly invite all women who feel aligned with the intention of the camp to contribute. Co-creation can take many forms — whether it’s holding a gentle session, helping shape the space, supporting the atmosphere, or simply showing up with presence and care.

What matters most is that you resonate with the values of the camp: softness, respect, authenticity, and a desire to support one another.

As long as you can move within this shared framework, your contribution is welcome.

Women Who Support Women” is intentionally designed as a calm, grounded, and low-noise space. Rather than generating high energy or large gatherings, we aim to create a soft landing spot — a place for rest, integration, and gentle connection. In that sense, we see our presence as a positive contribution to our neighbors, especially for those who may also value quieter, more introspective environments.

We are mindful that sound, flow of people, and spatial boundaries affect those around us. Our activities (such as cacao ceremonies, breathwork, and soft music) will be held at a low volume and with clear timeframes. There will be no amplified music late at night, and we will actively maintain a respectful soundscape.

Overall, our intention is to be a gentle and stabilizing presence in our surroundings — a space that not only coexists peacefully, but contributes to the diversity and balance of the festival as a whole.
Sounds from ceremonies, dance, talk - but we need our beauty sleep.
We are very safe.

We will gently and mindfully take down the camp after the festival, ensuring that everything we brought with us is either packed out, reused, or responsibly disposed of.

We see cleanup as part of the ritual — a shared and conscious closing of the space.

Throughout the festival, we will already be mindful of our impact, keeping the area clean and caring for the surroundings as we go.

And in the end, we will walk the land slowly, together, making sure nothing is left behind.

We come with softness — and we leave with care.

Sprinkling love to the grass everywhere we go 💛
**3–7 kWh for the full festival**.
Cathrine Møhl : [catmohl@live.dk](mailto:catmohl@live.dk)

customFields.value:
In the midst of music, movement, and connection, we want to create a gentle space to pause, breathe, and write.

Our Letter Writing Station invites you to connect - whether with loved ones or with people you may never meet. You can write letters of solidarity to political prisoners, reminding them they are not forgotten. A few words can cross walls and borders, carrying care, resistance, and presence into places where isolation is intended.

At the same time, this space is open to everyone. Write to your grandmother, a friend, a crush, a stranger, or even yourself. Love letters, messy thoughts, small updates, or secrets - everything has a place here.

We’ll provide a cozy setup with chairs, tables, beautiful paper, postcards, stamps, and pens. No need to bring anything but your thoughts. For those writing to political prisoners, we offer simple guidance on what to write and why it matters.

At the end of Borderland, we’ll collect and send all letters, letting your words travel start.

This project is about slowing down, practicing care, and using words as a form of connection and solidarity.

Calculated for minimum 200 letters, or optimally 400 if fully funded. It´s our first time here, so we are open for suggestions!

customFields.value: Welcome Home, Darling (it is a camp AND a feeling)

You might have met us last year. 

## **This year, _Welcome Home, Darling_ returns with an even warmer and homier concept.**

Ever wished for a break from the constant buzz of the playa? A place to land, rest, and feel at home mid‑Borderland? That’s what we offer: a cozy living room inside a magical Moroccan wedding tent — calm and cool during the day, warm and welcoming at night.

.

By day, the space hosts small experiences curated by our camp (and possibly you). **Thanks to blackout layers, the tent stays cool and dim even in daylight.** However, it is not a venue for big events!

.

**At night, it becomes a refuge for chilling, relaxing, playing soft guitar, playing board games, or simply winding down. And of course, we’re still serving our well‑known soup kitchen to hungry Borderlings.**

.

Over the years, we’ve waterproofed the tent, added reusable flooring, carpets, and heaters. This year we want to build a roof top terrace on top of the kitchen-container, plus imporve safety on heating, and add better lighting on the poles. 

So, we’re seeking funding for more soft things, heater safety improvements + gas, sturdy stringlights, a lit camp sign, and storage costs — so we can welcome you home, day and night.

buckets.title: Border Buoyancy
buckets.summary: A fire arrow ignites a hydrogen balloon anchored in the lake. A 2nd sunset > Mega Morran froztly wanders > icy vibe melts > Morran lifts > Mega Jelly is Born

customFields.value:
A silent pulsating presence that finds its right place. Mega Jelly syncs to any sound camp via DMX/WiFi, or pulses softly on its own. It adapts. It respects. It mirrors.

The Mega Jelly Stable, a tarp structure with top height of 6-7 metres. Built of re-purposed sails found at old beardy yacht sailors attic-hoarding for expired dreams. Maybe a small cost, mostly good stories, donated to Borderland. Budget covers bare essentials: black tarp, ropes and height, yet sailor strength structure that can be re-used or re-purposed for many years.

Disclaimer: Kids under 9 kg are recommended to co-walk with a parent if they wish to lend a naked Mega for a short stroll. Co-leash for light souls.

Daniel @ Border Buoyancy, more commonly known as "Kinden". Second Borderland, first co-dream! Former sailor. 8 meteorological balloon launches at sea, 12 artistic installations, two hydrogen runs 2025. Linde Gas contract incl. 40% discounted rates. Professional experience from vessels, tankers and port operations, including ATEX zones and fire watchkeeping.  
  
Finding lift where others see weight.

Reach me on Discord: border\_buoyancy

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Border Buoyancy dream and its Pregnant Mega Morran belongs to no camp. She belongs to everyone, yet lonely.

The inner offspring builds a pre-drop pressure. Is there a borderling camp that fits this dream story and offers BPM comfort and open-air birth space?

When the time is right and the wind is low, a hydrogen balloon burns above the lake.

A fire arrow, a cello, a 3-metre spherical burn crescending up as it reflects strokes and stillness. A woof, not a bang. A second sunset.

Then a week of noble buoyancy in the borders of elements, spectrums and Newton.

The Pregnant Mega Morran, a 420-centimetre dark-purple Helium-creature, floats weightless over the lands. In her deep-frozen black hand, she holds a leash with a groupie-Hattifnattar stalking her blindly. Walk around or lift the skirt and step inside. Morran's heart craves fluid. A few drips get it pumping. True chemistry, pure physics, real magic. At the peak of the night, Morran loses its weighted heart above a free open spot. The dark-purple falls.

Mega Jelly is born. Warm, bright, colourful. A true night owl flying high, flying low. BPM veins and DMX-sync-shine. Sun-phobic by nature, she shelters in Mega Jelly Stable by day. Pimp your outfit with Elvish-Mithril ultralights.

Chill, watch, create, debate or feed the Mega Jelly a bump of lift. Or a Mega Moomin makeover?

Hydrogen-burn:<5 m/s wind, 12-14 person team, artistic pre-announcement, sub-sonic woof, lake placement. MSBFS 2020:1. Execution plan: rehearsal, role list and safety specs and calculations on request
240V access needed, 5-10 plugs. Lights and tools. Most systems battery-powered.

A cellist, violinist or pianist for "The Second Sunset". A skilled archer. Builders and makers for Hattifnattar, Mega Morran and Mega Jelly. Moomin nerds. Stylists for the Elvish Mithril outfitting station in the Mega Jelly Stable.

I'm a creative generalist with a visual soul. I'm not a time-realistic person. I seek a co-director, co-makers, a choreographer and maybe a timely master?

Partial funding works. A smaller Morran floats, Jelly is born, Hattifnattar stalks.

Full funding adds a Mega Jelly Stable: a black and white meta space where Mega Jelly as a sun-phobic soul struggles to fit under a black roof and between white walls. A multi-dimensional creature in a world that often insists on flat or boxed-in.

The Mega Jelly Stable is open for anyone. Always. No schedule, owner-free living room. A space for the ever-living.

Hydrogen Disclaimer: Fire Lead meeting held. Safety dialog with Alversjö land, Clown Police and Helm in process. Any doubt, no burn. If H2 cancelled late, costs covered by dream lead.  
  
Mega Helium-creatures float regardless.
The Second Sunset: a cello at the lake. Rowing. Arrow. A burn woof. The 2nd sun. Mega Morran & Jelly: elvishly mimic the sound of moon rays as they wander. Flicks of jelly-burny-threads, a few woows.

Preliminary site visits for dialog and checkout placement alternatives. Mega Jelly Stable tarp set on Saturday, latest Sunday if winds would recommend other. All weather balloons and elvish material repurposed throughout the week. Full collection of all weather balloon material\*, LED gear and structures. LNT.

\*If Second Sunset reaches a no-doubt status and is placed in water, a fixed boom of repurposed trampoline fabric or equivalent will be placed underneath with good margins to catch balloon remains and arrow after burst and burn. All items going into the water float or are repurposed to float for lake safe collection.

buckets.title: PORTal Stamps of the Principles

customFields.value: Very safe

Put the stamps back into the pocket and go home!
The reality PORT
No

Arriving at Borderland you will get your wristband at the Threshold, and get greeted at the PORT.

At the PORT gate, you’ll get to choose your principle — the one that speaks to you most right now, this week, this version of you — and carry it as a stamp on your skin. Ten principles from Burning Man plus the eleventh, consent. Eleven symbols. One for you to claim as yours. It’s a tiny ritual with a bigger life: a conversation starter, an intention for the week, a way to find your people (“wait, you got Immediacy too?”), and a memory of the moment you crossed the threshold. Some people treat it like a tarot draw — not what you’d choose on a good day, but what you need right now. And if you’re new and don’t know the principles yet — perfect. That’s exactly what the PORT is for.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
We are currently co-creating with Threshold, hopefully we bring good vibes only ;)

customFields.value: This is a part of Elsewhere camp and goes together with Korsi dream
The dream will be a side-kick to Elsewhere. It helps dancers dance longer and cold people to get warm and bored people to socialize.
We have a built in Soundboks 3 with maximum SPL of 126 dB.
Dismounting will take place on the first day of strike. The stand is then transported to either Stockholm or Skåne where it will be in storage until next years burn.

Elsewhere

We are creating a Persian Paradise in our camp. We are all about creating warmth, coziness and beauty in the playa. The Masala Chai Wallah is our little satellite, a mobile masala chai stand, with built in DJ-booth to create some vibes outside and give you a hot drink before your visit to the Korsi experience (explained below) in our camp. Occasionally we will bring our Wallah around the playa to give you some warm masala chai and some delicious grooves.

Korsi: a traditional Persian furniture for cold winter nights, which is similar to a Swedish summer night haha! It's a low table, with a thick blanket on top. Under the table there is a heater which heats the space under the table. The whole family gathers around the table, sits on the ground and snuggle their legs under the blanket and enjoy the warmth while eating dinner or sipping some chai. Occasionally you could toe-flirt with your loved one. We are up-scaling the Korsi to fit 16 burners around it, and many more dancing or hanging out on top. Here's more about Korsi dream:

[https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnviytit001etqwgrchuxqkl?s=korsi&f=OPEN\_FOR\_FUNDING&f=IDEA](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnviytit001etqwgrchuxqkl?s=korsi&f=OPEN_FOR_FUNDING&f=IDEA)

We adapt and adjust to our surroundings, we meet by the church and march to the lake for the ceremony

We are bringing our newborns to their first burn and what better way to introduce them to this magical madness but a Burner Baptism? Before we promise their sweet souls to other religions, we want to gift them the most precious connection there is - the Burner spirit.

Maybe you have heard about it before, a religious ritual celebrating new life, spiritual re-birth and most importantly, a ritual freeing you from your sins. The burner baptism holds many similarities, and you are welcome to join us.

Beings of all ages are welcome to join the ceremony, either as a viewer, or if you feel the calling – to experience your one and only Burner Baptism.

We will meet by the church on Thursday and march to the lake for the ceremony. We call on all spiritual beings and forces of nature to awaken the magical oneness that will hold us as we call on the burner spirit to carry us through the baptism.

+++

\- What  
A burner baptism, opened with a march from the church to the lake, followed by a ceremony and baptism for all ages.

\- What can I expect to experience?  
Freedom, love, reborn

\- Who is welcome  
All ages, from babies to boomers

\- Can I join the project?  
Yes, the burner spirit is best ignited together.

buckets.title: The Hills Lakeside Plaza- Lotus Chill (by Magic Banya)
buckets.summary: Glowing lotus seating offers shade, rest, and a sculptural lakeside gathering space that welcomes participants into the Magic Banya.

customFields.value: Coral Ljunggren, ljucor@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
The Lotus Chill seating helps distribute visitor flow around the Magic Banya check-in area and reduces congestion near the entrance.

Last year we saw a strong need for soft landing zones where participants could rest before and after sessions. These seating structures help create:

*   calmer transitions
    
*   clearer pathways
    
*   quieter waiting areas
    
*   improved spatial flow along the lakeshore
    

We will coordinate placement together with neighbouring camps on the Hill and beachside to maintain respectful spacing and shared atmosphere.

Like last year, we will support the lakeshore community by helping maintain a MOOP-free environment around the seating area.

The installation contributes positively to the neighbourhood by offering rest, warmth, orientation, and welcoming contact points for both participants and passers-by.
The Lotus Chill seating area is intended as a quiet lounge environment. Occasionally, soft ambient music, guided meditation acoustic instruments may be present at low volume.
The structures are low to the ground with anchored bases and secured frames. They are not climbable. Low-power LED lighting supports safe movement after dark. Clear walking paths are maintained.

Like the Magic Banya itself, the Lotus Chill installation is fully temporary.

After the event:

*   all seating platforms dismantled
    
*   parasol structures removed
    
*   textiles packed
    
*   lighting removed
    
*   anchoring points cleared
    
*   site restored and MOOP-checked
    

Only the experience remains.

*   1 PSU per **2 platforms,** ~60–100 W per **2-platform cluster**
    
*   8 platforms total, **4 clusters ≈240–500 W total expected load**

# **MAGIC BANYA by Mist behavior**

The banya is a Russian-style **steam sauna**, built as a handcrafted tent structure where heat, steam and ritual come together. Using a borrowed banya, the project was a great success in 2025 and this year we come back by engineering our own Borderland Banya, backed by F33!

WEBSITE:[Magic Banya Camp · Borderland 2026](https://magicbanya.com/)

Interested in joining us? fill out our really awesome [form](https://forms.gle/GsaqJdUU2VnWRAsX7)

Last Borderland the Magic Banya received very high interest, with over 800 participants signing up and many more visiting between sessions. This created crowding near the lakeshore entrance and showed a clear need for a larger transition space.

This year we plan to build 2-10 Lotus Chill seating structures forming a calm threshold landscape around the Banya entrance. These modular lotus-shaped platforms create shaded daytime resting areas and softly illuminated gathering points after dark, supporting safe movement along the lakeshore.

The seating circles function both as shared infrastructure and participatory environmental art, offering spaces for rest, integration after sauna sessions, small workshops, tea ceremonies and spontaneous gatherings.

By distributing visitors across several welcoming resting points, the installation improves spatial flow, reduces congestion near check-in and strengthens the lakeshore neighbourhood environment for both participants and passers-by.

The structures adapt to uneven terrain, remain low and wind-stable, and are fully temporary and removable after the event.

Yes — the Lotus Chill seating is designed specifically to support co-creation.

The seating structures create small shared gathering circles where participants and neighbouring camps can easily use this area and improve the Plaza by the lake by offering both shade and lighting to the surrounding area.

Each Lotus Chill seating structure costs approximately 12,000–15,000 kr to build and includes a circular seating platform, lotus canopy structure, cushions, lighting, anchoring and shared installation infrastructure. But the intention is to place them close to the lakeside entrance to help create the Lakeside plaza.

buckets.title: Beatmachine - Collaborative Music Maker
buckets.summary: The Beatmachine is an instrument inviting people to make music together. No previous experience needed, we made sure it'll sound good. Have fun playing!

customFields.value: Jan Z (Discord @JanZet, borderland@techwizz.art)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We only need a small USB power supply for running the audio synthesizer and the speaker (<60 W)
No safety risks
This dream is portable and will be taken back home
It could harmonize (or clash) with other sound based dreams in close proximity.
The beatmachine makes sound through a small bluetooth speaker, not competing with sound camps or large sound systems.

# **Beatmachine v2**

The Beatmachine is an interactive musical toy that is meant to introduce the playa to the world of sound synthesis and drum programming.

We will build upon the Beatmachine v1 (in the photos), which we have brought to previous burns and festivals, and make it a better, portable and self-contained instrument.

The v2 will feature an interactive synthesizer that can be played by multiple people at the same time. The biggest new feature will be a chessboard-based drum sequencer, where you can place chips on the board to arrange a drum beat. We will also add more knobs and sliders and switches to the Beatmachine to play with the audio synthesis.

Under the hood, we are changing the audio architecture such that the whole instrument can be played without a laptop nearby we will make it more portable and convenient to carry. Also we have made some smarter design choices, so the Beatmachine doesn't look as raw as on the photos. And it will sound more awesome than ever before!

buckets.title: The Grand Tournament 🏰🃏by the Jousting Jesters
buckets.summary:
Knights of the realm! 
The Jousting Jesters return with a hallowed and h-whimsical tournament for all you knights and knaves, wenches and damsels!

customFields.value:
After many a moon of ribaldry and ribbing, we have progressed from being born to jest to being ready to joust! Here your bravery, valour and skill will be put to the test.

Our main event will be a grand jousting tourney. We will be delivering rounds of carriage/mount driven combat, with prizes and good spirited chicanery all round. Partake chivalrously or rake rivalrously as trial by combat and fun by banter reign. Compete in great feats of knightly skill such as **lancing atop horseback, sword duels** and **archery**!

Yours in revelry,

**The Knights and Jesters of the Jousting Table.**

buckets.summary: Welcome to the world’s most sinful casino, powered by sincoins, where memories grow wilder and hotter, and dignity, comfort, and boredom are left at the tables!

customFields.value:
Aurimas @Amadeus amadeus00330 on discord  
For detailed budget please check the [link](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rEK2uiI7lHXSiXyKvZhsB5mPLM8OKOcyohHQYX9PKmg/edit?usp=sharing): [https://tinyurl.com/4mz9c639](https://tinyurl.com/4mz9c639)

customFields.value: We are actively taking part in the pre-placement process and are in dialogue with our neighbours, aiming to create a fun, sexy, adult-only zone.
No amplified music inside the caSINo, however the dream is close to Club SIN's dance floor.
We will follow fire safety procedures, and ensure that all lighting and power cables are properly secured. We have appointed power and safety leads and will bring our own PDUs.

Everything we bring, we will take back with care. A strike lead will be responsible for ensuring a smooth teardown and packing process. Reusable bulky items will be stored in a container in Alversjö, while the rest will be taken back and stored safely in Gothenburg.
Lights approximately 500W.

Club SIN’s caSINo is unlike any casino you have ever been to, or ever will be. This is the only casino where losing makes you happier, and where you leave with a bigger smile than when you arrived.

In this caSINo, you will play poker with unearthly faces you have never learned to read. You might beg a dildo for your lucky number at roulette. You might flirt shamelessly with the blackjack dealer for one more round of mischief. You might press the dice to filthy places you did not know could bring luck, just to double your chances at craps (new game!).

And save your best coins and try your luck at the Club SIN slut machine. The jackpot lies on the other side of the secret wall of Glorious Gifts.

In this casino, you cannot buy chips. You will need _sincoins_ to play, and they are the only currency that matters. There are only two ways to earn them. Commit sins from our Menu of Sins, or accept punishment from our Menu of Punishments. Once you have your chips, step forward and gamble what is left of your dignity, or spend them on the juicy treats prepared by the Angels.  

Now be a sinful Borderling. Place your bet on this dream.  
![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dreamswtf/image/upload/v1775875826/dreams/nvekzw9ochxvalxvneis.png)

**Club SIN**

Club SIN brings the charm of a decadent nightclub to the burn: twisted casino games, a sweaty dance floor, juicy workshops, wicked performances, and a bar full of treats. But nothing comes for free; you’ll need _sincoins_ to access it all: play at the casino, enjoy treats, join workshops, or enter the sex+ luxury lounge or afterparties. Earn them by committing sins or accepting punishments from our carefully curated menus.  
Club SIN dreams: [danSINg](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoq41as0022xnznbk1cltsr?s=dansing&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), [caSINo](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqf1by002bxnzn07tkar8t), [SIN Bar](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoq0sjo001xxnznet8yelcp?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), [House of SIN](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqgx2t000aoyfnkk1azusr?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), and [SIN Salabim](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqi6s1001mbtyovxnh04lr?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA).  
Fill this [form](https://forms.gle/5n8esnHMj151yxvH9) for membership application.

**Co-creation**

The casINo becomes what it is through the people willing to play along. It is a place where you gamble your shame and dignity, ask for punishment, and commit sins together with others who are just as ready.

The more you step in, the more the casINo comes alive.

If you would like to co-create this space, bring your own twist, or deal games, please contact us or fill this form.

buckets.title: Glowhole
buckets.summary: Glowhole is an interactive art space where people paint with natural paints. By day it’s calm and earthy; at night it glows under UV light.

customFields.value: Electricity is needed for lightning and sounds.

Only non-toxic, skin and enironmental safe paints will be used. UV paints are water-based and used in controlled areas. Ground protection will protect paint to envirnment. Gray water will be collected

This space is created through participation. Everyone who enters becomes part of the artwork, not just by observing but by contributing in their own way. The environment evolves continuously as people add, transform, and respond to what others have created before them. There is no fixed outcome, only a shared process where expression builds on expression, and the space becomes a living reflection of the community.

The space invites free expression while holding respect for personal boundaries and consent. Participants are encouraged to tune into both themselves and others, creating an atmosphere where interaction can happen safely and intuitively.
All materials will be removed after the event. The area will be checked thoroughly to ensure no trace is left. Greywater will be disposed of properly.
Music will be played to support the atmosphere, ranging from ambient, classical to techno etc.

This is an interactive painting environment where participants can paint and play with color, on surfaces, on objects, and (with consent) on each other.

The place is free to use all day around and offers workshops; ex. Paint it out, emotional letting go, smash, bodypainting, pilates. Come and paint with classical music or just be wild with colors.

Glowhole uses mainly based natural and edible paints, UV paints are water based and only used in protected area and not on body.

The space evolves constantly. Venue has a blank canvas that will turn to be something wild, beautiful, emotional and layered. Person can continue someone else’s work, start something new, or completely transform what’s already there.

During the day, the focus is on natural, earthy materials and free expression. As it gets darker, UV lights turn on and everything begins to glow, creating a completely different atmosphere.

buckets.title: Sheltered Tea-Lounge connected to the Sauna- protected from rain, better seats & drinks(Magic Banya)
buckets.summary: Last year’s tea lounge success returns to support F33 Magic Banya: a cozy space to land, rest & connect. Upgraded for safety, weather and comfort for 40 guests.

customFields.value:
We bring very little sound (chimes/gong) but may collaborate with calm performers.

We prefer a natural ambient sound environment. The lounge supports **nervous system regulation and integration**.

The tea lounge is built collectively by the Magic Banya Mist Behavior people.

*   Decoration and atmosphere shaped in collaboration
    
*   Shared responsibility for holding the space
    

Just as last year, we are connecting with other projects on added offerings in the tea lounge (electrolytes, massages, calm performances, guided meditations)
**Fridge for cold refreshments (>800W)**, **icemaker (>600W)**, **two large hot water kettles (appr6–12L, 2000-2500W each). Lights on batteries**

This year, we are in active dialogue with other sauna camps to co-create a shared neighbourhood atmosphere and are collectively trying to enhance the swimming pier area.

We coexisted well with nearby sound camps with padding last year. We explored collaboration with a massage camp, but space limitations made this not so feasible.

## **Why the Tea Lounge Matters**

The banya does not end when guests leave the steam. People often come out overwhelmed and need to sit down, have a beverage and connect.

The tea lounge creates the bridge between intensity and rest, allowing the experience to settle in the body.

We successfully hosted a tea lounge last year, and it became a central part of the experience. However, the setup relied heavily on good weather and minimal infrastructure. We were fortunate that conditions held.

This year, we are seeking funding to **upgrade the lounge into a fully reliable and high-quality space**:

*   Weatherproof and protected from rain and wind
    
*   Comfortable, with proper seating and leveled ground
    
*   Safer, with improved structures and equipment
    
*   Scalable, able to serve and support all **~40 participants per banya session**
    

## **Two Lounge Vision**

We aim to build **two distinct lounges**:

*   A **pre-banya arrival space**,
    
*   A **post-banya integration space**
    

Depending on funding, these may be combined into **one larger, multi-functional lounge** without compromising the core intention.

*   Full strike on Sunday, with the final people leaving on Monday
    
*   All materials removed and packed down
    
*   Storage plan for reuse in future years, as required by F33
    
*   Focus on reusable and durable materials
    

The project is designed for **continuity and minimal waste**.

*   Fire extinguisher
    
*   First aid kit
    
*   Adequate lighting for nighttime use
    

We have a separate dream for improved walkways, for safety around the banya and tea lounge!

# **MAGIC BANYA by Mist behavior**

The banya is a Russian-style **steam sauna**, built as a handcrafted tent structure where heat, steam and ritual come together. Using a borrowed banya, the project was a great success in 2025 and this year we come back by engineering our own Borderland Banya, backed by F33!

WEBSITE:[Magic Banya Camp · Borderland 2026](https://magicbanya.com/)

Interested in joining us? fill out our really awesome [form](https://forms.gle/GsaqJdUU2VnWRAsX7)
Coral Ljunggren, [ljucor@gmail.com](mailto:ljucor@gmail.com)

customFields.value: The Foxhole

This dream is inspired by the wonderful project that Welcome Home Darling had in 2025.  
  
Imagine yourself having to transport 100 liters of water for your camp, imagine the back pain and frustrations that comes from carrying things back and forth.  
In the Foxhole in 2025, the Welcome Home Darling water car was a life saver for us, so we would love to do this again this year.  
  
We aim to recreate this idea, but in another field, so there are 2 water services serving different neighbourhoods. If we end up in the same neighbourhood as Welcome Home Darling we may cancel one dream (this one).

Plan is for an electric vehicle, that can take all your water canisters and fill them up then deliver them back.  
We will do a sign up and rota so that bigger camps in the neighbourhood can borrow the car to do their water run. Location will be added during April after pre placement progresses.

**What we will do:**  
Make a sign up/ rota system so camps can sign up then borrow the car for a time slot.  
Ensure charging and a safe place to store the van at night.  
A way to ensure the keys are not lost and the car safety.
This is a collaborative effort for a large area of Borderland
No sound
The car will be picked up by Epton Trading.

buckets.title: Soup Kitchen
buckets.summary:
Experience papas vegan meat-a-balls & other dishes of hot, delicious food!
We have served food since BL 22, and would LOVE to do so again in 26 🤌

customFields.value:
# The Soup Kitchen wants to serve you.

You might know of us. You have probably heard Papa shouting and offering you his famous **spaghetti and vegan meat‑a‑balls**. Or perhaps we welcomed you with our hot and steamy **Welcome Home Dahling.**

### Since 2022 we’ve served more than 2500 hot, vegan meals during BL.

As always, we’ll be cooking and serving comforting food during the some of the cold nights.

**The Soup Kitchen is an experience.** We care as much about service, interaction, and atmosphere as we do about the food itself.

Every service is a performance. Last year, Papa and his sleazy Italian Stallions served their signature polpette al sugo di pomodoro (non‑meat‑a‑balls) while boiling 30 kilos of spaghetti, shouting in Italian, and blasting their favourite canzones.

**We have almost everything that we need to run the soup kitchen. But this year we have a few ideas that require specific equipment. What we need funding for:**

*   Ingredients to serve 900 hungry burners, over the course of 3 nights.
    
*   Specific and secret equipment
    
*   Additional fridges or rental of fridge trailer
    
*   Additional utensils
    
*   Upgrades to our washing station
    
*   Gas
    
*   Transportation

Our surroundings love us because of the food we serve. We are noisy but charming, and our choice of music is perfectly suited for whatever theme we are serving.  
We will be serving the food in our Camp, where there will be plenty of space for people to sit and enjoy their time.  
Although if you are lucky, the soup kitchen might come to you.
Welcome Home, Darling
It will be loud, but not outside of the limits of wherever we are placed.
Asjula on discord - ajuullarsen@gmail.com

customFields.value: We have all the relevant courses and have a bunch of professionals as part of our camp. We follow the fire regulations

We will need all the Power available to all of Borderland. Or at least some of it.

If you see yourself serving 300 people in about an hour, all whilst culturally appropriating food from other places then we would love for you to come and join us.

If you have a dream of cooking a specific meal for all the people of BL, but do not have a proper kitchen setup, then reach out and we can maybe find a time where you can do a pop-up cooking thing. Reach out to Luciano on Luciano@Foschi.dk or on Discord.

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We seek to collaborate with **The Department of Mineral affairs** and host **The Chapel of Lost Sodium**.

This year, **The Lysthus in the Secret Garden is evolving**—not just as a place, but as a sanctuary for connection. After last Borderland, we stretched the terrace wider, inviting more tables, more laughter, more shared moments under the whispering leaves.

The cabin itself will be tenderly restored: **new wood to strengthen its bones, linseed oil and paint to revive its glow, and perhaps a touch of care for its straw crown** (though it still stands steadfast against the rain). We’ll add **three or four café table sets and soft cushions**, turning the space into an even cozier nest for weary souls.

We’ll stock up on ingredients for **vegan, gluten-free pancakes, vibrant smoothies, and maybe a few unexpected delights**. But let’s be honest—**it’s never just about the food**. It’s about the hands that serve it, the stories shared across the tables, and the quiet magic of strangers becoming kin.

The Secret Garden has always been a **haven for the lost and the hungry**—not just for pancakes, but for something deeper. You may arrive craving one thing, but you’ll leave nourished in ways you didn’t know you needed.

This dream belongs to all of us!
It's for everybody who is in need of a transport vehicle from the Gate to the camp so it co-exists with YOU.

We have the opportunity to buy some former post cargo bikes with a powerful electric motor and additionally some new wheel barrows so all the Borderlings can easily transport their luggage or groceries from the Gate to their camps.

There was a lively discussion in an [Advice Porcess](https://talk.theborderland.se/d/dUSoMr4m/ap-sleeper-vehicle-passes-for-borderland-2026-aka-rolling-home-permit-for-cars-rv-s-and-caravans-) to limit the amount of cars in Borderland and we spoke in an online meeting about getting a bunch of wheelbarrows that later can be useful for Alversjö land project.

Now we got the opportunity to buy some used electric cargo bikes from Denmark and bring them to Alversjö. They are useful to transport stuff around the land without the need of burning CO2 and for this purpose of driving luggage and groceries to your camp they are PERFECT!

Please help us to make this happen!

Xavier mentioned that the original batteries might be a fire hazard in the hands of our hippies and we should get [LiFePO4 batteries](https://www.akkushop-24.de/LiFePO4-Akku-48V-512V-15Ah-20A-Lithium-Eisen-Phosphat-Batterie-fuer-Camping-Boot-Caravan-Wohnwagen-Elektromobile-Golfwagen) instead to protect our barn and land from burning down.

Welcome to The Wheel of Pleasure - where your yes is the only rule, and chance does the rest.

Step up with a trusted partner and choose from our curated menu of sensations: a delicious mix of soft, sharp, cool, teasing, and unexpected. You pick your boundaries. We handle the mischief.

Then… you give in.

Blindfolded and deliciously unaware, you become the center of attention. The wheel spins to decide how many hands fate will send your way, and your partner quietly selects the lucky winners from the crowd.

You won’t know who they are.

You won’t see them coming.

You’ll just feel.

A brush here. A surprise there. A dance of sensation across your skin - playful, electrifying, and entirely within your chosen yeses.

For a few delicious minutes, you’re not in control… just in sensation.

And then - poof - they’re gone.

When the blindfold comes off, the crowd looks innocent.

But someone in it just played with you.

_Spin the wheel. Tease your fate._ 😈

customFields.value:
**Players/participiants:** We'll use protection and lubricant, and all players will get a safety briefing.

**Sexually explicit content and nudity:** Closed venue — not visible to the general public.

## The Evolution of Sport

For four billion years, life on this planet has been reaching toward something. Toward this moment.

### The Vision

Single cells divided. Fins became legs. Apes descended from the trees and gazed at the stars. Darwin could never have dreamed of this. Einstein theorized it. Now, we play it.

### The Technology

Players wield coherent light as their ancestors once wielded spears. Laser-equipped buttplugs guide autonomous robots across the arena in an athletic display of precision and strategy.

### THE TEAMS

3 players per team. One on each side of the field. Each player equipped with a regulation laser buttplug.

### THE ROBOT

The autonomous ROBO unit has 4 sensors. Hit a sensor with your laser to push the robot in the opposite direction.

### THE OBJECTIVE

Guide the robot across your opponent's end line to score. Highest score after 5 minutes wins.

### THE ARENA

6m x 4m playing field. Smoke-filled for laser visibility. Plexiglass perimeter. Crowds gather close. Full sensory assault.
It's a one-time event, and we'd love to host it in the machine hall — maybe in the early evening or late afternoon — so the sound stays inside and doesn't bother any neighbors.
We’d love to team up with the camp in the machine hall and use their sound system if that works. The plan is loud music, plus cheering and screaming — but don’t worry, it’s all happening inside.

We are looking for a space, preferably indoors, and it needs to be dark. We are also looking for a PA system with a microphone for the speaker and a fog machine/hazer. We would love to have cheerleaders and a mascot. We are open to sponsorships 😉 If anyone would like to serve snacks, that would be wonderful.  
Please share your ideas, and let’s celebrate our sparkling butts.

> Can you feel it?
> 
> This matter, your matter, our matter.
> 
> Heavy. Entangled. Gathered and gathering. How it accumulates.

> 
> **Screw it!** 
>

**The co-creative process:**

*   The initial ball of matter is created and placed somewhere where many people pass, ideally close to the woods.  
    
*   Screws, a power screwdriver is placed next to it and is available for anyone to use. People can find their own wood bits, leave some for others, use what is left.
    
*   **Anyone at their own free will, in any way they want, add to the ball. The ball of matter grows as people add.**

customFields.value:
For this dream, we envision a beeaaautiful space, tent-like fashion, where the interior is fit for a forest royal or a bliss-high yogi. 

Do we want to create this place ourselves? **Ofc!!**

**BUT!!**  
Are we at a burn where there are tons of other super sick creative creatures doing exactly this kind of tent? Absolutely, SOOOOOOOO

Are you that person with that dream and that camp that could in burner fashion make more dreams fill the Borderlings offers?

Reach us on + 46 76 1488431 (Whatsapp) and let’s marinate together.

Co-creation rocks.

\[Que commercial heroic super oak-like voice with epic movie music\]

Who wants to take better care of themselves during festivals, but feels meeh doing it alone? Who wants to honour the body and mind to not just survive, but thrive during the festival?

We’re here to honour the wild. Dedicating the morning to crack our bodies open. For this medicine—this simple medicine—you need three things: Your breath, your pulse and a **"FUCK YES, LET'S GO"** attitude.

**Body:** With two instructors in Thai boxing and nature-based exercise, we'll make those endorphins wild, using simple equipment and the forest, grass and rocks around us.   

**Breath:** Once done, we'll take all that energy back into your soul through your breath. You’ll enter a dream-like tent — adorned with smell, visuals, and softness—to thank yourself for prioritising your body.  

**Belly:** Then we nourish. Small treats from the wild kitchen. Fizzy probiotic drinks and snacks forged from the very leaves, roots, and greens beneath your boots. Sensory experience, as we set the final intention for the day ahead. 

That leaves us grounded, strong, and centred.

Mind AND body prepared to take in whatever may come.

There might be grunting, there might be shouting. As far as we do such, it will be out in the forest area in Alvesjö, a bit outside of camp to not wake any late sleepers. We're talking about late mornings hours.  
  
The wind-down tent will not put any harm towards nature nor the neighbours. Simply be there, and them be gone by the end of the festival. Another area where people can rest during the festival.
Shouting in the forest. Soft music in open tent. Talking (God forbid)

The dream is easy to move.  
  
Phase one: Body - moving out in the forest + a bigger area to kick each other. (consentually)

Phase two: Breath - the tent would be a simple set-up with carpets, drapes, cushions, blankets, incents and so forth. It can be done with simple means or join an already glamping cosy relaxing tent area.  
  
Phase three: Belly - the food will be stored in a cooler in a van. The dry food would be in the van. A few buckets will be needed to clean some glasses and cutlery. Finger picking food, drinks or a simple soup depending on what has been abundantly foraged.  
  
No strass. No funky.
Electricity for a van with a cooler, optionally have a shelf in a fridge from a main house.
Eliana Eldsfors + 46 76 14 88 431 (Whatsapp/facebook/telegram/signal/discord)

Somewhere between a playground and a daydream, this kinetic sculpture invites you to sit, sway… and maybe forget gravity for a while.

Designed for 1 to 3 people,  the piece takes the familiar language of a swing and teaches it to grow wings.

Above, vast translucent sails—part butterfly/part underwater creatures/part cosmos dancer—stretch nearly three meters wide, catching light like a whisper of dusk. Their burgundy organza shimmers with violet reflections, as if the sky itself had decided to rest for a moment.

The structure, grounded in a black metal frame, stands steady and quiet—like a stage waiting for movement.

From it, hangs a generous hammock, a shared nest where strangers become companions, and companions become co-pilots. Because this is not just a seat: it’s a collective flight.

With every motion of the hammock, the bamboo ribs awaken the wings. They do not flap—they breathe. Slow, wide, almost alive. The sculpture listens to the rhythm of its passengers and answers in kind, turning simple play into a choreography of air and balance.

At nearly four meters tall, it is both an object and an invitation:  
to gather, to drift, to laugh, to relax and dream

Caution: This is not just a swing, this might be a hippie trap!

customFields.value: Money talks, wealth whispers.
What would SIN Salabim be without its fabulous clientele? You help us create the experience by engaging with the staff, visitors and the space.

We shall practice the ancient swedish arts of HÄNSYN and GRANNSAMVERKAN (consideration and neighbourhoodliness).
We strike on Sunday. We will take home everything we brought and do a thorough MOOP sweep of the camp and its surroundings.

We take excellent care of our guests at Club SIN – especially distinguished patrons such as yourself. For the select few with the sincoins to spare, we open the doors to SIN Salabim: Club SIN’s brand new members' lounge. Here, anything can be bought and sold, as long as the price is right.

We cater to all sinners. If sloth is your vice, you need not lift a finger, except to ring the bell which will promptly summon our eager servants and concubines. Let them give you a treatment worthy of a sultan, with swaying palm leaves, fragrant oils, incense and lavender. Gluttons, too, will find their fair share of delights here. Grapes, honey and nectar – no feast shall be denied those with the right means.

As for lust, we offer a space where desire lingers in the air and can be ignited by those who carry the spark. In the borderland between lounge and playroom it is up to you, dear visitor, to tip the scales in either direction. Whether you come to indulge your senses, explore connection or simply soak in the atmosphere, you are most welcome.

Understand, though, that SIN Salabim is not for the greedy, for you will surely leave less wealthy than you came. The truly rich are well aware, however, that not all fortunes are made of gold.

buckets.title: The Naughty Improv Theater - by the Fuckery
buckets.summary: The Naughty Improv Theatre is a workshop and performance space where participants explore erotic storytelling, playful roleplay and spontaneous physical comedy

customFields.value: The Fuckery

## Picture this: a stage. Some willing bodies. Zero script. Infinite possibilities. Some of them awkward, some of them hilarious, perhaps some genuinely, deliciously naughty.

## The Naughty Improv Theatre is a workshop and performance space where participants explore erotic storytelling, playful roleplay and spontaneous physical comedy — all through the liberating lens of improv theatre. No rehearsals, no shame, no bad ideas (only offers). We use classic improv techniques and exercises (perhaps sometimes with a twist) as scaffolding for something raunchier than your average improv exercise.

## Expect laughter. Expect surprise. Expect to discover that vulnerability and desire are basically the same thing wearing different hats.

## The Naughty Improv Theatre will be operating inside the main event tent of the Fuckery camp—a broader play space designed with care and consent at its core. We will clearly communicate our operating hours. We aim to harmonize with nearby camps and spaces, avoiding overlap with events that might clash in vibe or volume. We are open only during scheduled times to preserve possibilities for other events and activities within the space.
We operate in alignment with The Fuckery's soundscape and sound levels. This dream will not involve music, but a lot of chatter, probably some laughter and maybe some horny sounds.

The space will be held by improv theatre facilitators who will introduce the rules, mediate performances, and ensure a safe, respectful, and welcoming atmosphere. Participation is strictly consensual.

## The Naughty Improv Theatre is built entirely on participation and based on principles of improv theatre, meaning that the participants improvise and act on gut feeling. There is no right or wrong! You don't need acting experience. Experienced facilitators will guide warm-up exercises, consent check-ins, and scene work that ranges from flirtatious to filthy — always at the pace the group sets together. 

## You don't need to be sexy. You just need to show up, say yes, and be willing to make a fool of yourself in the most magnificent way possible. However, to make the space as sexy as possible we invite you to dress (or undress!) in a way that brings out your sexiest you.

## This is not a show for passive consumption—it’s an invitation to express, embody, and co-create a bodily, theatrical experience. And for those who want to continue the acting and the embodied experience, they can just stay afterwards for the play night that will begin directly after the theatre workshop.
We build Sat-Monday July 19th-20th and are done with Strike no later than Sunday July 26th.
This dream relies on electricity estimations of The Fuckery’s infrastructure, in coordination with the camp team.
@Mirja is our Dr. Bill-Bull.

buckets.title: Aporia - quest time!
buckets.summary: Now expanding with quests and cuddle space! A space to reflect & transform. Guided prompts help you sit with ambivalence and purpose, finding a path forward.

customFields.value: Dr. Dr. Bill-Bull Ester Kristine

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Aporia

We (Ester and Max) are planning on setting up the whole thing ourselves. If you have a vision on a quest or type of self therapy session we would love your input or even co-creation - just hit us up however you find us!
Strike on Sunday, we expect it to go smoothly without help. Everything will be stored nicely in Norway until next Borderland.
No significant safety concerns.
Low sound levels, only mild ambient music will be played inside the tent.
It will be placed in a quiet area as a nice quaint little thing to discover while wandering about. Hopefully as a welcome surprise for travellers who are far from home.
We need electricity for the simple sound system and LEDs. No Big Watt Monsters.

# **Background**

Aporia is back, growing into a hub for transformative experiences and quests at future Borderlands.

Greek for “difficulty in passage” or “puzzlement,” Aporia names the moment you feel stuck. We believe the answers you seek are already within you; our space helps you uncover them with clarity. Created by doctors for safe, self-guided growth.

# **The experience**

This year we’re expanding with a second tent, moving toward the self-reliant growth village we envision. With your support, this becomes a space people can step into when they need it most.

You can expect:

## **\- Solo work (open 24/7)**

Enter alone into a calm, inspiring space and be guided through a reflective process. Paper is provided to capture insights and take them with you. No prep needed, just show up when ready. A transition area outside lets you rest (or wait) before moving on.

## **\- The aporia community tent (this is what we need your help to realize!)**

A warm, low-pressure space to land, connect, and explore with others. It’s where ideas spark, conversations open, and curiosity pulls you in. Here you’ll also find the **quest** **box**, where you can receive your personal quest for this year’s Borderland. Cuddle puddles welcome!

buckets.title: Egg (Egg Egg Egg Egg Egg Egg Egg) - Ver 2.0
buckets.summary: The Egg has returned. Shinier, rounder, and considerably more chromatic than ever before.

customFields.value:
**_\-- An Egg. Floating in the vacuum of space. Pausing time itself, resisting the everlasting pull of gravity --_**

At first, it may look like just an egg. Egg-shaped. Almost symmetric. A simple, white object.  
Or so it claims.  
White, after all, is every color hiding in plain sight — a crowd too vast for the human eye to ever  
meet at once.  
_What color are you really, my egg?_

This is no ordinary egg. Gaze at it long enough and you may witness something. Peer at just the right moment, and you might catch a miracle -- **the whole spectrum of color, unpacked one shade at a time, glowing in slow pantomime.**

_They say if it walks like an egg and sounds like an egg, it's an egg._  
My egg would like to challenge this.

### Twice Upon a Time

If you have a déjà vu feeling that you and the egg have met before — if you could swear on your grandmother's good china that you've seen it somewhere — **you might be hallucinating**.  
But there's a small chance you're not.

**_This is the second time The Egg visits The Borderland. And this time, it's shinier, rounder, and water-proofer than before._**
Unplugged and packed into the same trolley it arrived in.
**_As quite as the rainbow_**
I coexist peacefully with **all creatures** — _glowy, non-glowy, eggy, non-eggy_.
**_As safe as (sliding on) the rainbow_**
I only need my egg, but you're welcome to help me hang (it up on a tree)

**_Where the egg gets its glow from no one knows._**  
What's clear is that it needs no help from the grid.

Designed and manufactured by the Almighty.

Treasured by Zion.

For inquiries: +972-522258585 \[WhatsApp\]

buckets.title: Sigil's & Tattoo's @ Alchemist Chamber
buckets.summary: Create a personal sigil from a word or intention. Transform it into a unique symbol—and optionally tattoo it as a lasting mark of change.

customFields.value: Kemikal

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Just some background music.

Turn intentions into symbols.

In this workshop, you’ll create a personal sigil based on a word or phrase that represents a change, direction, or desire in your life. Using a simple letter-based method, we’ll transform language into a unique visual mark — a symbol of your own will.

Once created, you can keep your sigil as a drawing, or — if you choose — have it tattooed on your body as a lasting reminder. The act of marking the body adds weight to the intention: a moment of sensation, commitment, and transformation.

Come with an idea, or find it here.
All tattoo equipment is single-use, including needles, gloves, and razors. After each tattoo, we apply a sterile second skin to protect the area and ensure a clean, safe process.

This event will take place in the **Alchemist Chamber**, a space that in previous years has hosted experimental workshops and installations, including projects with touch, water, and mushroom synths. The space itself has been made possible through funding from earlier editions of the camp.

Instead of a scheduled show, we’re creating an ongoing pole jam: a space to explore, connect, and move freely throughout the night. No pressure, no stage,  just movement, curiosity, and connection to the beats of the Machinehall.

A welcoming environment for improvisation, experimentation, and shared energy. Come solo and lose yourself in movement, or co-create spontaneous jams with others. Whether slow and sensual, playful and chaotic, or quietly embodied,  all expressions are welcome.

🔹 A movement sanctuary — where pole dancers, ravers, and curious souls collide

We’re not just dancing. We’re rewriting gravity together.

buckets.title: Under Pressure
buckets.summary: The more pressure, the better the juice 🍊

customFields.value: Low/Minimal

HOW FAST CAN YOU SQUEEZE?!

FASTER.

NO—FASTER THAN THAT.

YOU WANT JUICE? EARN IT.  

Welcome to UNDER PRESSURE 🍊  

This is not a juice bar.

This is a performance.

A test.

A breakdown.

A race against your own hesitation.

Three stations.

Manual squeezers.

Zero patience.  

You step in → the clock starts → the whistles blow → and suddenly you’re surrounded by people yelling:

“GO GO GO!”

“DON’T STOP!”

“YOU CALL THAT JUICE?!”

“FASTER!!”  

Your hands slip.

Your forearms burn.

The orange fights back.

And still — you squeeze.

We time you.

We judge you.

We push you way harder than anyone should over a cup of juice.  

Who can squeeze the most in 60 seconds?

Who cracks under pressure?

Who rises?

No schedule.

No mercy.

Just fresh orange juice you absolutely had to work for.  

BYOC — Bring Your Own Cup.

Bring your ego.

Leave your dignity.
UNDER PRESSURE camp

UNDER PRESSURE is a small, low‑footprint station that brings brightness and playfulness to the camp. We don’t need much space, but we aim to fill it with laughter, spilled juice, and the smell of fresh oranges.  
We coexist happily with anyone who enjoys a refreshing drink, a bit of silliness, and the chance to participate instead of just spectating.  
If you’re walking by and you hear someone yelling “Faster! More juice!”, that’s us—feel free to join the line and get under pressure.
**Allergen Transparency:** We will have a chalkboard display every night listing all ingredients.

Bring your ideas:  
New challenges.  
Twisted rules.  
Ridiculous competitions.  
Ways to push people harder, faster, further.

Want to run a round?  
Blow the whistle.  
Take control.  
Make someone else sweat for their juice.

Invent a punishment.  
Create a title.  
Crown a champion.  
Break them.

We start the pressure.  
You take it further.

Dana Hertz (Dana Banan aka me)  
WA - +972587635790

email - dana.ge17@gmail.com

buckets.title: Sober Tripping for Everyone
buckets.summary: A playful sober dream for kids, caregivers and curious humans: sensory illusions, size shifts and expectation hacks that alter perception without drugs for all.

customFields.value:
Sober Tripping is a playful, family-friendly dream about altered perception without substances. We want to create a curious little wonderland for kids, caregivers and everyone else: a space of gentle mindfucks, sensory surprises and expectation hacks. Think giant and tiny objects, mirrors and distortion boxes, wrong animal sounds, tastes that look like something else, warm drinks with fake ice, heavy pillows, light “bricks”, texture paths, sound triggers and small interactive experiments that make the familiar feel strange again.

This is not about escaping reality, but about noticing how flexible perception already is when we slow down, play and pay attention. The dream invites participation, laughter, wonder and co-creation across ages, with room for both high sensory play and softer, low-stimulation moments. Come get pleasantly confused, stay sober, and help us build a world where curiosity is the trip.

Yes — we’d love co-creation.

We’re looking for people who want to help craft some of the installations, props and sensory experiments, and for hands during setup of the dream on site. That could include building simple illusion pieces, painting and decorating, assembling objects, arranging the space, and helping make the dream feel playful, safe and welcoming for kids, caregivers and everyone else.

No special expertise is needed — curiosity, practical hands and a willingness to experiment are enough.

Sober Tripping is designed to be a gentle, family-friendly dream that co-exists well with its surroundings. It is low-risk in terms of sound and disruption: no loud bass, no aggressive sound design, and no strobe lighting. Most of the experience is based on playful visual illusions, tactile objects, strange scale shifts and small sensory interactions, so it can work well as a daytime or early evening dream. We would like to be placed near other calm, curious or family-friendly dreams rather than next to intense late-night sound camps. We’re happy to coordinate with neighbors during placement and setup, adjust sound levels and orientation if needed, and keep clear boundaries so the dream feels welcoming without spilling into nearby spaces. We also plan to include a softer, low-stimulation corner for participants who need a pause.
Kids camp maybe, not sure yet.
no
Possibly the safest dream out there: family-friendly, low-risk by design, and built with careful precautions, clear boundaries and participant wellbeing in mind.

We will begin striking the dream as soon as it closes and aim to remove it fully before leaving site. The setup is based on reusable, low-tech materials, so most elements can be dismantled by hand, packed out and taken home or reused. We will do a full MOOP sweep of the space, including small decorative items, tape, fabric scraps, zip ties, glitter-like materials and any tiny sensory props. We do not plan to use loose strass or anything likely to spread micro-trash, but if we do use small decorative elements they will be fixed securely and checked carefully during strike. Our goal is to leave the space cleaner than we found it.
Electricity is preferred but not required. A small amount of power would help with lighting, sound and a few interactive elements.

Viktoria Enkmann

+436648643860

viktoria@enkmann.at

buckets.title: SALT ROCK CITY 🧂
buckets.summary: We are addicts. To be precise: Salt addicts. Borderland’s first ever salt bar is coming back! Because an extra pinch of salt makes life worth living! 🧂

customFields.value:
The Goslings. We brought SALT ROCK CITY last year, and you showed us THE LOVE! We want to bring and gift so much more love, again, and in the currency of, well, SALT, obviously! (what did you expect??..)

We are the same addicts who brought you **COFFEE ADDICTS ANONYMOUS** ☕️ over the past few years!

We are a small-ish camp that plans this dream. We will cater to everyone, and invite you to our establishment during the BL, whether you are a salt addict or not.

### **We will have Emergency salt packets for all your explorations of Alversjo’s deep playa!**

SRC will address Salt addicts’ Fear Of Running Out (of salt), or FORO. It is a scary world out there, and food gifted anywhere on the playa, near or far, is more likely to have insufficient amount of salt!

We will help you regain control of your life, and salt levels, by handing out much needed, LNT appropriate salt packets to all of our salt addicts comrades and their baffled friends. For times of emergency, or just to quieten your FORO anxiety by a mere pinch or so.

### **_And voila! Now your food is worth eating!_**
Just a soundbox to play not so loud tunes at times. We could really do with a small speaker, but in reality, we have a soundbox 🤷🏻‍♀️
We are known for our superior LNT skills! We will leave our little territory unmarked and looking better than we found it. Because meow!

Each Borderlings is responsible for their own health at Salt Rock City. To help with that, we will provide blood pressure tests for our guests!

No safety issues or hazards otherwise.
Yes, max consumption of 2000w
Denya Blas

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:

We are participating in the pre-placement process, and currently in conversation with other camps and projects to create a plaza that gathers dreams and camps with similar vibes!

## Following last year's success, SALT ROCK CITY (SRC) is coming back to the Borderland! We learnt plenty about the common Borderling's salty needs, and following last year’s emergency salt supply and tasting provided by yours truly, and consumed by the lot of ya, we will provide for all your increased consumption of such , that left you begging for MORE.

We will make sure there’s plenty of salt for everyone to survive the Borderland and that no one gets dehydrated, but also medical personnel to check your blood pressure levels.

customFields.value:
# **Nyotaimori: The Hottest (and Coolest) Dining Experience You’ve Never Tried! �🔥**

Forget boring plates—**this is sushi with a side of sizzle!** Imagine the freshest, most buttery sashimi draped over a living, breathing work of art. That’s **Nyotaimori**—Japan’s most _intimate_ culinary tradition, where **your table isn’t just set… it’s _alive!_**

## **Why Just Eat When You Can _Feast_? 🎎🍣**

*   **Foodie Meets Performance Art** – Each bite is a delicate dance between flavor and presentation. (Pro tip: Chopstick control = _mandatory._ No accidental tickling!)
    
*   **Fresher Than Your Ex’s Apology** – Only the highest-grade fish makes the cut, because if it’s going on a human canvas, it better be _perfect._
    
*   **The Rules of Engagement (Yes, There Are Rules)** ✋🍱
    

✅ **Respect the Canvas** – This is _art_, not an all-you-can-eat buffet. Slow, deliberate bites only.  
✅ **Chopstick Jedi Skills Required** – Precision is key. (No spearing—this isn’t a kebab!)  
✅ **Temperature Matters** – Body heat keeps the fish _just right_, but don’t linger too long—sushi waits for no one!

We will also provide vegan alternatives!

buckets.title: The Mermaid Cabinet of Curiosities
buckets.summary: The Mermaid Cabinet is a Victorian-style installation where a live mermaid performs in a glass water tank on wheels, creating a surreal and intimate encounter

customFields.value: "The Mermaid Cabinet" is a traveling Victorian-style curiosity show featuring a living mermaid (me) inside a glass water tank mounted on a small trailer. Inspired by 19th century freak shows and maritime myths, the installation appears as a mysterious spectacle where participants encounter the creature through a glass window as she moves slowly through illuminated water, observing the audience as they observe her. What first appears as entertainment gradually becomes an intimate moment of curiosity and wonder. The installation combines performance, scenography, and myth-making to create a surreal maritime encounter "
Open to co-create with other circus inspired (or similar) dreams and camps
No camp yet

The installation will be fully dismantled after the event. The water tank will be drained responsibly, and all materials including structural elements, decorations, and equipment will be removed from the site.

The area will be thoroughly cleaned, ensuring no trace is left behind. Any small decorative elements or debris will be carefully collected. The goal is to leave the space in equal or better condition than it was found.
Minimal electricity needs. Power for underwater lighting and optional water heaters. Can operate on a small independent power source
No large sound system will be used. The installation may include low-volume ambient sound or no sound at all. All audio elements will remain subtle and respectful to nearby camps.

The installation is relatively compact and designed to coexist gently within its surroundings. It does not require a large footprint and can be placed in a location where small groups can gather without blocking pathways.

Sound levels are low and primarily consist of subtle ambient audio, minimizing disturbance to neighboring camps. The visual presence may attract participants, but the experience is calm and observational rather than loud or disruptive.

I am open to dialogue regarding placement and will coordinate with nearby camps if needed to ensure a respectful and balanced integration into the environment.
Teresa Eriksson, 0728797210, teresa\_eriksson@hotmail.com

buckets.title: The Warm Slug - Fires of Anarchy
buckets.summary: The magical yurt is back on Sunny Hill !!! The heat of chaos. The warm of connection. The freezing nights. This is the place to be late night and mornings.

customFields.value: The Warm Slug is not a single camp-project as such but is created by poly campers and free campers.

All Borderlings have at least once frozen terribly on the Swedish playa, searching and wandering around for a spot to unwind and be warm together, after or in between a party… Where is this cozy hangout space that actually is WARM during the evening, night, and early mornings?!

**Look no more!**

Forget about freezing in a hammock dome or space that was wonderful and even hot during the day but cold as ice as soon as the sun goes down.

**As the late night falls, The Warm Slug yurt will glow with magical music and lights, casting a colorful and mesmerizing aura that beckons Borderlings to step into its welcoming embrace**. Inside, the air is filled with the warmth of a crackling bonfire, creating a cozy haven where you can unwind and escape the stresses of daily burner life. Be a warm slug and watch the sunrise over the lake—just being, in silence, listening, or having cozy talks. And yes, be warm.

Expect rituals, shared warmth, and maybe even a little bit of playful fire chaos to keep the flames of connection alive throughout the night.

Reach out to us if you feel like engaging in the creation or co-hosting of this space!

We also call upon all sauna people, sacred fire angels, and fire-lovers—let’s co-create a big communal firewood pile together!

The yurt is also an ideal venue for hosting your workshops during the day and evening before midnight - get in touch.

The Warm Slug will be situated on The Hill, same place as last year, with a view of the lake. The placement is intentional—as The Slug comes alive in the very early hours, just before and during sunrise. With its open sides, it connects with the surrounding morning activities—sauna, swimming, mini golf, and more.

This is a chill space, not a loud party zone. Expect warm light, downtempo soundscapes, an indoor bonfire, tea, snacks, silly rituals, and playful nonsense during the night.
Chill and mellow sound category and play from 22-06 and on Friday afternoon we have a day party from 16-21 hand play a little louder to cater for all the peopel visitign the Hill that specific day.

Build: Some of us will arrive Wednesday during build week to help with general setup and put up the yurt. It will also be open for fellow builders to rest and warm up in the evenings.

• Strike: Everything will be taken down by Sunday/Monday after burn week.

Sound & light: 3x16 AMP

Tea, soup & everything else: 3x16 AMP
The yurt be will fireproofed and distance-regulated, and safety equipment will be installed and ready to use.

Troels Kolster

troelskolster@gmail.com
