buckets.title: The Altar of Spicy Secrets
buckets.summary: Slutty sisters, spicy drinks, and dirty secrets! We encourage sins and trade Bloody Marys for scandalous confessions.

customFields.value: We’re here to coexist in scandalous harmony with our neighbours. However, we must disclose that our presence acts as a spiritual catalyst. Due to our active encouragement of vice and vanity, neighbours should expect a minor, temporary surge in local transgressions.

Expect hushed gossip loud gasps & a shamebell. Low enough to avoid complaints from the Vatican, loud enough to drown your moral compass. Note: slutty nuns' mischief may cause occasional volume spikes.
At this altar, the only thing in danger is your dignity.
Powered by divine intervention alone. We require zero electricity, just the smoulder of incense and the spark of your darkest confessions.

This isn’t a place for quiet prayer. 

At this altar, sisters encourage and celebrate sins and offer spicy sacraments to wash down regrets.

Whether you believe in the immaculate conception or suspect “the virgin” Mary just got hammered, fucked the stable boy, and spun a dramatic miracle to cover her tracks, you are invited to step into our confession booth to trade your shame and scandals for a spicy Bloody Mary.

Our mission is simple: we harvest the scandals of the masses to fuel our own unholy agenda. We provide the heat, the spice, and the judgment; you bring the gossip. 

Be it a personal iniquity or a scandalous rumour about a friend, your confessions are our currency. Every transgression is logged to track the neighbourhood's moral decline in real-time. Remember: while God may forgive, the Sisters keep receipts. 

Whether you’re a virgin, a non-virgin, or a virgin with children, stumble over, confess your sins and toast to the woman who turned a walk of shame into a world religion.

While we possess the eternal holy spirit, we expect to find ourselves with a limited supply of the liquid kind.

We will provide as much vodka as our modest means allow, but we anticipate an inflation in sins due to our presence. We therefore invite the masses to co-create our sacraments by bringing gifts of vodka, a necessary sacrifice to keep the libations flowing.

Like any good scandalous night, we plan to leave no trace. Once the confessions are closed, we’ll scrub the site until it's as virginal as Mary’s reputation. No trash, no evidence. Just a holy, empty ground and the lingering mystery of where those two sisters went with all your dirty secrets.

Cecilia Stenlund whatsapp +46707737931  
Kerry Kane

buckets.title: ASS2ROID
buckets.summary: Asteroid mining operation with a mobile rover bar, brought to you by Milk+. We go deep. Rocky would fund this.

customFields.value: ASS2ROID is not a chill experience. We want to be very clear about that. We’re running a mining operation, and we need to repair our rover. If you want chill, there's probably an anal breathing hammock camp somewhere with gluten free herbal tea and good intentions. We have a drill, and pick axes, and Milk+, and also electrolytes because we actually care, which surprised us too (no, we're not the church of sodium either, but if you think this godforsaken interstellar rock is a secret garden we can't give you anything better than what you're already on)
The drill goes deep enough to mean something and not so deep that we need a permit. This is called knowing your limits and also basic legal awareness.

Karo Hallencreutz  
[hello@karohall.com](mailto:hello@karohall.com)

Adrian Petersen  
adrian.ib.p@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
38.6 kWh. Peak load 1390W.

We are, despite all available evidence to the contrary, a very reasonable camp. The check engine light was already on.
We operate at the exact decibel level of two people who watched Blade Runner at an impressionable age and never fully recovered. At least one of us has wet dreams about Aeon Flux.

All holes will be filled. Vigorously. We have shovels, pick axes, and also Milk+.

What we don't have is popcorn, as popcorn in zero G is a less than stellar idea. Glad you asked. It's a dispersal event. It's 847 individual projectiles achieving simultaneous autonomy. Moopy as fuck, if you ask us. We already crashed once due to space moop and also some other decisions and not due to popcorn, but we still advise against an interstellar kernel situation. We have pick axes, supplements, and also Milk+, and we seem to be doing fine without popcorn. They do make funny sounds though.

Come find the crash site. Follow the fumes of our hair bleach (platinum blonde, baby) to spot the rover. We are on this 'roid to stay and we need digging help. We have pick axes, supplements, and Milk+.

We’re two people who looked at the entire known universe and said: yeah but have you considered going slightly to the left of all of that and digging. This is called vision and also geology.

We have shovels, pick axes, and also Milk+. We don’t drink it for the taste. We've never asked what's in it as some questions are better left to the vast nothingness of space. We just feel better in approximately forty-five minutes.

Here's the honest truth, and we'll only say it once because we're not the begging type: mining this thing costs money. The rover doesn't run on palo santo fumes (we tried that twice) and Karolina’s boots alone are a significant financial commitment, however one does simply not wear thigh high platforms on craterous terrain without being a serious risk taker. Some holes are very expensive. This is called innuendo and it is also true.

**_Still don't understand what we're about? Watch the cinematic trailer here:_** [https://youtu.be/ely8NkiShm4](https://youtu.be/ely8NkiShm4)

ASS2ROID

**TLDR; We're a mining operation on the asteroid known as Korova Rock with a mobile roid bar serving supplements, electrolytes, and much more. We also have something that is technically an art house cinema (no, we’re not the cute galaxy movie popcorn camp). Imagine The Fifth Element if Luc Besson had made slightly worse decisions, which would have made it considerably better.**

budgetItems.description: Boiler (gas, one does simply not spike the electric grid)

1 kg of apple&lime flavored creatine (a shitload of it and it's sour as fuck and Adrian didn't like this particular purchase Karolina made but it does have a funky green color and we want to find out if it glows in the dark)

Excavator (full size) Stretch goal for full size excavator, it needs to be Volvo and needs to have flames on the chassis. This is a must. We are surveying auctions as we speak. The 700 000 SEK includes transport. PSA: We really don't want to reach this stretch goal as the logistics would be horrible, but we will commit to this acquisition if the stretch goal is met. At the end of BL 2026, if having reached this goal, we will donate the excavator to Alversjö.

One-day safety course in how to operate an excavator. This is not including VAT so probably a bit more. We pledge to follow the principle of Civic responsibility and therefore promise to look into whether Adrian needs to take an additional course in how to operate an excavator, beyond his regular driver's license. Safety third, and all that. Our union demands we take all necessary safety precautions and we are obviously very professional and serious about this mining operation and digging holes and such. We have pick axes, electrolytes, and Milk+. Safety third and all that.

## tldr;

So many of us have trouble talking to our fathers. I did too. A lot. So, I want to gift you the opportunity to have that talk, or just to tell them to fuck off.

Here, you answer a few questions, if you wish, to set the stage for our talk. [https://tinyurl.com/askyourdadanything](https://tinyurl.com/askyourdadanything).

The talk can be had where we arrange to meet or in my Tipi Tent (location follows)

You can also just text/Whatsapp +45 51 90 31 49 to book a time.  
  
Description

I am NOT crazy or, particularily, delusional but I have discovered something at the last few years:

I become a receptacle for, ah dunno, FATHER energies and have experienced now quite the number of times that I can stand in the place of the real, but distant, maybe more or less estranged, maybe dead or otherwise gone, father or older male relation.

And I want to give you the opportunity to have that talk, ask those questions or just to tell them to fuck right off.

I will be there for that and you can lighten your heart and not fear their reactions or the familys scorn. It will be a freebie. My gift.
This is a quiet and small space. Can set up most everywhere.
0 dB
Physically safe but be dilligent when contemplating the emotional impact. Tears are very often a part of our meeting and the whole gamut of human feelings and emotions can come along.

Marina and Linus (part of The Syndicated Eternal Dumpster Fire)

We met at the end of the burn in 2024 when Linus was looking for a ride back to Germany. Since then we live together in the Netherlands and have been collaborating on projects ever since!

Last year we created Chroma-synesthesia (Cro-sy) (as seen in the images). A great success!

Marina is a visual artist who builds colorful abstract sculptures out of wood, and Linus is a game developer. We complement each other’s skills and are passionate about creating new, exciting work together!

For whomever is curious: [https://www.instagram.com/marinamonism/?hl=en](https://www.instagram.com/marinamonism/?hl=en)

Cro-sy returns — bigger, stranger, and more inviting than before. Building on the audio-visual light installation that delighted audiences at the Borderland 2025, this second edition transforms into a full sculpture garden to wander through: a curated landscape of works past and present, all woven together by color, sound, motion and interactivity.

Instead of realizing two separate projects like last year (cro-sy + villa room - see last picture), we will focus all our energy to catapult one dream into orbit.

What's new in Part 2:

1.  Custom MIDI instrument: Not just a keyboard, but a sculpted instrument of buttons, knobs, and touch points, modulating sound and light in real time. You just need curiosity.
    
2.  Sound sculpting: The most requested feature, you will finally be able to edit and adapt sounds to your liking. Light change included free of charge!
    
3.  Sculpture garden: Collected works from previous years curated into a landscape to explore — instead of a single sculpture, we aim to create a bigger environment to discover.
    
4.  Interactive projection: TouchDesigner + Kinect + beamer: movement triggers and shapes an immersive projection layered within the installation space (a museum art-piece adapted for BL)
Marina Heuvelman: marinaheuvelman@gmail.com

customFields.value: Tea by the Sea

**Safe-tea:**

We are well-equipped with our own electrical hub and fire extinguishers. A designated Safety Lead will oversee the space to ensure our sanctuary remains as secure as it is welcoming.

**The final sip:**

We will begin our strike on Sunday, moving with the same intentionality we use to brew. As in previous years, every rug, pillow, and tea leaf will be cleared with care to ensure that the only thing we leave behind is the warmth of the memories shared.

customFields.value:
This is theatre. This is seduction. This is The Fuckery on stage.

Inspired by Arthur Schnitzler's _Dream Story_ — the same source material that gave us _Eyes Wide Shut_ — Fever Night is a melodramatic, sensual, darkly playful live performance staged on The Erotic Theatre.

The story: a shadowy secret cult. An innocent initiate. A young lover, desperate to save her from a fate worse than death. And somewhere in the candlelight — you.

Expect live music. Expect dramatic text drawn from seriously classic material, retold with a modern twist. Expect beautiful, barely-dressed performers, a hint of song, a whisper of dance — and a grand finale that blurs the line between stage and audience, launching the evening into its next, real-life chapter.

The Fuckery team takes the stage. You take your seat. And by the end — we're all part of the show.

Starting with the audience immersed into the world of the play, but in the safety of the spectator role. Ending with the audience invited to merge with the perfomers and start of the evenings play night.

buckets.summary: Have you ever felt curious about the inner sound of objects, water or your own touch? This interactive space can turn touch into music.

Myself, Manu (ramos.cacciatore@gmail.com)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: This dream is open to a co-creation and other ideas to make it more playful.

It would be great to locate this space to explore touch and sounds within an area of Borderland that might have also a creative and co-creative character, perhaps near other installations, or the space can also be accompany by similar dreams that require the interaction of visitors.
To make work the tech device, anyone can conect it to their phone as long as they have batery.

This dream comes from the need to explore human touch-based play. By using interactive technology, physical touch can be transformed into sound, creating a space for interaction where human connection becomes the source of music. (Sorry, this doesn’t sound fun at all, but in practice, it really is.)

In reality, this looks like an interactive space welcoming anyone who wants to explore sounds and melodies simply by touching other human. This is just the starting point. Once people in the interactieve space start playing, they will realise that anything they touch can produce melodies. It can also be touching water, a banana or any object they wear. It might take some time to connect the dots and cables, but once they get it, they wont get out of it.

In a nutsell, the dream is about group interaction, using contact to make music, accessible and playful for everyone.

### The Nest

Cozy and wild in equal measure, at Bambi's Whimsy World the Nest hosted late-night dancing, curious workshops, and mischief. **This year, it makes an appearance at the kids corner of Borderland!**

The Nest is no delicate structure. It laughs in the face of a Scandinavian summer storm and welcomes hanging installations and swings with open arms beneath its arching frame. Inside, 60m² of space invites bare feet, sprawling children, tired parents, storytelling circles, and the occasional chaotic dance party involving both toddlers and parents.

For Kidsville, the Nest becomes whatever the moment needs:

☀️ a shaded playground when the sun is fierce

🌬️ a cozy common room when the wind picks up

🎭 a stage for kid-led performances

🔨 a workshop space for building, making, and imagining

A place where grown-ups finally get to sit down, and kids finally get to take over.

\-

_The Nest has found its village. Come on in._

\-

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
## **Dive Back Into the Occult Oasis 2026 Edition**

The horizon is shimmering, the water is calling, and the blue burner creatures are stirring once more. Welcome back to the **Occult Oasis**. This year, we’ve distilled our dreams into two distinct, immersive day-party voyages.

Whether you’re seeking the deep roots of the earth or the brassy glitz of a forgotten era, the formula remains the same: **Big Pool. Hot Sauna. Enchanting Music.**

### **Poolparty 1: Jungle Dub**

_“The Roots of the Oasis”_

As the sun hits its zenith, the Oasis transforms into a humid, sonic sanctuary. We’re bringing the pulse of the rainforest to the poolside with **Deep Jungle Dub**.

Imagine heavy basslines echoing through the forest, intertwining with the splashing water like ancient vines. The air is thick with rhythm and BASS.

### **Poolparty 2: Jazzy Speakeasy**

_“30s Jazz & Neon Splash”_

Step through a portal to a reimagined past. We’re clashing the swing of the 1930s with the electricity of the future. Think **Gramophone-glitch, brassy melodies, and syncopated beats** that make the pool feel like a champagne bath.

Dust off your vintage swimwear, find your most eccentric goggles, and prepare for a high-society splash.

### Swim safe, splash smart, and party on!

Water will be pumped through a pre-filtration system and a sand filter will keep water clean. We will use natural pool treatments like hydrogen peroxide.

### Embrace the elements of WATER & FIRE

*   **Water:** Occult Oasis Pool Parties will take place near the lake and the pool will be filled with lake water through a clean water pump with a pre-filtration system to optimize hygiene and ensure health. In other words, the pool will be an extension of the beautiful nature - enabling us to party in the lake water on safe grounds!
    
*   **Fire:** The pool, sauna, and DJ tent will be decorated with the wonders of nature and a mix of mysterious things to create cool contrast between core, surface, and outer space. (no real fire)

### Your support will make wet dreams come true!

*   **Co-create pool parties:** Everyone is welcome to co-organise an Occult Oasis Pool Party at the venue - just write to us and we will welcome your ideas and creations and include you in the planning so your pool party dream can be realized!
    
*   **Co-create Aufguss:** In between water sessions, you can participate in or co-create aufguss sessions in the sauna!
    
*   **Create work shops or become a DJ:** Furthermore the venue will be open for work shops and if you wanna try out your DJ skills, contact us and we'll cross-check lineup possibilities with you!
We will Strike on Sunday and potentially keep it at ALversjö for next year. We are ready to bring back to Malmö if keeping the pool at Alversjö is not an option.

buckets.title: Njorunns Garden - LET THERE BE LIGHT 💫
buckets.summary: A Garden Oasis | DJ & Dance | Campfire hang-out | Workshop & event space

customFields.value: Njorunns Garden

Njorunns Garden is the magical grove of many possibilities at the heart of Borderlands downtown. Our vision is to create a welcoming space among the trees with flowers, fairy lights, a pavilion, a campfire, and PA, so that we are able to host everything from braiding workshops and song circles during the day to pre-parties and open decks for DJs during the evening. We also want to light up the wooden parts of this area, for a cozy ambience and improved visibility at night, and to keep building on the existing firepit, adding more(cozier) seating options.  
The stretch goal is to add lights to the nearby toilets as well!

We want this DOWN-TOWN to be LIT AF, ya dig?

In this space, we also want to invite others to create in our garden. If you have something to offer but no place to do it, you can talk to one of our Garden Hosts and use our garden for your activity, and we’ll put it in our schedule. Our vision is to capture the feeling of the perfect summer garden hangout, where new things happen every day.

Njorunns Garden is made for co-creation! We’ll host several activities in the garden, but leave a lot of space in our schedule for others. Mainly, we hope to provide a platform for all the talented people who have something to offer to Borderland, but not necessarily a venue to do it. The grove is perfect for activities that take place under the open sky, but we also have a cozy little pavilion for those that need a closed-off space or when the weather gods are in a bad mood.
Fire extinguishers for the campfire and a first aid kit are easily available. The organizers for each activity will be responsible for the safety of the activity.
We’ll bring a smallish PA, which we’ll mostly use during the evenings. Situated between Plutonia and The Church we will never be the loudest in the neighborhood, and we don’t want to.
We plan to stay until we remove everything, and aim to leave the place more beautiful than we found it.

Many of our lights will be solar-powered.

Total Dream lights: 600w

Total Soundstage: 1700w

Total: 2300w

Last year, we started clearing out an area among the trees close to the plaza, which hadn’t been in use, and created Njorunns Garden for the first time. We co-existed peacefully with the other places around us, and the response we received was very positive, due to the calming energy and serene spirit of our garden.

We are currently active in pre-placement to sync with upcoming, side-cumming, and downtown cumming camps.
HrmFellonia ( DC: hrmfellonia email hrm.fellonia@gmail.com )

customFields.value:
## Surrender into coziness

Beneath the Cosmic Portal (already funded by F33), a truly cozy hideaway unfolds — a soft, inviting landscape of mattresses, cushions, and warm blankets, layered like a gentle embrace.

This cozy resting place is more than just a place to lie down; it is a space to arrive, to sink in, to be held. Here, coziness becomes almost majestic — quiet, enveloping, and deeply soothing.

Above you, the vast circle of the Cosmic Portal glows and shifts, its light moving in slow, hypnotic waves, accompanied by music that feels like it’s drifting through time itself. As you rest in this cozy haven beneath it, you are invited to simply follow — the light, the sound, your breath.

Time blurs as the future fades and the past dissolves — you soften into cozy stillness, gently merging with the space, the light, and the quiet infinity of the cosmos.

## Location

In the Barn (attic), where it can be cold, Cosmic Coziness unfolds — blankets and soft layers gather warmth against the chill.

## Pancake evenings

On Thursday and Saturday, vegan pancakes will be served for cosmos wonderers — soft, golden offerings for those who dream beneath the Cosmic Portal.

This dream brings glowing rainbows into Lazy Camp's inner spaces: our cozy spots for chilling, winding down, or catching some sleep. They gently react to the sounds inside: voices, laughter, small moments. No amplified music, no recordings, just people being people. The rainbows answer back in light, with some softly moving up and down for extra jazz.

buckets.title: B.L.U.E Bureau of Logical Universal Enquiries
buckets.summary: Unlicensed detectives solving any cases badly. Join our questionable academy for absurd workshops, blue snacks, and the art of professional confusion.

customFields.value: Detectives in B.L.U.E

Living with us is easy, though slightly unpredictable. You might never truly know if you are currently under deep-cover investigation or if you simply accidentally enrolled in our latest training class. We coexist in a state of productive confusion.

Expect plenty of laughter and big revelations. We host two karaoke sessions, but keep noise to the daytime and evenings. We never interrupt sleep — detectives know when a strategic pause is mandatory.

We take MOOP as seriously as a murder mystery. We leave nothing behind. Our camp equipment isn't just "stuff"; it’s part of our burning repertoire and daily life. Our Dome is a collaboration with an NGO supporting refugees, who use it throughout the year — so your tarp donations will protect more than just our questionable detective work.

We will leave on the last day of the Burn, on Sunday.
We only require power for a few lights, a small sound system for karaoke, and our waffle and popcorn machines.
Our methods may be unsettling at times but with several psychologists and a doctor on board, we are ready for anything — from training-related injuries to an existential crisis over a lost clue

We don't just solve cases — we create them. Our entire Academy is a massive co-creation project, and we want you to expand our detectivehood. Whether you are a workshop host, a professional file-sorter, a dedicated problem-maker, or an expert in mixing blue drinks and eating popcorn — our doors and cases are open.

Wondering who else uses your toothbrush? Looking for that dance floor stranger? Dropped spaghetti and can’t face the MOOP officer? We are an experienced but unlicensed gang of detectives, ready to take on any case—and very likely never to solve it to your satisfaction.

Feeling curious? We’ve declared ourselves an academy. We lack recognition but don't lack self-confidence. In our questionable workshops, you’ll learn how to: Read tracks where there are none. Sneak around while everyone sees you. Eat popcorn without destroying evidence. Drink blue drinks to think better. Train your voice for dramatic revelations and hide from responsibility.

After one day, you’ll be a detective—or at least convinced you are.

Now for the problems: Rain exists. To survive, we need a WEATHERPROOF TARP.

Furthermore, a serious agency needs BLUE DRINKS, POPCORN AND WAFFLES. To supply these, we need unreasonably many ingredients.

Also we need a BLUE CARPET, CURTAINS, PILLOWS, and LIGHT to pretend we work at night. We don’t rest—we only pause strategically.

To look professional we’ll PAINT everything—chairs, bunnies, reality. Only when everything is the same color will we stop wondering why we started painting everything blue in the first place.
Piluci (discord #piluci) & EmiliaSo

buckets.title: Uphill Tumbleroll Race!
buckets.summary: The most hilarious sports moment in Borderland!

customFields.value: Löyhä Liitto

# Have you ever seen rocks rolling uphill? Well now's your chance - even to be one!

Borderland's first ever Uphill Tumbleroll Race was held on last year and the event was so joyous that a timekeeper signed in to this year's event right after the race was over! So welcome to set record times and cheer for the tumblerollers!

Because not everyone is used to doing somersaults and starts to get dizzy easily it's time to add beginners (and not sobers) series: **Uphill Kangaroo Hopping Ball Tamp!** Since the tumbleroll race does not require anything else than people and an uphill we need budget only for the kangaroo hopping balls.

**Uphill Tumbleroll Race in a nutshell:**  
Track: about 30 meters uphill.  
Method of progression: Continuous vertical rotation (forward somersault).  
Prohibited: "Log roll" (lateral rolling), crawling or running.  
Competition format depends on the amount of attendees.  
For competitors' safety it is not allowed to stand up during the run.

**Uphill Kangaroo Hopping Ball Tamp** uses the same track and the competitors must hop it all away to the finish line.

### Uphill Tumbleroll Race on Fri at 19:00 - specific location TBA!

buckets.title: Baba Korsi: the Return of the Collosal Korsi
buckets.summary: Do you hate having cold feet but love playing footsie? Make frost-bitten toes a thing of the past by letting us upgrade and repair 2024's favourite furniture.

customFields.value:
The Colossal Korsi will be repaired and upgraded by Camp Elsewhere, brought to Alversjö in pieces and put together during the first day of the burn-week. Co-creation during build/design is thus limited.

However, with the Korsi in place we see huge opportunities for co-creation and invite anyone with an idea of a workshop/event to contact us for further discussions. A round-table discussion? A strip poker tournament? A small talent-show with the Korsi acting as a stage? A heated meditative experience? A dirty-hippie-toe-sucking-workshop? We are interested in hearing your ideas of what a large, low, round and heated table could be used for!

The Persian [Korsi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Korsi) is a heated, low-table covered with blankets which families traditionally gather around during the harsh winters of northern and central Iran. The construction and operation of the Colossal Korsi in 2024 gave Borderland a unique communal space that literally fostered warmth and (bodily) connection. After a brief hiatus it is now getting prepared for a comeback. For this to be possible we need your support to finance necessary repairs and wished-for upgrades such as:

\-Strengthening of the structure, making it possible to snuggle not only under the Korsi but als on top of it.

\-More blankets, pillow and carpets giving the Korsi an even more Persian vibe.

\-A new electrical heater with a thermostat, keeping the temperature underneath the Korsi stable throughout day and night.

\-More lights and other decorations to make the Korsi space more inviting than ever.

The Korsi will form the center-piece of Elsewhere's main tent, a 40 sqm covered space adorned with colorful textiles, pillows, lights and decorations. During the day, the table will host a variety of events and workshops. As evening falls the heat will be turned on, transforming the space into a cozy refuge.
The Korsi will form the center-piece of Elsewhere's main tent. It will thus have a very limited effect on neighbours and surroundings.

During day-time low to medium sound levels are expected depending on type of activity/workshop.

During night-time low sound levels are expected, mainly consisting of conversation and ambient music.
Fire-safety will be of highest priority as we are planning to cover a heat source with textiles (Ei saa peittää!). This is however rather easily solved by e.g using an infrared heater.

The Korsi is designed for easy assembly/disassembly and is planned to spread warmth to Alversjö for many years to come. Dismounting will take place on the first day of strike. The structure is then transported to either Stockholm or Skåne where it will be in storage (or even use!) until next years burn.

Est. heated space: 4 m3

Est. need of heating: 60W/m3

Est. effect: 240W

Est. consumption: 0,24 kWh
Niels Pettersson Sandmark, niels@gmail.com/076-2476395

buckets.title: A.P.A (Anarcist Plutonia Attic)
buckets.summary: HQ and chill for anarchists and apocalypse survivors

customFields.value: Plutonia

The endless techno kept most survivors steady. Distracted. Contained.

\*_But not all._\*

A small group couldn’t process the collapse of their world through rhythm alone. The grief stayed. The anger grew louder. The past refused to dissolve. Only partying was not enough. They had to get real.

So they went deeper.

They had to talk about the rage in their hearts.

They had to face the monsters of their own past, and soon a forgotten corner, far back in the machine hall, the attic, came to life…

Up here in the dark, no issue was left unspoken. There was space for the grief, the anger, the fear, the political dissonances and the need for connection through difficult feelings.

\*_Up there, nothing is avoided._\*

\- Rage is expressed

\- Grief is held

\- Fear is spoken

\*_This is A.P.A._\*

Up in the A.P.A they trained their aim on dart boards with faces of their demons, holding each other through waves of shivering darkness, a return to the full spectrum of feeling.

To make the attic safe, we need to reinforce the floor, build walls, and a staircase. To make it chill, we need carpets, furniture, and decor.

And a printer for making custom dart boards…

\*

The Loft exists as a lounge and chill out-area. Sofas, Darts xx
We welcome ideas of audiovisual art, workshops, DJs, and all other co-creations. Please reach out to any of the leads.
Any and all Borderlings are welcome to share APA loft, and we will build a proper staircase for easy access.
The A.P.A Loft resides within the machine hall, which is soundproof, there is no sound pollution to neighbours. The room itself is soundproofed towards the stage for minimal sound pollution.
The sofas are designed to be easily rearranged and built with plastic pallets that can be kept for future use. Everything else will be removed and stored for BurnerBox possibilities.
We will use the same grid as the machine hall.
There will be a 6kg powder fire extinguisher and an emergency exit 1.2m wide. We are planning for fire-safe materials in all construction.
Discord: bjornene

This is some kind of body studio operating in a mining environment. The treatments performed here are not the problem. We did make an immaculate playlist that we named ALIENTATTOOPARLOR for ambiance.
ASS2ROID Dermal Impressions operates as a low-impact facility within the broader mining environment. Appointments require a minimal sound buffer from adjacent heavy machinery.
This procedure is performed by a licensed massage therapist. Dermal impressions fade within 48-72 hours under normal atmospheric conditions. Contraindications and informed consent will be documented.

We will send specimens off-world back to their native planet bearing marks of their encounter with the outer belt.  
Shuttle fees apply, check your local weather report for storms.
The Milk+ refrigeration is attributed to the main ASS2ROID operation.
The marks will fade. The experience will not.

This document certifies that the procedure most commonly known as dermal impressions (also known as suction scarification or xeno-body modification) has been inspected by a duly appointed officer of the Belt Mining Authority and found to meet or marginally exceed the minimum hygiene standards required for the professional application of vacuum-induced dermal impressions on consenting carbon-based lifeforms in a low-gravity mining environment. The Belt Mining Authority accepts no responsibility for lingering marks, existential reckonings, sudden interest in marine biology, or effects from the Milk+ consumed post-procedure. _The Belt Authority has reviewed the intake documentation and confirms that yes, they did in fact ask for it._

Ads may be:

*   hand-drawn (by you)

## **Designers**!

Want to help Mike churn out this crap? The pay is shit but the experience is invaluable.

\------

**T**his is not a joke. **You really can advertise with Mike Moe Money**. On his billboards and even on his body. Turn your obscurity into Borderland fame, bringing attendees, recognition and possibly even groupies/power/a place on the board. It worked for Mike.

### **How:**

Fame doesn't come free. This dream grant will unlikely achieve enough income to satisfy all the needs of all you wannabe advertisers.

**1\. Support this dream** with as much of your dream SEK as the system allows.

**2\. Leave a positive review** in the comments - remember to request a brochure and leave your contact details (or find me on Facebook).

3\. In the event of a funding shortfall, **additional costs for your advert will be met by the advertiser**. Now I don't want to charge you actual money (I will, but I don't want to), so you'd better get started granting me all your BL pretend dream grant money today!

4.  I'll take your cash, naturally. **What else can you offer Mike?** He's premium.

I was moved to see you bravely shake off that **“decommodification”** crap and proudly display your Nike shorts, Adidas hoodies & Durex condoms, your own bodies as advertising boards for the world’s hardest-working brands and their struggling sweatshops.

customFields.value: HYPERSTITION is all about reality fabrication, hyperreal phenomenon, and the spirit of the future. If these themes resonate reach out to @spiral\_virus on discord.
The Real Moon will live in distorting harmony with the Valley camps.

In the valley, among the trees, **a second moon quietly rises**: an illuminated floating form by artist Lekha Washington, known for her 2018 lunar installation at Burning Man.

For it's visit to HYPERSTITION, we are calling it _The Real Moon_.

The effect is hyperreal in the strictest sense: not a copy of nature, but a version that feels more convincing than nature itself. The sky above becomes background. This moon becomes reference.

**What unfolds is a subtle shift in perception: two moons existing at once.**

The installation doesn’t try to replace the moon. It simply asks: what happens when we make another one? What happens when light, scale, and belief are gently rearranged in the landscape we thought we already understood?

What happens when Borderland get a visit from the Real Moon?

Let's find out.

Realizers: Lekha Washington & Christopher Cantor.
This isn't_The Real Moon's first rodeo. We will stick to procedure to ensure it's just as safe as Burning Man 2018._
Very minimal impact on the grid.

The forest path is quiet for for just a moment — as you get closer to the end a series of tall brackets rise, framing the trail ahead, their edges glowing in slow washes of color. This marks the moment the forest walk ends and the adventure begins.  
  
Each bracket is built from custom metalwork sheathed in semi-translucent pipe, lit from within by LED strips that diffuse the light into a soft ethereal neon glow. The animated LED lights move down the line in sequence — pulsing, chasing, breathing and gently pulling you forward.  
  
Pass the threshold and ENTER THE VALLEY. One side is forest, the other side is whatever the valley has in store tonight.
independent

buckets.title: Leave No Trace Shower for Dirty Hippies
buckets.summary: I'm putting up a truly LNT shower for dirty hippies

customFields.value: Michael Barner-Rasmussen

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Water might have to be brought or assistance with fetching more water appreciated.

Whoever wants to help. But me and Alvilda got this <3

Last year I miserably failed at putting this gas heated gravity fed shower with organic soap and an organic so called root zone treatment plant to make this a true leave no trace shower, not even leaving delicious nutrient rich organic wash off from us dirty hippies behind as well as offsetting the carbon released by the gas used for heating..

The technical drawings are in the images to this dream.  
Last year the gravicty pump turned out to be too weak to drive the heater, but this year there'll be pumps at both ends and an actual scaffold to hold it, the water and the treatment facility for used water.

Note that the shower will be in the area (almost) furthest even the water and will be carried/brought to the intake tank physically using muscle (and scooter) power. The heater heats 6 l./minute so a 10 l water skin will suffice for a short shower.
Pumps are electrically powered but will preferably be solar operated. If that glitches, maybe 100W of fully carbon-offset grid power will be used.

Its a hippie shower. The idea is to not shield it other than maybe some wind protection.

So that the shower is truly LNT, Co-existing with nature, I'm bringing a small gas powered water heater and other paraphernelia and a grey water filtration 'plant' consisting of several connected buckets filled with filtration gravel, then sand, then bio-mass, and finally active coal. A small solar operated pump moves the water up to the top and then gravity would do the rets.

The project is looking into ways of offsetting all carbon use with a back-stop of simply buying some carbon credits for the modest carbon footprint that it will have.
TBD
Alvilda and I will pull it down and stow it for next year.
Other than getting cold and hot mixed up, none. The heater only heats water to about 50 degrees C. so no risk of burns.

buckets.title: The Borderland Very Special Olympics
buckets.summary: An immersive, interactive installation exploring altered states of perception, paradox, and self-awareness

customFields.value:
Inspired by cultural myth the project reimagines it as a physical and psychological journey where participants can safely explore disorientation, duality, and expanded awareness while remaining fully present.

At its core, it asks: what does it mean to lose yourself while staying conscious?

The Experience:  
Participants enter a sculptural environment developed by a Danish architect and his team. The space uses light, sound, and spatial design to create shifting perception.

Inside, participants move through stages of:

*   Spatial disorientation
    
*   Sensory paradoxes (loops, simultaneity, contradiction)
    
*   Moments of stillness and heightened awareness
    

The tone balances humor and introspection, moving between absurdity and reflection.

Workshops & Programming:  
Throughout the week, participatory events exploring consciousness and perception, including guided “lucid presence” journeys, talks on reality and awareness - and the playful flagship event "The Borderland Very Special Olympics" : a series of absurd, interactive challenges exploring coordination, presence, and paradox in a safe setting.

It is designed as a contained but permeable environment that integrates into its surroundings rather than isolating itself from them.

We are mindful that any strong sensory installation - especially one involving light, sound, and active participation - has the potential to affect nearby spaces. For that reason, the project will be built with clear boundaries for sound and light, ensuring that the intensity of the experience remains directed inward toward the installation itself.

We plan to use directional sound design and material insulation where possible to minimize sound leakage, and to position visual elements so they do not create unnecessary disturbance outside the space. The experience is intended to be immersive inside, but calm and non-intrusive outside.

We also see co-existence in a social sense: it's not a closed or exclusive environment, but part of the wider field of interactivity at the event. It invites curiosity rather than separation, and we expect it to become a shared reference point or meeting space rather than an isolated attraction.

If there are neighboring installations, we are open to coordination before and during the event to ensure mutual respect of sound levels, traffic flow, and audience overlap. We are fully willing to adjust timing, intensity, or layout if needed.

In short, ity is built to coexist responsibly: intense within its boundaries, considerate beyond them, and collaborative with its surroundings.
This is a core design principle, not an afterthought. We're fully aware that the installation plays with perception and sensory input, and we take responsibility for ensuring physical safety.
No, we are not bringing a sound system over 1000W and do not consider ourselves a sound camp. Sound is used as a subtle, spatial and directional element rather than high-volume output.
# **Consciousness Playground**
Yes, grid power needed (~1–2 kW). Used for low-energy lighting, small sound + interaction. We keep it safe, efficient and minimal.
Munir Avn, +45 31 77 72 92

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
It will be fully dismantled immediately after the end of the festival.

We will begin the strike directly when the event closes, working in a coordinated team to ensure a fast and structured teardown. The process will be organized in reverse of the build: first removing interactive and loose elements, then lighting and technical systems, followed by structural components.

All materials will be sorted on site into reusable, recyclable, and waste categories. Wherever possible, we will prioritize reuse of wood, fabric, and technical equipment for future projects or return into circulation. Any remaining waste will be carefully collected to ensure the area is left clean and undisturbed.

We aim not only to leave no trace, but to leave the space better organized than we found it, with special attention to removing even small fragments, decorations, or “stray matter” from the installation.

The crew responsible for build will also be responsible for strike, ensuring full ownership of the process from creation to removal.

Yes, it is fundamentally a co-created space.

We are not building a finished artwork that participants observe, but an evolving environment that is shaped by everyone who enters it. We are looking for co-creation on multiple levels:

**1\. Participants as co-authors**  
Visitors will be invited to actively shape the experience inside the installation through movement, interaction, and improvisation. The space is designed to respond to behavior rather than dictate it, meaning each group will create their own version.

**2\. Workshop co-creation**  
We are open to collaborators, facilitators, and participants proposing and hosting their own workshops within the space during the week. This includes discussions, embodied practices, experiments with perception, or playful collective exercises.

**3\. Evolving structure**  
The installation itself is designed to be adaptable. Based on how people use it during the event, we expect the space to shift, be reinterpreted, and potentially reconfigured throughout the week.

**4\. Creative input from builders and collaborators**  
We are actively inviting input from architects, designers, sound artists, and volunteers during both the build and the event. The project is shaped as much by those constructing it as by those experiencing it.

In short, it only works if it is shared. It is not a fixed idea - it is a framework for collective exploration of perception, humor, and consciousness.

buckets.title: The Blackwater Proxy Division, Borderland
buckets.summary: Cultural influence through deniable agents & proxy-camps, and control of essential infrastructure

customFields.value: The Blackwater Congressional Funding Committe

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: The Blackwater Proxy Division will, by nature, heavily influence Borderland - but in ways that are unnoticeable.
0 db
Safety will be a factor in decision making, but potential political gains will take priority.
Quietly and effectively.
Our power consumption is included in other dreams and camps.

The BPD is a decentralized system for shaping culture at Borderland through embedded, deniable assets. Instead of direct control, it builds networks of individuals, camps, and **essential services** that appear independent but influence how Borderland functions to produce outcomes aligned with Blackwater's political and strategic goals.

**Proxy Individuals** operate as participants—artists, organizers, or connectors—who naturally steer conversations, collaborations, and decisions.

**Proxy Camps** act as cultural hubs. For example, a well-placed sound camp with reliable power becomes a nightly gathering point, setting music trends and social norms. A service camp offering shade, food, or workshops attracts key networks and information.

**Proxy Realities** focus on infrastructure control:  
Who gets prime placement near high traffic areas, which camps have stable power, where toilets are located, and how logistics flow. A camp with power and nearby sanitation thrives; one without quietly disappears. By shaping these conditions, the Division influences where people go, who succeeds, and what becomes culturally central.

The result is indirect but reliable control: behavior follows what is accessible, functional, and attractive.
\>CLASSIFIED<
Blackwater Operations

buckets.title: My little Pony Party 🌈🦄🥇🎉

customFields.value: End of the Rainbow

At the border of imagination and reality, lies the End of the Rainbow — a camp dedicated to play, transformation, and freedom of expression. Our dream is to host a fully immersive My Little Pony–inspired party, where participants step into a world of unicorns/ponies and their riders, exploring connection, trust, and playful power dynamics in a safe, creative space.

The evening begins with our signature workshop: “How to Train Your Unicorn.” This guided experience invites participants to embody unicorn or rider. We´ll provide costumes for bringing the fantasy to life. Through structured play, consent-based interaction, and humor, we explore leadership, surrender, communication, and trust.

As it unfolds, and riders/unicorns learn to move together, it all opens into a lively arena. Putting on a spectacular Pony Show (with prizes), and a playful jousting tournament. Think pool noodles, tumbling, cheering crowds, and over-the-top theatrics — it’s about spectacle and shared joy.

The night crescendos in a Unicorn/Pony Parade, where all participants roam the playa together in a celebration of connection, absurdity, and radical self-expression. It all ends at the End of the Rainbow, with an epic Pony Party, a s3x positive event (18+).
It will co exist fine with most, just NOT KID FRIENDLY. When we know our neighbors we will talk with them about the party etc.

buckets.title: HEAVENLY DINNER
buckets.summary:
It all begins when we gather around a beautifully decorated table with delicious food to make you drawl. (depending on the budget :)

How will it end? Find out!

customFields.value: Sacred Kink
we might need electricity to cook or prepare some foods, but we could do without :D

It all begins when we gather around a fancy beautifully decorated table with delicious food curatedly placed to make you drawl.

The dinner guests will be guided through a series of novel ways to experience the act of feeding and being fed, and other ways of interacting with food.

As the dinner progresses, you may find yourself using a human plate or human cutlery, having your arms and feet restricted of movement.

The feast will will slowly transform into the messy food fight you have always dreamed of <3

As you have already probably guessed by this description there is a big possibility of clothes being stained, and we absolutely don't want you to ruin that beautiful outfit in which you came in. So you will be not be forced to keep on your pretty clothes and will be welcome to remove them, however due to the nature of the play for hygiene and safety reasons we would ask you to keep your bottom underwear.

No body fluids should be in contact with the food, so no spiting, vomiting, peeing or defecating in the worksop area. Bottom underwear must be kept. Fire will be appropriately handled. Consent is key!

We have taught to run this dream outdoors, because of the nature of the dream (its messy and we don't want to bother anyone)

It would be best to be in an intimate and hidden space so people can be comfortable being naked.  
  
Additionally a location where we have access to a fire place is ideal.

As there will be food remains, we have thought of disposing this organic material in a fireplace, where we will do a cleansing ceremony honoring the pleasure and joy and all the wonderful emotions and feelings associated with food that this remaining ingredients have brought to us.

To create the dream we need you to participate and also we will need help creating and cleaning the dream.  
For example:  
\-Cooking Staff (help out from the beginning and bond)

\-Decorators and builders of the space

\-Event Servers /Servants( you will answer to the mistresses of the event)

\-Cleaners (you might love to roll around in as nasty foods as your thoughts, so maybe come help us clean and you will make two dreams come true)

\-Guests that are willing to explore and let there inhibitions in their tent

\-Fire place builders

Ideas are welcome and if you have a specific dream that you think we could mesh, contact us!

buckets.title: Babes of Baghdad
buckets.summary: The Babes of Baghdad represent the voiceless and invisible elements in our society.

customFields.value: None

Very safe. Burqas may be flammable and will be kept away from fire.
Benjamin Bensson - benjaminbensson@proton.me

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: The project does not produce sound. If and when it disturbs its environment, it will be with purpose.
This project is by nature spontaneously interactive with other dreams.

The Babes of Baghdad are a team of nondescript individuals bringing a much needed measure of cheeky pranks and/or tasteful political awareness to the fields of the Borderland.

Their anonymity represents the presence and force of unheard and unseen (often female) voices in societies around the world - and in ours.

The Babes of Baghdad do not speak, for they have not been given permission - but you will see their actions speak louder than all those voices whose self-proclaimed right to dominance grants them space in the heard, seen, and explicit.

Practically speaking, the plan is to buy 5 pieces of authentic Burqas, in order to give the babes their proper attire and so make their mission(s) possible.

Qualitatively speaking, the idea is to utilize the presence of an extremely powerful symbol, extremely opposite to the surrounding environment, in order to give some perspective onto the often underappreciated lavishness and freedom that the visitors of the Borderland enjoy during the week - and hopefully lead to an increased awareness both of the oppression which is rife in our world, and of our luckily being spared it. Beyond, of course, the purely humorous element.

buckets.title: Let There be (the (b)right) Light!
buckets.summary: In the beginning, God created the city. Darkness covered the city. God said, “Let there be Light,” and the city was lit.

customFields.value: Plutonia
We will take it down and take it back home to create even bigger project next year.

This is a 2.5 × 2.5 × 2.5 meter light installation exploring spatial perception and three-dimensional visual effects.

The work transforms a simple cubic structure into a volumetric field of light, composed of thousands of illuminated spheres. Each point acts as an individual pixel within a larger system, enabling dynamic compositions and shifting visual experiences. Rather than functioning as a conventional light artwork, the piece operates as a three-dimensional pixel matrix, where patterns, depth, and movement emerge through programmed light behavior.

The intention is to create an environment that invites exploration of form, perception, and interaction within a digitally constructed space.

buckets.title: Label your Love!
buckets.summary:
Ever heard the cry of a lost beloved thing in the early morning fog?

That quiet whimper from the forest thicket. A nameless thing. No way home.

customFields.value:
Build and strike within a co-location is done in minutes.  
We leave no traces.
hefegruenenwald@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Some background sound, but by no means high levels.

Have you ever heard it? That heartbreaking cry in the early morning hours — when the mystical fog rolls across the silent scene and something small, something _yours_, is calling out from the darkness?

The quiet whimper of a tote bag, lost in the thicket of the forest. A nameless cup, wandering without purpose, without identity, without hope — too proud to ask for directions, too lost to find its way home.

We prevent heartbreak.

**Tag Your Stuff and Save the Planet (and Your Cup)** is a sacred labelling service with an unshakeable belief that no beloved object should be nameless. Even if _you_, you hopeless, reckless creature, left it behind in a moment of blissful chaos — fear not.

You shall walk, head bowed in humble pilgrimage, to the Temple of the Holy _Lostus Foundatus_. And there — gleaming softly under the morning light — your beloved item awaits. Your name shimmers upon it, golden, steadfast, undeniable. A custom vinyl label, placed in a moment of wisdom before the night took you.

You will raise your arms. You will cry out: _Heureka._  
And the fog will lift. And the cup will come home.

Swing by, get creative, print your label and stick it on everything you love — you will lose it anyway, but you'll find it again.
None safety measures needed.
1 powerstrip 220V

We're looking for a covered space to setup up our labeling service (cutting plotter, laminator, label printer, laptop, etc).

customFields.value: _Ishare Deity of the binding oath_

YES! Co-creation is key! Without it, Ishara is only a light sculpture to light up the Playa. But as a fully equipped performance stage it gives room to DJ’s, theme parties and ceremonies. You can reach out and adopt Ishara and her crew for your magnificent idea. Don’t hesitate to reach out

Morgane (she/her): morganepatris@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
_Ishara is a moving art piece, an art car, a light sculpture and performance stage. With a small car as its base, equipped with a giant tail, and pinchers on the side and fully painted as a scorpion, it makes an impact. With lights, sound system and a smoke machine it becomes the stage for any event imaginable. In that sense it’s a collaborative art piece._

_The concept was dreamt up in the desert while being surrounded by deadly scorpions and transcending music vibrations. A moment where fear took over for a moment before we realized that fear is there to embrace, reflect on and to overcome. This is our binding oath to you. It is meant for you to feel free and motivates you to overcome your fears. To not only dream but get inspired to act and overcome._

Our dream consists in finishing Ishara (welding, painting, assembling), driving it from the Netherlands (Utrecht) to Borderland (2720 km round trip) and bringing this deity scorpion to life in the Sweden forest through collective efforts and creativity.
_Ishara is a deity, with all the absence of discretion is entails. She will be loud, she will be heard! But she will cater for your deeper desires, from soft cuddling tunes to pumping beats._
_Ishara is autonomous with its generator onboard. While stationary, she prefers to be plugged into the grid for better performance and sustainability_

buckets.title: The Pit
buckets.summary:
Tired of workshops filled with love & light and endless eye-gazing ?

When was the last time you looked into the abyss?

customFields.value: Daniel Nilsson: hunternilsson@hotmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: This camp is easy to set up and remove. Strike will be commensed during Saturday.

**Tired of workshops filled with love & light and endless eye-gazing ?**

When was the last time you looked into the abyss?

**Welcome to The Pit.**

Somewhere deep in the forest—and deeper within yourself—we step away from the blinking lights and the blip-blop music. Here, we turn toward what’s usually avoided.

This is a space for the hidden.  
The forbidden.  
The feelings you’d rather not touch—but need to.

At its core, The Pit is about descent… and release.

You don’t come here to feel good.  
You come here to feel _true_.

And maybe—only after moving through the mud, the gunk, the mess—you’ll leave lighter. Clearer. Emptier in the right way.

If you feel comfortable and at home here,  
you’re probably doing it wrong.

So…

come down.
The Shamans

buckets.title: Ångström - Sound & Light - Open Stage
buckets.summary: A audiophile-grade sound stage and dancefloor, lights, projections and laser, holographic visuals. Open stage for live acts and scheduled artists/DJs.

customFields.value: Maybe a Camp

Yes — actively wanted. Looking for: VJs and projection artists who want to collaborate (need to coordinate, reach out before late), camps or **dreamers wanting to co-create the chill-out pockets around the dancefloor.** Live performers and vocalists welcome through the walk-up program. **Contact on Discord:** neoncortex\_

Teardown begins monday morning. Items purchased with grant funds inventoried, photographed, and handed to designated caretakers for storage and reuse at future burns and by other dreams. Full MOOP sweep of stage footprint and surroundings.

Main-stage loud within dB limit; scales down near curfew.

**Rig:** PA: 4-8× 18" subs, 4-6 tops, 14 kW amplification, DSP. FOH dB meter, soft ceiling −3 dB. Trialing active noise cancelling outdoors.

We're a loud sound camp during permitted hours, so placement is critical. We will coordinate with the placement and sound leads and accept their call without argument. We commit to: respecting all sound curfews to the minute, respecting the dB ceiling, using monitors and fills to distribute coverage rather than cranking the master, killing the rig immediately if a neighbour or safety lead asks, and being good neighbours throughout. Quieter ambient programming during transition hours into and out of curfew.  
  
**We are also experimenting with noise cancellation for outdoor events!**
No flame, no pyro. Lasers above eye level, ILDA-trained crew. Wire-tensioned covers, ballasted. RCD-protected power. Extinguisher, first-aid, free earplugs at booth. Untreated wood only.
Peak 11 kW (TBC), 16A 3-phase CEE with own RCD breakout. Coordinating with power lead.
Tim Gremalm. Reachable via Discord. @TimGremalm

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
**Ångström is a music stage built on the love for music, light and sound. We believe that sound quality matters more than volume and that light shows should leave an impression.**

Step in to Ångström and experience ambient journeys and live performances that sends shivers down you spine — whether you're dancing, listening, or creating. Come as you are. Stay as long as it feels right.  
Here, every frequency is felt, every beam of light is shaped, and every moment invites you to slow down, drift, and connect.

One ångström is the wavelength scale of visible light — a small promise to treat sound and light with the precision they deserve.

**Stage:** Stage with projection mapping structures, large dancefloor with partial rain cover, decorated chill-out pockets **(open to co-creation).**

**Lights:** Projection mapping using projectors, RGB Laser, PARs, blinders, fog. **_Interactive_** _and_ **_environment reactive_** _elements to the projections and other lights are in development._

**Program:** Afternoon to curfew. Time dedicated to chill out when suitable, live ambient jamming. A significant portion every day are 1-hour walk-up slots — in-person signup. Discord if in advance. Electronic, live, vocals, experimental welcome.

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Somewhere on Borderland, there is a small station. In it, there is a walkie-talkie.

You pick it up. You press the button. And then — live, unfiltered, with the particular audio quality of a device designed for construction sites and children's birthday parties — the Fuckery comes to you.

One walkie-talkie lives inside the Fuckery tent, and can be used by horny people to broadcast horny sounds to the station. The other lives at a small, unassuming station somewhere else entirely on the Borderland grounds. The location is chosen with care. The juxtaposition is the piece.

What you hear is entirely dependent on when you pick it up. It might be bass and laughter. It might be sounds of asscheeks being pounded. It might be something that makes you put it down immediately. It might be a very calm person giving what sounds like a instructional talk about something you didn't expect to be learning about while standing where you are. It will always be real. Never curated. The Fuckery doesn't do curation.

**In this sauna you are offered a sauna ritual inspired by Lithuanian sauna tradition where a** (self appointed) **bath master serve guests that just have to lay down to enjoy the experience getting scrubbed, birched etc.**

The ritual is divided into four parts, one for each season. Starting soft with the winter, increasing the intensity during spring, including a salt scrub. The summer is the most intense part with lots of steam and whisking. The ritual ends with the fall where things get more soft again with a good cleaning and honey for your skin. Between each round there is a **pause to cool down**. The full experience **takes about an hour**.

**At most two people** can enjoy this at a time, so you have to book a session.

This event is best enjoyed nude and your body will be whisked, scrubbed etc. The session will start with a check-in talk about what is about to happen and talk about consent. Each session will be tweaked for the persons that show up.

WHAT WE'RE BUILDING

The three elements of this funding request are what make that possible. Tent, transport and tables

THE STRETCH TENT — The Heart & Pulse (primary cost)

The centrepiece of Camp MMMM is a beautiful 10×10 metre stretch tent With its flowing organic canopy and open sides, it creates an atmosphere unlike any traditional structure — fluid, alive, and deeply welcoming.

It will hold: live Medicine music, sound journeys, Movement , dance sessions , Mindfulness embodiment practice , Spontaneous gatherings and late-night magic.

This request carries deep personal meaning. With roots in South African, and over 2 decades of experience as an Africa Burner. The stretch tent is an iconic feature of African festival and gathering culture — a structure that has held ceremony, celebration and community across the continent for as long as I can remember. It is the kind of space that makes people exhale the moment they step inside.

Bringing this to Borderland is more than an aesthetic choice. It is an act of cultural offering — a way of gifting this community something from another land, another tradition of gathering, another way of being together under an open sky.

buckets.title: Pink Parachute
buckets.summary: After a break in 2025, your fave sparkly Pink Parachute returns with more glorious day parties, playful mischief, and the legendary Friday Sunset Soirée!

customFields.value: Pink Parachute

We have two strike leads and a two-phase strike plan:

**Phase 1** will begin the **afternoon of Sunday, July 26**. We anticipate 15-20 of our 26 members will be present for this phase, which is when most of the big stuff will get done.

**Phase 2** will take place on **Monday, July 27**. At least 10 camp members have committed to staying through Tuesday morning to complete strike.

Build leads are among the 10 remaining through the end of strike to expedite the process and serve as moop leads for the final moop sweep.

Moreover, our large structures and amenities (shelter, kitchen, DJ booth, furniture, bar) are simple to tear down and store in our on-site container.

Finally, the phase 2 strike team has a **combined experience of over 65 burns** (including lead roles in 12 Nevada regionals 😉), so we should be in good shape.

Pink Parachute is a community of 👩‍🎨 artists, 🤡 clowns, 🌈 queerdos, 🔊DJs, 🎭 puppeteers, 🥒 pickleback-slappers, 👩‍🔬 scientists, 💃 dancers, 👩‍🎤 designers, and 🛠️ builders working to bring glorious **day parties**, **playful mischief**, and **strange silliness** to The Borderland.

...

📍 You'll find us somewhere on the Big Field (Lowlands) collaborating with delightful neighbors on creating cute Plaza vibes.

...

💕 🪂🥂 Recognize us by our lovely **Pink Parachute** and our soft, safe approach to hedonism!

### **Plaza Happenings**

Following on from our experience with co-creating on the Lemon Plaza in 2023 and 2024, we'll once again work with our neighbors to bring you the best that Borderland has to offer.

Pre-Placement has only just launched for 2026, but in the past we've cooked up mischief with the Grateful Grogg, Salon Leobard, Sweet Spot, House of Peacock, CB Port, the Plastix, the Freeking Birds, and others!

### **Workshops, DJs, Events**

We also invite Camps and Borderlings who feel the pink sparkly vibe but don't necessarily live in the neighborhood to get in touch about collaboration possibilities:

We welcome:

🔊🔊🔊 DJs

✨ 🕺✨ Pop-up experiences during our parties

🌿🧙‍♀️🤡 Creative projects/workshops/interactive fun on our non-party days (Tuesday and Thursday)

🔮🔮🔮 Whatever else you might imagine!

### **Apply here:**

https://forms.gle/AapcGAwHdwVRbFqz8

### **A Neighborhood Ethic**

Just as we did in 2023 and 2024, Pink Parachute will take an active role on Discord in pre-placement discussions around the neighborhood plaza, not only for collectively imagining delightful happenings, but also to ensure neighborhood harmony.

As a sound camp (even if a relatively small one), we pride ourselves on communicating our sound intentions with neighboring camps and ensuring those intentions aren't going to cause stress or discomfort. We'll also work proactively to prevent clashing sounds and sonic overwhelm if other soundcamps join the area.

Finally, our pre-placement discussions on Discord have also been about creating the best possible public space on the plaza, from camp "curb appeal" to the arrangement and mix of offerings in the space.

**Sound**

Total: 5200 W, pointed at hill

**Schedule**

2-3 Day Parties, 1300-1900

Friday Evening Party, 2000-0200

Our safety inspections always receive A+ marks :)

✅ Electrician leading power & safety

✅ Camp structure engineer-approved

✅ Awareness team at all paries

buckets.title: Le Bistro Français
buckets.summary: A corner of Paris in the woods — wine, peanuts, and the art of l’Apéro.

customFields.value:
We are a “relatively” calm, low-footprint neighbour for most of the day. The bistro operates during daytime and early evening hours, winding down as the night deepens and the louder parts of Borderland come alive.

Our usual sound footprint is conversational: ambient chatter, guinguette music at comfortable background levels, and the occasional sound of someone really committing to a pétanque argument.

Once per day, we fire **_l'Heure Heureuse_** (happy hour): the music shifts to techno for an hour, the sparkling wine pops out, and the volume goes up a notch. This is brief, joyful, and at a fixed time.

We are active in the pre-placement process and want to take part in a plaza and a fun neighborhood!

Le Bistro Français runs on people; we're open to collaborating with other camps and want to take part in a plaza: if you make music, art, or anything that pairs well with wine or France, let's talk.

Drop by, introduce yourself, or reach out beforehand to get involved.

Everything that comes in, goes out. The tent is a standard party tent that packs down flat. The bar will be disassembled into planks. Tables and chairs fold flat. Decor fits in a bag.

We aim to have the site fully cleared and Leave No Trace compliant on Sunday.

\*_Normal hours_\* — low, ambient music and chatter

\*_L'Heure Heureuse_\* — techno music with the volume raised for a party atmosphere for about an hour early evening.

No significant safety hazards. We serve drinks and snacks only — no fire involved in running the bistro.

Food safety: snacks will be kept sealed until serving and stored in a clean, dry place.

Medium:

\- LED string lights

\- Sound system (small to medium)

\- A fridge to keep the wine cool (especially white and bubbles)

Pierre:

*   pierre.killy@gmail.com
    
*   \_killich\_ on Discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Le Bistro Français

You hear it before you see it: The guinguette music and the murmur of conversation in French.

Then you round the corner, and there it is: Le Bistro Français. A blue tent tucked into the landscape, strung with warm lights, its open side facing the world like an invitation. Chalk promises scrawled in looping handwriting. A tricolour flag bunting catches the breeze. A long wooden bar inside where someone in a black apron and a white shirt — très chic — is welcoming you with a warm smile and a heavy French accent.

Le Bistro Français is a gift from a group of French friends to the Borderland community. The wine is real. The atmosphere is authentic. The peanuts and olives are exactly as described. Come for five minutes, stay for two hours, always leave with a new friend.

Then, once a day, something shifts. The guinguette fades. A different beat takes over. The sparkling wine pops out. Welcome to **_l'Heure Heureuse_** — our happy hour — where the bistro loses its mind, the tempo goes up, and the whole neighbourhood is invited to celebrate absolutely nothing in particular.

**_Bienvenue_**_.  
(The image is AI-generated - the people are not real)_

buckets.title: Quantum Photo Booth!
buckets.summary: Embrace your alien identities! See what your friends look like when they are "unobserved"!

customFields.value: HYPERSTITION

Paul Yance @paul5344 on Discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: This dream is a place for interaction and altered experiences. We will be keep it classy and make sure it's a good time to distort reality for those around us!
Safe, non-invasive perceptual illusion. May feel briefly disorienting. Participation is voluntary; step out anytime. No flashing lights or data storage. Guidance provided for sensitive participants.
This dream will have minimal impact and will be responsibly striked.

Step into a photo booth that refuses to show you what you think you look like.

Inspired by the eerie “Flashed Face Distortion Effect,” this installation turns your friends into something… other. Sit across from someone and try to observe them but the moment you look directly, the truth slips away. Only in your peripheral vision do their features stretch, warp, and reveal a stranger beneath the surface.

Using subtle eye-tracking, the booth ensures you never quite catch the image head-on. What you _do_ see is unstable, uncanny, and strangely revealing like glimpsing an alternate version of the person in front of you.

Laugh, flinch, and compare notes: did you see the same thing? Probably not.

This is a game of perception, misperception, and playful identity collapse. Come discover how weird your friends really are when no one is “looking” and maybe embrace your own alien form along the way.

Check it out:

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VT9i99D\_9gI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VT9i99D_9gI)  
  
Read THE SCIENCE:

Tangen, J. M., Murphy, S. C., & Thompson, M. B. (2011). Flashed face distortion effect: Grotesque faces from relative spaces. Perception, 40, 628-630 doi:10.1068/p6968

buckets.title: The Void
buckets.summary: Ready to step into infinity? Once you enter The Void you might never get out...

customFields.value: Yes please! Maximum draw of the installation is 2965W, (though much less in reality). A single 16A feed is required. All connections are IP68

We love co-creating and are always looking to collaborate! Carpenters, sound designers, programmers, or anyone else who wants to lend a hand with the build are welcome, and we'd love to help other artists wherever we can.
_The Void_ contains two 150W passive speakers and a 300W sub which are fully enclosed within the structure. The installation is also heavily insulated and very little sound escapes.
Mains electrical components are IP68 rated, and all electrics are enclosed. Interactive electrics are low voltage and protected by fuses and breakers. The structure is free-standing and very stable.

_The Void_ is a heavy, standalone structure, and for safety reasons needs to be placed on relatively level ground, which we can then create a level foundation with blocks and wedges, without damaging the grass. A relatively quiet spot would be best due to the internal soundscape, though not too far out of the way as the box is quite a striking visual spectacle during the day. It needs a 5x5m footprint.

_The Void_ will arrive and leave in a van, and as it's raised off the ground on blocks very little grass will be disturbed. The installation does not produce MOOP and any screws, fixings etc will be collected during the strike process.
Gabriel Finn (Discord: waxing.gibbous)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Step inside _The Void_ — a shimmering silver cube that seems to have slipped through a crack in reality and landed at The Borderlands.

It's mirrored exterior blends seamlessly into the landscape, but open the door, and you’re pulled into an infinite mirrored world of light, sound, and sensation. Suspended all around you, glowing orbs form a living grid you can walk through, as shifting waves of light ripple and pulse in three dimensions. The space breathes, flickers, and transforms—drawing you deeper with an immersive soundtrack that wraps around you from every angle.

Built from reclaimed materials and fresh from Burning Nest and Nowhere, _The Void_ returns bigger, bolder, and more mesmerising than ever.

Whether you’re seeking a moment of calm, a spark of wonder, or a full-on mind-bending experience, _The Void_ invites you to step inside… although you might find more than you bargained for within!

### Transport

This is a pre-existing artwork which has been to several burns before. Apart from minor improvements, the majority of the funding requested is to transport it from the UK, which we'd be unable to afford otherwise. We have deducted personal transport costs, and are considering storing it on site for use in future years.

buckets.title: Noise Cancellation 💗🔊 by the S.O.U.N.D. team
buckets.summary: Want to help block loud noise but don’t know how? Put your money in S.O.U.N.D. to fund more noise cancellation gear!

customFields.value: Exactly! This dream is all about co-existence!
Yes! This dream is about directing and containing sound levels.
S.O.U.N.D. is a reality but this year we’re dreaming too! We want to help Sound Camps achieve their highest potential: create great sound without spreading it everywhere and our neighbors.

### Why is bass ruining your sleep?

Bass sound waves are reaaaaally looooong, so they travel far and penetrate your tent. Typical subwoofers are omni directional – they push sound in all directions. Even outside the dance floor where no one really needs them.

### How to Directional Subs?

With our know-how and by adding subs we can cancel out the sound on the back and sides. So now the bass is directed to the dance floor in a cardioid shape 💗🔊. This really cancels unwanted noise.

_But maybe you've noticed: Sound Camps are also among the more expensive dreams. And that makes it hard for them to add subs for noise._

### So why the "Reality as a Dream"?

Our S.O.U.N.D. reality team has a couple of ways to help with noise mitigation: placement, schedule, hay bales, and directional subs know-how. The know how is free but renting subs cost money! Hay bales are already in the BL'26 budget. With this reality-as-a-dream we go further: fund noise cancelling subs and tilted tops. Join the radical experiment!

_This dream will be invisible. When you don’t notice it, you’ll know it has worked!_
This dream _adds_ safety to other dreams.

We are co-creating with sound camps who would like to try directional subs, tilted tops and hay bales.

When this dream is funded extra subs not accounted in a Sound Camp's budget will be reimbursed through this dream. Additionally we will get joints for tilting tops. These will be stored by the S.O.U.N.D. team and used in future Borderlands. Each multiple of the minimum funding will go to enhancing an estimated one minimum setup in which the SC must have a DSP. Or if this dream reaches towards the stretch goal a DSP may part of the kit.
Soundcamps involved will account for their electricity needs.

Soundcamps are the ones who rent their gear and will strike them – this dream is only to _reimburse_ the additional noise cancelling gear. The top-tilting joints will be collected (along with dB-meters we install) and stored for future Borderlands.
Thomas \[sound\] on Discord

buckets.summary: A playful “hard mode” Borderland experience where participants borrow a wearable device and go about their adventures on the playa with simulated period cramps.
