Fay Khodaperest @faysome on fb

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Baseline: 30–60 dB (conversational)  
Transient peaks up to 85–95 dB may occur depending on user and intensity  
_(often immediately following statements such as “it’s not that bad”)_
Open to co-creating playful challenges, including composure face-offs where participants attempt to remain completely unaffected in front of an audience.

**Ever wondered how bad period cramps really are?**  
No? Perfect. Even better.

Now you can stop wondering.

Welcome to **“Period Cramps-The Men’s Expansion Pack”** also known as **“Borderland on Hardmode”**

At this station, you can borrow a portable device for a maximum of 24h that lets you experience simulated period cramps. Strap it on, turn it up to a level that matches your confidence, and continue your day like nothing’s happening.

Go dance. Have conversations. Be completely normal. Or try to be.  
I mean… women do this all the time. How hard can it _really_ be?

Somewhere between _“this is manageable”_ and _“okay never mind,”_ something interesting might happen.  
Call it perspective. Call it character development. Call it a terrible idea you’re oddly proud of.

Either way, you’ll have something to brag about on your next date…  
Or a sudden urge to apologize to a woman in your life.

**_Small print disclaimer_**  
This experience does NOT include common symptoms such as:  
_Bleeding, emotional fluctuations, crying (with/-out cause), increased irritability (sometimes justified), oddly specific food cravings, diarrhea, constipation, headaches, fatigue, brain fog, nausea, change in libido, acne, gas,_ **...read more**

The setup is low-impact and contained. Sound levels are generally minimal, with occasional brief reactions. No major disturbance to neighbors is expected, and placement will be considered accordingly.

**Whispering Grove** is a little pocket of magic hidden along a forest path, where something quietly hums and waits to be discovered.

Among trees and branches lives a soft, ever-present humming sound, calm, spacious, and slightly mysterious. But it doesn’t want to stay alone.

When you touch the forest, the forest answers.

Leaves, branches and natural elements respond to curious hands and wandering bodies. Touch and movement awaken new layers: drifting tones, shimmering textures, echoes that bloom and fade. One person can play, or many can unknowingly create together.

At the same time, soft light begins to glow. The forest blushes in warm colors, growing brighter with interaction, then gently fading when left alone. Light and sound breathe together, like the grove itself is alive.

There are no instructions.  
Just curiosity.

Some people pass through. Some stay. Some return.

When no one is there, it rests.  
When someone arrives, it wakes.

Come say hello 🌲✨

buckets.title: DreamWeave
buckets.summary: DreamWeave is a suspended, multi-layered mesh installation activated by projected light, creating a volumetric, holographic effect in mid-air.

customFields.value:
Suspended between earth and sky, _DreamWeave_ is a living field of light. Layers of fine mesh float in the air, forming a three-dimensional canvas. Light is projected through these translucent planes, creating shifting volumes that appear and dissolve depending on where you stand. Shapes emerge, overlap, fragment, and reform - never fixed, never fully graspable.

From a distance, the installation reads as a hovering, ambient presence. Up close, it reveals itself as something more intimate: a space you can move through, where light behaves almost like a material. Visitors become part of the projection, their bodies interrupting and reshaping the forms, dissolving the boundary between observer and artwork.

At 8 × 8 × 3 meters, suspended in the air, the piece is both architectural and ephemeral. It occupies space without enclosing it. The work explores perception, illusion, and the fragile line between physical and immaterial. At night, it becomes a shared hallucination - a quiet, luminous gathering point in the landscape. A place to pause, drift, and witness light taking shape in air.
This dream will exist where light is wanted and needed.
Visual artists are welcome to run their material on the DreamWeave.
Victor @palmislol\_01684

buckets.title: HYPERSTITION: Moon Dome
buckets.summary: We are going to the Moon and we are NEVER COMING BACK.

customFields.value: The Moon Dome is the first major structure in the HYPERSTITION Moon Base. The Dome will act as a greeting space and indoor/outdoor hang out spot and arts salon, allowing for passers by to transition into our space. It will be integrated into the Chrome Room and the Black Box. As a sound camp with ambitions to throw many big parties that go long this year, we are well aware of the disruptive impacts of our dreams. We are currently involved in the pre-placement process and in contact with S.O.U.N.D. to ensure suitable placement to minimize the impact of our sound on the Borderland residents and the neighbours.

A well executed strike is important to Hyperstition and the dismantling of the dome will be part of our general strike plan. There will be no residue or anything to throw away from the dome, and it will be transported back to Switzerland for a happy future.
We have a sizeable tarp to protect the dome and will be rigorous in ensuring structural integrity in build. On top, there will be no way to climb in the dome and the fur is not easily flammable.
We are a sound camp. We are in close communication with SOUND to ensure that we are compliant with SOUND restrictions.

Want to join the camp, volunteer to help out on site? register at ➡️➡️ [https://hyperstition-analytica.info/](https://hyperstition-analytica.info/) ⬅️⬅️or reach out on discord to @seblaarouchi or @sstlind with your ideas
Electricity needed is minimal for the dome, although high electricity needs in total will be visible in our black box dream.

HYPERSTITION

_2026 is the_ **_final year_** _for_ **_HYPERSTITION_** _at Borderland. We are stepping up to take on the Valley_ (**_the legendary Muumima spot)_**_, more than_ **_doubling our size, light and sound._**

_Help us go out with a bang!_ **_Fund our dream_** _and be part of our_ **_epic farewell!_**

The **Moon Dome** is part of the Hyperstition dream universe, which also include the **Black Box** and **Chrome Room**.
@seblaarouchi (Discord)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
**_Dreaming of a Moon Dome_**

The iconic Glowfur geodesic dome (nearly 200 m² of lush white fluff, thousands of programmable LEDs, and pure good vibes) will be reborn as the dramatic entry portal of _Hyperstition Moon Base_.

The only Earth-side cost is transporting the dome from Zurich to the launch site. Everything else (structure, fur, lights) has already been covered at zero cost.

On top, **the Moon Dome transport van will bring another >170K SEK of inventory to Hyperstition at Borderland 2026**, including a Funktion one sound system and countless decorative and functional items for Borderlings to enjoy.

The dome will offer sensory experiences impossible on Earth and will have a terrific side-quest to serve as the primary space for day parties, conferences, and performances.

**_Making the Moon Dome a Reality_**

In essence, we are asking for support to cover transport for 170K SEK worth of inventory, which we borrow at no rental cost. Ideas or connections to lower the cost are very welcome.

**_Special Thanks_**

Deepest gratitude to the original creators of the Glowfur Dome.

buckets.title: The Hills Lakeside Sauna, Shower & Swim Collaboration Plaza (lead by Magic Banya)
buckets.summary: The lakeside gets busy, towels wander off, and bags disappear into the grass. We’d love to gift benches, hooks, and a soft landing space for wet hippies 🌊

customFields.value: # **MAGIC BANYA (& whoever would love to co-create the plaza)**
Coral Ljunggren (ljucor@gmail.com)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Expected to be battery-powered only.

We’re in dialogue with nearby sauna camps about shaping a shared lakeside commons atmosphere around the bathing area and pier.

Together we’re exploring adding more shared benches and hooks near the water to support changing, resting, and gathering between swims.

The intention is to make the shoreline easier to use and more welcoming for everyone passing through. What takes shape will grow through collaboration with neighboring camps and depend on shared resources and energy available on site 🌿🌊

### Lakeside Plaza – A Calm Transition Space by the Water

Hippies need a place to land after all the intense JOMO of Borderland — and what better place than by the lake? Right now the shoreline gets a little chaotic as people swim, dry off, change, and wonder where they left their stuff. It could use a soft place to pause.

Magic Banya is already building modular benches and hooks for our changing area, and we’d love to extend this gift to the lakeside by adding:

• shared seating benches  
• hooks for towels and bags  
• a small rain/shade structure  
• a simple rinse station to keep glitter out of the lake  
• floating lounge mats for drifting, resting, and drying in the sun

The intention is simple: make the lakeside a gentler transition space between water and land — calmer, kinder, and easier to share together 🌿

We’re coordinating with nearby camps and neighbors to co-create this as a communal space that stays open and welcoming for everyone.

This space is meant as a shared gift for all Borderlanders, not something belonging to one camp. Because of that, co-existence and co-creation are central to how we imagine it.

The Lakeside Plaza sits in a naturally high-traffic transition area between swimming, resting, and moving along the shoreline, so our intention is to support the existing flow rather than reshape it. Benches, hooks, and simple structures will be placed to stay open, accessible, and easy to share.

We’re already in dialogue with nearby sauna camps and neighbors and will continue coordinating placement together so the space supports the wider lakeside atmosphere and works well for everyone using the area 🌿🌊

We peed in many different ways - and let's face it, most of them weren't too pleasant.

As a Vulva owner myself, I am tired of the Pee-Privilege, that comes with a certain Body attachment. We have to stand in lines forever, just to use questionable facilities that leave us with a feeling of questionable hygiene and a fear of having something somewhere on our clothes that really shouldn't be there..

Aside of the little nastynesses that come with the use of Porta Potties, are we also talking about practical advantages. Studies and observations of different festivals have shown a significant decrease in the length of lines and the waiting times for every visitor. Having a hygienic and quick solution to pee would be a huge win, not only for Vulva Owners - it would have a positive impact on everyone, who has to use a toilet.

The rough idea (will finalize it before the deadline) is to set up a solution that is connected to an IBC tank, that can be exchanged/pumped empty. A squatting solution over an anti-splatter grit to make it easy to clean and to reuse. Surrounded by a simple structure for some privacy and in combination with some running water to clean hands and cups. Located somewhere central and easy accessible.

customFields.value:
## A constellation of small, intimate silent movie theaters scattered through the dark woods — each one a self-contained pocket of light and shadow, humming with the particular frequency of something half-remembered. You might stumble upon one by accident at 2am, wrapped in a blanket you borrowed from a stranger, and sit down in the moss to watch flickering images that feel simultaneously like a dream you once had and a dream someone else is having right now, somewhere, about you.

## Inspired by the visual language of David Lynch and Gregory Crewdson each micro-cinema is its own small world. Some will screen classic silent films. Some will show experimental and surrealist short films. At least one will show something you cannot fully explain afterwards but will think about for the rest of Borderland.

## The woods are part of the installation. The darkness is part of the installation. The sound of wind through trees behind a Buster Keaton pratfall is not a technical flaw — it is the whole point.

## Come alone. Come together. Arrive in the middle. Leave before the end. There is no wrong way to watch something beautiful in the dark.

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
When was the last time you felt fully? Do you remember? Where were you? What’s longing to come out of you...Do you even know? Or have you lost track of your emotions? Perhaps they’ve taken a vacation. Don’t fret, my love, we are here to help you navigate your way back to yourself. 

We will set you up with quests to explore yourself and others. You will be supported as you find the string within yourself for you to pull, and who knows, perhaps you will unravel something. And remember, sometimes you just need a snack.

Who are we, and why should you place your trust in us? 

DeMandy and DeNial are highly skilled emotional consultants with a combined 70+ years of experience in the field. We both come from generations of big feelers with all sorts of attachments. We have felt a lot and know just how tumultuous it can be to feel and not to feel.

buckets.title: Transformation Office
buckets.summary: Visiting us might not change you, but may reveal the path ahead of you.

customFields.value:
Are you ready for an appointment with your transformation?

Transformation Office is a space where you are met. Not with ready-made answers, but with attentive questions. You step inside to be listened, observed, perhaps gently reflected back to yourself.

Based on the discussion, you will receive a personalized task – small, strange, or unexpected. Something that stays with you throughout Borderland and invites you to try something different. The task is not a performance, but a doorway. It may take the form of a game, a ritual, or a subtle disruption of your usual patterns. Sometimes a totem item accompanies you on your journey.

Transformation Office is hosted by a group of Finnish wisdom curators: philosophers, artists, coaches, experience weavers and mental maestros. Office level coffee and tea provided.

We do not change you – but we might nudge you to right path.

Come if something in you stirs while reading this.  
Come if you’re not entirely sure why.  
That is enough.

**Opening hours:** 11:00–17:00 (early in the week)  
**Location:** You’ll find it when it finds you.

P.S. Finland was chosen the happiest country on earth for the ninth time. Come and touch the Philosopher's stone of happiness.
No need for electricity.
We make sure our teepee is firmly installed. And that we don't spill the tea.
This dream makes our camp more calm and thoughtful.
Just discussion.
We strike this same as we strike our camp.
We already have the team to host and facilitate this dream.

buckets.title: Bow, strings, spring reverbs and drums
buckets.summary: Instrument / art piece / experience. Acoustic bow and string instrument with a physical spring reverb.

customFields.value: RA

Last summer was an experiment; drums were made from scratch, connecting these long springs and connecting those to different resonance boxes and drums, breaking one cello string after the other and switching to electrical bass and guitar strings..

**Completely acoustic, the oversized spring reverb setup with this instrument creates quite insane effects; overtones and a surprisingly intense and calming sound.**  
Envision a didgeridoo and a gong, and then quickly think about a string instrument instead.

The experiment is done and the prototype was made during a few weeks of work. The instrument is hungry for a proper update. It craves custom made thin wired and very long piano steel springs(I'm getting a good deal with the only manufacturer in sthlm). It craves synthetic skinned drums with tightening contraptions as borderland is a damned damp place. There things will make it roar (and purr) for real!

**Vision:  
\-** Sound journeys at our camp.  
\- Spontaneous hidden sets in the woods.

I dumped a lot from my personal creativity fund on this last year but now I'm confidently asking for support as I'm sure this will turn out pretty great. Wanna bathe in some otherworldly tones together?
No sound system required, but creates a magical sound at suitable times and places.
flat-pack, ready to disassemble.
dhstorm on discord

buckets.title: DansBanderLand
buckets.summary: Sweden’s forgotten dansband culture, latino dances, dance lessons and a dazzling light show. This year also a coddle corner for even more connecting

customFields.value: Yes, of course, everybody can join us! If you’ve never heard dansbandsmusik, you won’t be able to resist its catchy melodies. If you already know a few bugg steps, come hold lessons with us! Teach “ful-dans” or any other dance style that makes people move. Rumor has it we’ll hold lessons in salsa and bachata, too. We are also open to anyone who wants to host their own music events paired with our unique lighting experience. We’ll have our own sound system, but it also works if you bring yours.
No open fires here! We’ll have fire extinguishers and fire blankets on hand.

We’ll start striking on Saturday. Our décor and materials are reusable, and we’ll do a dedicated MOOP (Matter Out Of Place) sweep to leave no trace. We’re always looking for co-creators to help make our dream come true, from build to strike.
Yes, we need power for our sound, lights, and a fridge. That’s all part of keeping the dansband dream alive!
To appreciate the greatness of dansbandsmusik, it should be played loud—though Swedish tradition dictates it’s not allowed after 1 AM, which is all part of the old-school vibe.
We hope our neighbors will join the fun on our dance floor and in our classes. We promise we won’t blast music 24/7—likely we’ll host lessons during the day and turn down the volume before midnight.
Yes! DansBanderLand Camp

Even though Borderland can offer a lot of dance, there is very little couple dance and no other proper dance floor than ours. We desire dance which provides a strong connection with others!

DansBanderLand is our dream where dansband rises again. Come and dance bugg and fox with us! You don't know how to? No worries, we will teach you. You can look forward to dance classes, social dancing, light show and a cuddle corner which will be new for this year.

Last year was a true success, featuring 11 workshops, two dance nights (including dansband and latino), and live bands both during the day and in the evening. This motivates us to do it again with even more energy!

We taught classes, and filled the floor with movement, joy, and connection. We built a stage which we are going to upgrade and create a cuddle corner.

We’ll also host a Latin night with salsa, bachata, and kizomba - with classes for everyone.
Per Collner (FB) or phone/sms ‭+46 73-049 06 11‬

buckets.title: The Glass House
buckets.summary: A walk-in spatial sculpture where light, color, and geometry interact to create an immersive sensory experience.

customFields.value: Created in collaboration with Kitty Champagne and The Cabinet of Half-Remembered Lies - an interactive drawer installation exploring the lies of childhood, society, and ourselves. The Glass House is the structure. The Cabinets are the content. Together they are one installation.
The Glass House
Maximum safety guaranteed.
No amplified sound is generated by this installation — any ambient sound comes from the neighbouring camp or the broader soundscape of Borderland.
None. This is a silent installation.

This landmark consists of a compact, asymmetrical volume (~4 × 4 x 4 meters) defined by a sequence of three interconnected, sloping roof planes where all surfaces are made entirely of translucent construction plastic with color film.

The structure forms a walk-in spatial sculpture where light, color, and geometry interact to create an immersive sensory experience.

*   During daytime:  
    Sunlight passes through the colored surfaces, casting shifting gradients and overlapping hues inside the space.
    
*   During nighttime:  
    The installation transforms into a projection surface for light art and generative visuals. It glows like a lantern and helps disoriented hippies to stay on track.
    

Inside lives "The Cabinet of Half-Remembered Lies" - three pieces of furniture full of drawers, each one holding a lie someone once told you, or that you told yourself, or that the world keeps insisting is true.
Strike will be done during Sunday. The main structure will be stored in the barn while the plastic foil will be recycled. Nobody will be able to tell that we ever were here.

customFields.value: Burnes Magasin - Rainbow Edition

Catch the Rainbow Razzle! A rolling rainbow carriage spreading joy across the Playa with vibrant lemonades, magical rainbow lattes, and colorful cuisines. But we're not just about the drinks. Every visitor gets a "love-spreader" quest card with a playful mission to connect with someone new. Complete it, find us again, tell us the story and get a sticker, a new quest and level up. The goal? A ripple effect of kindness that reaches way further than our little vehicle ever could.

## **How it works**

We ride. Slowly, joyfully, through the Borderland, stopping wherever people gather or wherever someone looks like they could use a cold drink, a smile or some love.

Every person who stops by gets a quest. These are small, playful missions designed into different categories and levels. to break the camp bubble and spark connection between strangers:

When you complete your quest, find us again, level up, get a reward sticker and a new quest.

buckets.title: The world through my eyes - visual impairment simulator
buckets.summary: Come with me and have a new sensory experience what it’s like living with a visual impairment. A chance to enhance your other senses in a playful way.

customFields.value: This year at borderland I’m feeling brave sharing knowledge about what it’s like living with different sensory function. We will approach this in a playful way. All participants will get a pair of glasses blurring your vision. You won’t be completely blind. Together we’ll get comfortable and then do activities that challenge the way you use your senses. The goal is to spread joy and understanding that spite being born with or have acquired different conditions regarding sensory function, life still can be experienced at it’s fullest. We will play, laugh and maybe spark some random emotions. There will also be a safe space for all to share the experience afterwards.
There will be no or low volume music during activities. Talking and hopefully heartfelt laughs are welcome to occur.
This dream is mainly a way for me to share my experience in a safe space. Bering a member of the burnes magazine we might co-create with some quests from the rainbow razzel.
This a small project that will take place during daytime, recurring a few times during the week. Number of participants will be kept to a smaller group around 10-12 people.
Burnes Magasin - Rainbow Edition
We will keep to a given area with no risk of bumping in to our surroundings. Assistance from people with full vision on site.
All equipment will be handed in after the session and taken home.
No electricity needed.

customFields.value:
Step into the role of an undercover gifter and discover the playful art of secretly surprising others.

In this interactive group workshop, you'll learn how to discreetly place small gifts on people—without them noticing—using a combination of clever techniques, timing, and movement.

We’ll explore three practical stages of reverse pick-pocketing, based on the type and physical characteristics of the gift. Together, we’ll practice how to handle different objects, adapt your approach, and use simple but effective distraction techniques and body movements to stay unnoticed.

This workshop is highly participative and hands-on—expect to practice in pairs and small groups, laugh a lot, and sharpen your awareness and coordination.

**What to bring / wear:**  
Participants are encouraged to wear at least one piece of clothing with wide or easily accessible pockets (e.g. jackets, hoodies, cargo pants), as this will make practicing more effective and fun.

No prior experience needed—just curiosity, playfulness and respect for others.

buckets.title: The Green Zone: Back in Business
buckets.summary: Once again, the Green Zone will offer borderlings an oasis of Western sanity: Cold beers, classic country and rock and absolutely no breathwork workshops.

customFields.value: Crispy. Discord: @crispy440

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: 1500W average,

Attention civilians. 

As part of Blackwater Operations’ ongoing efforts to safeguard sanity and culture at the Borderland, civilians will once again be allowed entrance to the Green Zone - our secure base in the warzone known as the Playa.

Here, you can shelter in place when you need a break from the burning sun, kitty ears, playa-tech and political correctness.

This year, we're expanding operations with BUCK - The _Blackwater Unconscious Community Kasino_ [(link)](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnuv3nh3000q125rkjdwqutl). 

## **At the Green Zone you'll find:**

*   Our 50m² free-to-use hangout space with crisp, professional sound system and military nostalgia decor
    
*   Heated interiors to keep you warm in the freezing Alversjö night
    
*   Shade from the scorching sun under our satellite-proof camo net.
    
*   Free wifi
    

## Planned entertainment operations.

*   Our cozy Hot Dogs n' Budweisers day-party. 
    
*   Our 4x4 multipurpose art car, ferrying lost civilians around
    
*   Dance parties with outlaw DJs such as Senator Snowflake and _Riktigt Party_ with Alexander Näslund.
    
*   And more…
    

## Remember

Freedom don't come free. To ensure uninterrupted security service from, please proceed to fund the Green Zone.

Thank you for your cooperation.
The Green Zone - by Blackwater Operations
All strikes will be carried out with military precision and in accordance with current rules of engagement.
Blackwater Operations continue to believe in the peaceful coexistence between civilians and armed forces.
Our assault plan involves deployment of military grade sound system. We will ensure to comply with relevant noise regulations and seek to place ourselves in an area that allows loud music.
We are here for your safety. Please comply with all directives given by Blackwater operatives and all will be fine.

Blackwater is always looking for locals willing to support our operations. Cooperation will be greatly rewarded. Contact the [Blackwater Proxy Division](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnu7z165000za5hp80zzugp3) for more details.

Then, broken into pieces and stripped of all its values, the Imaginary Iron-oak finally unites with the flames of the festival, to once and for all reach the stars that it always has dreamt about.

Ever dreamt of hammering on things that won’t break into thousand of pieces?

At the smithy you can venture into traditional blacksmithing to shape hot iron into whatever form you want, where the art-pieces you create will give life to the Imaginary Iron-oak (not everything will be possible, due to limitations of time and material, but let imagination run free!). At the end of the festival, you can bring your creation home if you want(:

Let the pieces be black as the soul, or color them joyfully with spray paint with your own imagination. Then hang it up in the branches of the Imaginary Iron-oak (or smuggle it away to decorate your own camp).

Sure! This workshop is open to expansion and exciting opportunities! The idea is to close the bio-talk by transcending to a more ceremonial way of connecting to the spirit of cacao for those who feel called, where participants are invited to enjoy drinking sacred cacao, meditation, intention setting, and sharing - all on a voluntary basis.

But how about a cacao-boosted breathwork, tantric massage, dearmouring, shibari flow, acro-yoga, or music jam?

\*\*\*

**What to expect from the cacao biohacking part:**

*   Historical background - traditional indigenous usage and western-world commercialisation
    
*   Definitions of cacao concepts
    
*   Nutritional profile
    
*   Bioactive components/substances and biochemistry
    
*   Bioavailability and bioactive combinations with other substances
    
*   Benefits and risks in terms of physiological and psychological impact
    
*   Purposeful usage and dosing for intended effects
    
*   A scientific approach to the serotonin toxicity/syndrome risks
    
*   Q&As & discussion
    
*   Optional heart-opening cacao ceremony and meditation
    

\*\*\*

**Welcome to this bioscientific approach to connect to The Spirit of Sacred Cacao!**

**An introduction to the "super nutrient" cacao, Theobroma Cacao - "food of the Gods". Let's talk about Cacao from a Biohacking Perspective - the bioscience beyond this dual, ancient, sacred plant medicin vs commercialised bulk product.**

Immersing into a **biohacking world,** talking about aspects such as nutritional profile, psychoactive components, biochemistry, bioavailability, bioactive cross-interactions with substances like nootropics, adaptogens, prescription drugs, psychedelics - and benefits and risks in terms of physiological and psychological impact.

Purpose, conscious usage, and dosing for intended effects: How may cacao be used in everyday life for diverse purposes - improving baseline moods, enhancing physical practices, boosting breathworks, deepening introspectively into meditation and inner exploration, connecting introceptionally to the body?

Specifically, we dig deeper into the **complex and intriguing debate of combining multiple serotonin-enhancing substances** (e.g SSRIs/SNRIs, MAOIs) and **risks of serotonin syndrome**.

As a participant and co-creator you are invited to influence the course of the discussion. So, bring your questions, and allow your curiosity and spontaneous reflections to flow through!

buckets.title: Instruments of the Jam (Jam Camp)
buckets.summary: Jam Camp is need of new (to us) used instruments to offer to all the professional, aspiring, and totally new jammers on the playa.

customFields.value: Allison Sterling - allisonjaysterling@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: 3 phase 16A for the Jam Tent
Jam Camp

Jamming music is the ultimate real-time co-creation in the dimension of sound. We provide a stage, a cozy space with pillows for your audience, and a chance for your inner rock star or diva to come out. Our stage is open to all who want to try to share in the experience of creating music together.

**Picture this:**

Electric guitar.

Electric bass.

Synthesizer.

Electric piano.

Guitar amp.

Analog mixer.

Monitor speakers.

Rack box for mixer, bass amp, monitor amp...

**What would _you_ do with all of that?**

Annoy your parents?

Create a cult?

Be the next big thing?

The answer is **yes**.

Every year, we (Jam Camp) create a magical stage for all borderlings to perform live music. You choose the instrument, you choose the groove. Together we jam! We welcome everyone from beginners to pros, from children to seniors, from unicorns to octopuses to our stage to come together to create something special in real time. Want to try singing or a new instrument on stage? Of course you do.

We also host a variety of music themed workshops and events.  
  
Unfortunately, our cache of instruments was stolen from our container a few years ago. Since then, we have slowly been trying to rebuild our collection of instruments so we can keep the jam going without having to rely on member's own private (and typically expensive and fragile) instruments. These will be collectively owned instruments that all are welcome to play, fostering more inclusion and co-creation for those unable to bring their own instruments to the event.

Lemme tell ya, them guys ain't dumb  
Maybe get a blister on your little finger  
Maybe get a blister on your thumb

We have a large circus tent to house our stage. We have a crack team of expert placers who take into consideration where it would be best to have our tent. Yes, we make noise. Sometimes, it is not quite Grammy-level. But we are also not a 1000W sound camp. We respect people's bed times and beauty sleep and only allow jamming during normal business hours (i.e. 10am-10pm). In the cozy bed time hours, we have quiet jams only, meaning no drums or high amplification. After midnight, no jamming allowed.  
  
We will cooperate with neighboring camps to synchronize our sound schedules as much as possible, and we will respect sound zoning and honor advice from neighboring camps, Clown Police and Helm.
Around 90 dB, with peaks around 100 dB during the day, around 70 dB after 10pm, quiet after midnight.

The instruments will be wiped down, carefully put away, and loaded into our van. Then they will stored safely off site and will return to the Borderland year after year. This will remove the incentive for thieves to raid our container looking for pawn-shop-quality goods. We've learned our lesson the hard way.

Eagle Bar will be located in the barn. BAR is open a few nights during build week. Some nice after work to all the hard working borderlings building the infrastructure we all need. Whether you’re looking for a deep conversation or a place to hide from a downpour, The Eagle Bar is built to be your new favorite meeting point on the map.

We know what we're doing when we're building it and pushing it around.

The camp at the end of the universe

This year will be our third Borderland participation, and we will not stop here. We have previously done similar things; last year we made luxury ice cream on-site and handed out (Dicksicles). We will build this trolley to be sturdy and adaptable, so that it can be used for similar missions on future burns, and also easily modified to the future themes. In other words we will dismount it and bring it back home, so that we can bring it to Borderland 2027 (and maybe other burns).

tldr: We will dismantle and bring everything back with us, to provide it again next year.

You wanna bring some gifts to the trolley? Or you wanna use it for a mission?

Sure, just talk to us :)

The Grand Gift Trolley is a mobile gift-giving experience for Borderland. A beautifully decorated cart, operated by a warm and enthusiastic gift-giver, roams the festival and offers handpicked gifts to anyone it encounters.

There is no transaction. No performance required. You receive a gift simply because the trolley found you.

The gifts themselves are chosen with care and a certain creative logic that we won't explain fully here. Some gifts are practical. Some are playful. Some are deliberately surprising. That element of surprise is part of the experience: you never quite know what you are going to get, and that is exactly the point.

One planned sub-theme — developed in more detail separately — is a gift selection built entirely around giving people the opposite of what the moment seems to call for: coffee late at night, something cold in the rain, a compass when you need directions but no map. These gifts are not pranks. They are offered with complete warmth and conviction. Think of it as a love language that happens to be slightly inconvenient.

That sub-theme is one expression of the trolley's spirit. But we will utilize of for a few more gifting patrols aroudn the playa — the cart is a platform, not a fixed script.

buckets.title: Hattifnatti Sauna Hat Workshop
buckets.summary: A hands-on wool felting workshop where you make your own sauna hat!

customFields.value:
Hattifnatti is a workshop for making your own sauna hat - the kind you wear in the sauna to protect your head from the heat.

Two sessions are held during Borderland, each around three hours long with up to eight participants. [Rose Hallgren](https://rosehallgren.se/), architect and wool expert, brings all the wool, tools, and materials. She walks you through the process step by step: laying out the wool, wetting, soaping, rolling, felting, and shaping until you have a finished hat that is uniquely yours.

Rose runs Fluffy Encounters, a project exploring how wool - often discarded today - can support slow, circular, and locally rooted material practices. In 2025 she brought the project Fluffy Encounters to the Copenhagen Architecture Biennial with a combined workshop and exhibition on wool in architecture. She has been running felting workshops and knows how to guide complete beginners through the process.

[Video from a previous workshop](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yn3Wk3m__r0).

No experience needed. The workshop is equal parts craft, conversation, and calm. You sit together, work with your hands, and leave with something you made.

[Here's a reference to how a sauna hat making process can look like!](https://feltingandfiberstudio.com/2024/11/09/fun-with-sauna-hats/)
None beyond conversation and the occassional Moomin episode playing in the background.
Quiet workshop. Wool, warm water and soap are the main materials. No noise, no chemicals, no impact on surroundings.

Rose Hallgren leads the workshop and brings all materials. Want to help set up or assist during sessions? Get in touch: spacerosie@gmail.com. Also, looking for a space that could host the workshop, indoor setting preferred.
Warm water in small basins. No sharp tools. No chemicals. Suitable for all ages.
A kettle for warm water (~1500W intermittent).

HYPERSTITION

_2026 is the_ **_final year_** _for_ **_HYPERSTITION_** _at Borderland. We are stepping up to take on the Valley_ (**_the legendary Muumima spot)_**_, more than_ **_doubling our size, light and sound._**

The **Black Box** is part of the Hyperstition dream universe, which also include the **Chrome Room** and **Moon Dome**.
We are a sound camp. We are in close communication with S.O.U.N.D. to ensure that we are compliant with S.O.U.N.D. restrictions. >10kw, highly modular, and optimized placement design.

The Black Box is the final major structure in the HYPERSTITION Moon Base. The endpoint of our Dreams, and the start of your new beginnings. It will be integrated into the Moon Dome and the Chrome Room. As a sound camp with ambitions to throw many big parties that go long this year, we are well aware of the disruptive impacts of our dreams. We are currently involved in the pre-placement process and in contact with S.O.U.N.D. to ensure suitable placement to minimize the impact of our sound on the Borderland residents and the neighbours.

The Black Box will be an incredible space for hosting parties. HYPERSTITION will host several parties during the week, but we are open to co-creation with other experienced event hosts to take on the venue for night. Please reach out on discord to @seblaarouchi with your vision and experience!  
  
Want to join the camp, volunteer to help out on site? register at ➡️➡️ [https://hyperstition-analytica.info/](https://hyperstition-analytica.info/) ⬅️⬅️or reach out on discord to @seblaarouchi or @sstlind with your ideas
We will need around 25kw in total across all Hyperstition dreams. We will stay close to power team throughout.
@seblaarouchi (Discord)

customFields.value:
**TL;DR** Hyperstition is upgrading our main dance floor to a bigger tent with much taller walls so we can safely run a full-scale laser show + massive (F1) upgrade to our sound system. Optimized for immersive sound and light. Need your support to raise the roof!

**Hyperstition Black Box Upgrade**

This year we’re taking our main dance floor to the next level. We’re moving to a larger tent with 2.6-4m high walls. The extra height gives us the vertical space required to safely deploy a powerful laser show that wasn’t possible before, and integrate new types of lights without over saturating the experience held by the space.

This is the container that is dedicated to letting us safely push the limits with light and sound. We’re adding 6x F1 speakers to our current custom built system for crystal clear, high-impact audio that engages our guests down to the core.

In simple terms, The Black Box will deliver intensely immersive experiences.

**Making the Black Box a Reality**

We have secured the tent through other fundraising means, now we need funds to make the rest of the technical upgrades and integrative decoration happen.

If you want to see (and feel) what a properly equipped Black Box can do, help us raise the roof!

buckets.title: Boreder-land customs office
buckets.summary: Do you have the proper papers for that? Visit the customs office to ensure FULL* compliance with the official, inofficial Boreder-land appropriation framework.

customFields.value: Daniel Werner danieljobbarwerner@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: The office generates no audible sound, producing neither noise nor detectable vibration, remaining entirely silent under standard operating conditions, with no measurable acoustic output at any time.

**Co-existence**  
The proposed project has been subject to a comprehensive assessment in relation to its physical, social, and environmental context. Particular consideration has been given to ensuring compatibility with adjacent land uses, existing infrastructure, and the established character of the surrounding area. The siting, design, and operational parameters of the project have been determined with the objective of minimizing potential adverse effects, including but not limited to noise emissions, traffic generation, visual impact, and other forms of disturbance.

A structured evaluation of potential impacts on neighboring properties and occupants has been undertaken as part of the planning and placement process. Where relevant, these considerations have been informed by applicable regulatory frameworks, guidelines, and best practices. Reasonable efforts have been made to identify and assess foreseeable externalities, and to incorporate appropriate mitigation measures at both the design and operational stages.

Such measures include, where applicable, limitations on operational intensity, implementation of noise-reducing features, spatial buffering, and other proportionate interventions intended to prevent material nuisance or undue inconvenience. The project has been developed with the intention of maintaining compliance with all relevant statutory requirements and ensuring that its operation does not result in significant adverse effects on the amenity, safety, or wellbeing of neighboring stakeholders.

While no formal consultation process has been deemed necessary in all cases, the potential for dialogue with affected parties has been duly considered, and the project framework allows for responsive adjustments should substantiated concerns arise.

In conclusion, the project is designed to achieve a balanced and lawful coexistence within its context, ensuring that any impacts are appropriately mitigated, proportionate, and consistent with applicable legal and planning standards, while supporting a sustainable and mutually compatible relationship with its surroundings.

The Boreder-land customs office works according to a 7†-step framework to ensure full compliance with moral, ethical, economical, emotional, ecological, ectopical, eschatological and etceteracological (MEEEEEEE) constraints, such that appropriation to formal and informal borederland principles is ensured and full ENJOYMENT‡ may be had by ALL§.

Please note that applications to the customs office must be filed in a manner concurrent with general Borederland standards. buckets.title: Once upon a dream
buckets.summary: A place to return to when your inner child longs to be comforted and norished. Let us read you bed time stories, sing you lullabies & serve you blueberry tea.

customFields.value:
Once upon a time there were a handful of borderlings who loved to party, to play around and to dance long into the night. For this they gathered once a year and it was nothing short of marvellous. But after a few very long nights, they grew tired. Their legs were shaky and they somehow felt a little lost at sea. They realised they needed a place to rest every now and then. A place to seek comfort when it all felt a bit too big. And so they started to dream.

They dreamt of a place of comfort, of rest. A place for all of Borderlands inner (and outer) children who just wants to curl up and listen to the sweet sweet sound of a fairy leafing through a childrens book and her soothing voice telling tales of moomintrolls and wild things far far away.

They dreamt of blueberry tea in tiny mugs, lullabies and bed time stories. A safe little haven, with big pillows and the cuddlies cuddles with their friends. The tired borderlings dreamt so hard, that one day the dream suddenly came true.

So now they lay there, under the fairy lights in an oh-so-cozy tent listening to the stories of the world beyond.

• Swedish and English stories and childrens books, tea and cookies, magical readings, lullabies & workshops.

(Illustrations © Tove Jansson)

After carefully removing any and all borderlings that are fast asleep in our dream, we will also remove every tiny bit of junk that those careless creatures sometimes brings onboard. We know it'll be a hassle, but you know what they say, team work really makes the dream work.

(To be specific, it won't be a lot. And all of us at "Once upon a camp" will take responsibility for the dream to be taken down. And in a manner that we can store it safely and bring it all back next year. We dont know exactly when we will strike right now, that depends on how long our camp will stay. But for sure after the official BL-days are over and done with.)

Well, yes of course! If you feel drawn to make this whole thing a story worth telling, please send us a love note!

On the menu there will be classic Swedish and English childrens books, and if you have some other ones, please bring them for all of us to marvel in.
Oh, very safe. Very, very safe. We aim for a happily ever after for all of us!
Once upon a camp

We strive to make our dream a safe space for people to restfully connect trough storytelling.

It will look beautiful, with a beige big round tent and lots of fairy lights to guide the way. Wood, natural and pastel colors, whimsical stuff and nature themed. If you happen to pass by, you might see some creatures of magic roaming the area, and if you're lucky, an elf might appear to offer you a cup of her favourite tea.
This will all be analogue, except the soft melodies of a harp or rain sounds to soothe the worries of the borderlings before bedtime. Snoring and giggles might suddenly appear out of thin air.
Liv Dahlstrand, liv.dahlstrand@gmail.com

buckets.summary: The Tramsbulans is a rolling joy machine - glitter-pimped, electric party cart spreading fun, refreshments, and spontaneous silliness wherever it goes.

customFields.value: The Tramsbulans runs on electricity, but we’ll keep our charging needs minimal. Just enough to keep the good vibes rolling.
The Tramsbulans is run responsibly with clear crew roles, safe driving, and respect for all. We’ll follow all guidelines for vehicles, keep things well-lit at night.

### **🚑 TRAMS FOR LIFE – The Silly Ambulance is Coming to Save the Party! 🚑**

The Tramsbulas was a huge success last year! It was so silly and crazy that we managed to make people laugh wherever we went. This year, we want to take it to a even higher level of tramsiness. Our **mobile emergency response unit for all things silly will have even more seating, lights and sound.** We will go off-track immediately and stay that way all week.

**What does the Silly Ambulance do?**

*   🧃 Delivers life-saving refreshments (boozy and non-boozy) Bring your own highly questionable cup.
    
*   💅 Offers on-the-spot makeovers and style upgrades for all that isn't "tramsy" enough
    
*   🕺 Intervenes in low-energy zones with spontaneous dance breaks, karaoke therapy, and hugs
    
*   💖 Brings joy, chaos, and community where it’s needed most! Most Important are the secret surprises we cannot tell you or anyone beforehand. It has to be lived and experienced, whenever and wherever you need it. Or we think you need it.
    
    Help us fund and upgrade the Tramsbulans. Vote for trams. Vote for joy. Vote for the weird, wonderful, wacky mobile dream team and machine that will make every corner of the event sparkle just a little bit more.

### **🤝 Oh yes!🚨✨**

This is not just our dream, it’s a moving, glowing, bubbling **collaborative silly-fest**, and **you** are invited to co-create the chaos.

The Tramsbulans thrives on community. You will be invited to act as our **trams nurse**, **make-up medic**, **vibe DJs**, **cup stacker**, **bubble wrangler**, and any type of **joy distributor!**

Bored? When you need it the most, you will be able to call us and we will show up and sort out your issue with some... you guessed it right. TRAMS! Because we are HIGH-quality, proffessionals with a proven track record. Very scientific.

### **🤝 A Friendly, Floating Dose of Fun 🎈**

The Tramsbulans is a joyful, respectful presence, a **wandering unit of good vibes** that never aims to disturb or interfere. We’re fully mobile and can easily relocate if needed, always staying in harmony with the flow of the event.

We exist to uplift and connect, moving gently through the space and bringing playfulness where it’s welcome.
Low-key - we're playing music where it's needed and are always able to move

The Tramsbulans rolls in with joy and rolls out with everything it brought. We follow a strict **leave no trace** policy: all gear, decorations, and materials will be taken home with us. The golf cart will be parked at Alversjö.

This is an approved multi-year-investment. It was bought for 45.000 SEK, funded by membership-loans from camp members. One third (i.e. 15.000 SEK) of the cost was dream-funded in 2025. We ask for the second multi-year-investment payment this year. It would be great if we're able to pay back more of the membership-loans via dream funding already this year and hence, we're asking for 15000-20000. The last payment of this multi-year-investment is planned to 2027 after which the golf cart formally will belong to Alversjö and might find another purpose.
# **Tramsbulans camp**

buckets.title: Burner Inspection
buckets.summary: We'll check your chassis, tune up your engine, and make sure you're roadworthy for whatever adventures lie ahead!

customFields.value: Nothing Suspicious Here
We will collect any garbage we generate as we go, but this dream is low in waste in general.
Just enough to pimp this activity with some music. We will use the electricity from the camp of dream members.

Want to make sure you a cruising through Borderland in a safe human vessle? Search no more! At our Burner Inspection we’ve got seasoned professionals ready to do your yearly inspection and make sure you don’t run into any unexpected breakdowns.

**  
FAQ**

**What if I fail the inspection?**

Don’t worry! Our on-site repair shop is fully equipped to get you back in top gear. Whether you need a realignment of your axles, an oil change, or a top-up of your hydraulic fluids — we’ve got you covered.   

**Will I get a certificate?** 

Of course! You’ll receive a certificate confirming that you’re roadworthy, signed and stamped by our certified mechanics. Flash it with pride — it’s valid with all authorities on the premises.   

**What do you check?**

Our thorough burner inspection includes:

*   Headlights – Are you still sparkling, or do you need some glitter?
    
*   Tires – Are you well-balanced and going where you want to?
    
*   Oil levels – Feeling dry? No problem — we’ve got plenty of oil!
    
*   Brakes – Are you stopping when you want to?
    
*   Horn – Can you still blow your own trumpet?
    
*   Fluid levels – Do you need a top-up?
    
*   Paint and rust – Getting old? We’ll give you a paint job to look brand new.
Not noisy! We'll have some music on in the back ground, like in any auto shop.
Very safe! Will even improve safety.
We will organize it within the camp. Let us know if you feel eager to help.
Will affect neighbors positively! Decreases risk of collisions, traffic hold ups, pollution etc.

Evelina Andersson

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Will be coordinated in accordance with the hosting camp.  
• Sound system, Lighting, Video / projection, Workshops..

This dream is designed to exist in harmony with its surroundings, offering a contained, intentional space that invites in those who feel the pull, while remaining respectful to those who do not.

Held within a tented environment, it creates a clear energetic and physical boundary. From the outside, it appears as a mysterious, art driven circus, with deeper layers revealed only to those who consciously choose to enter.

Sound, lighting, and flow will be considered carefully to minimise disruption, aligning with the natural rhythm of the festival and neighbouring camps.

Clear entry awareness ensures participants understand the nature of the space before entering, creating consent not only within the experience, but at its threshold.

The intention is to contribute to the richness and diversity of the playa by offering a unique, sex positive immersive world, without imposing on the surrounding environment.

The SURREAL circus curtains do not open for those who have wandered too far into intoxication.  
While some lines may blur as the night unfolds…  
consent and respect never do.

A hidden circus awakens after dark, where the curious gather and the rules blur at the edges.  
A little unhinged, a little enchanted… where mischief lingers in the air and something wilder begins to stir.  
What begins as wonder slowly twists into something far more… intoxicating.

Wander deeper.

You may find yourself drawn into strange little corners of amazement and illusion…  
flickers of connection, rising tension,  
the slow, delicious tease of not knowing what comes next…  
only that you might want to follow it.

Playful chaos meets sensual curiosity.  
A brush of skin, a pause held just long enough,  
the feeling that something is about to happen… or already is.

And somewhere between the chaos,  
you may find yourself closer to your desires than expected.  
Somewhere along the way,  
you realise you’re no longer just exploring the wonderland…  
you’ve become part of it.

The characters you meet feel familiar… yet not.  
Because those who step into this world are free to be their wildest selves,  
held in a shared understanding that what unfolds here  
remains sealed within those who were part of it.  
Where innocence melts into curiosity,  
curiosity into desire,  
and desire… into something beautifully SURREAL.
Surreal / Hannah Bacon

Seeking co-creators for a surreal circus of erotic expression.

Performances that tease, tempt, and awaken.  
Live music that pulls bodies closer… deeper into the moment.  
Provocative art that doesn’t just exist to be seen, but to be felt.

Aerial and circus artists who move above and between us…  
bodies suspended, twisting, teasing gravity,  
drawing eyes upward while pulling energy deeper into the space.

This is a world where desire is explored openly,  
where bodies gather, connect, and move as one living, breathing energy.

If your work is provocative, immersive, and stirs something primal…  
if it lures people out of their minds and into their bodies…

You’re welcome to excite me with your ideas.  
(hannahbacon91@gmail.com)

buckets.title: PORTal's camera lens stickers 📸
buckets.summary: Less lens, more sense.

customFields.value: Everyone is welcome to join the PORTal, contact us at discord!
The reality PORT

We’re designing and producing stickers that cover phone camera lenses.

Not to block your view, just to shift it 😜

By reducing photography, we create space for presence. Fewer cameras make it easier to relax, connect, and play without the feeling of being documented.

Each participant will receive a sticker when entering the Borderland bubble through the PORTal 🫧

This dream has minimal impact on its surroundings. Stickers will be distributed freely on a roll at the PORTal. No noise, no structure, no special placement needed. We don't anticipate any negative effects on neighbors.

Since stickers come on a roll at the gate, the greeters tear off the sticker on the spot and the participant puts it on the camera lens. This means any backing paper is handled right there at the entry point, where we will have a dedicated container for disposal.
As safe as it gets — non-toxic, no structures, no installation. We'll source eco-friendly materials and verify that the adhesive won't damage surfaces like camera lenses.

Stickers are distributed at the portal and taken away by participants. We will have a clearly marked bin for backing paper at the distribution point throughout the event. At strike, we pack up the roll(s), bin, and any remaining materials — nothing stays on the land. We'll also do a MOOP sweep of the surrounding area before leaving.

buckets.title: The Confessional Booth: A Space to Be Heard
buckets.summary:
You step inside carrying something: a secret, a shame, a desire you’ve never dared to say out loud.
You step out with one secret less.

customFields.value: 0db
Anyone is free to join the confession booth as an active listener outside the dedicated hours
Discord: carlprorealalgos

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Will be transported away from Borderland by the end of the week (Sunday)  
We’ll do a dedicated MOOP (Matter Out Of Place) sweep to leave no trace.
Not needed
It's a quiet dream, not going to disturb neighbours
No fires, no electricity, just a booth

You will be invited to step inside if you carry something: a secret, a shame, a desire you’ve never dared to say out loud. Something heavy. Or fragile. Or forbidden.

On the other side of the curtain, there is a human. Not a judge. Not a fixer. Just a presence.

They are there to listen without judgement, and give no advice unless you ask for it. No reaction you need to manage. No story you need to perform. Just ears. Just witnessing. Just space. You can enter anonymously. You can stay for one minute or twenty. You can speak, cry or sit in silence

The booth will have a dedicated listener for X hours per day, but it will remain open if someone wants to do a shift listening.

A place where you can whisper the things that don’t fit anywhere else. Where guilt softens when spoken. Where desire becomes less scary when shared. Where shame dissolves, even just a little, in the presence of another human who does not turn away.

We hold your words with care. We hold your silence with respect. We hold the understanding that to be human is to carry things.

buckets.title: Kishmastle Spacestation
buckets.summary: A spaced out sound camp

customFields.value:
The Kishmastlerz are back! Since last year, they’ve been scouring the galaxy for the universe's best sounds. Now, they’ve returned to Borderland to share this sonic treasure, building a magical space of music, lights, and stellar shenanigans shaped by their alien journeys.

As fate would have it, their ship landed right beside the sacred Alvheim elves and the cozy Fungal Refuge. This cosmic arrival is now a shared world where star travelers, forest dwellers, and fungal beings meet in curiosity and collaboration.

*   **By Day:** A hub for creativity and strange inventions. Join us for "Build Your Own Tin Foil Hat," guest-hosted workshops on our cosmic dancefloor, and playful happenings with our neighbors in Alvheim and Fungal Refuge.
    
*   **By Night:** The station ignites. Projections bleed into the trees, neon planets glow, and alien artifacts awaken as the dancefloor opens into deep space. We dance until the stars look jealous.
    

**What this dream gives to Borderland** Kishmastle Space Station offers a fully immersive sound camp where music, humor, and worldbuilding merge. Through collaboration with our neighbors, we create a vibrant area of Borderland alive with story, performance, and spontaneous fun.

We are open for co-creation from DJs, visual artists, builders, workshop hosts, decorators, bar dreamers, and other intergalactic contributors.

Are you a Sonic Navigator ready to pilot our ship through different genres? An Astro-Engineer who wants to help build planets, rig lights, or shape the station's visual world? Have a Daylight Mission or a strange and beautiful offering for the dancefloor when we are not at warp speed? Or a bar popup full of deliciousness and personality? Come join the space station.

We are especially excited about co-created moments with Alvheim, Fungal Refuge and Breadcrumb Bureau, whether that means shared rituals, workshops, quests, side quests, tea moments, performances, or surprising inter-species encounters.
We’ll provide water, first aid, and fire safety. We prioritize safe construction, stable rigging, clear walkways, and responsible build/strike to keep the station safe for all.
We will strike efficiently and bring back everything we bring out. Any leftover usable wood will be donated or otherwise handled responsibly, and we aim to leave no trace of our landing behind us.

We are a loud dream, and we will actively involve ourselves in the placement process to ensure we end up where louder camps are encouraged. We will also have a designated point of contact for loudness-related dialogue and coordinate closely with Alvheim and Fungal Refuge so that dance, ritual, and rest can strengthen one another instead of competing.
@ZoeElisabeth (Discord handle: ZoeElisabeth#5459 - Phone number: +31615820670)

customFields.value: Kishmastle

We\`ll bring a 20 kW passive sound system and play a variety of heavier, danceable sounds by night. During daytime, we may also host softer music connected to workshops and collaborative offerings.

buckets.title: The Magic Banya optimized check-in & undress: help us improve the chaos from last year!
buckets.summary: Last year our Banya check-in was cramped. This year we wish to help the flow of the greeting and dressing/undressing station much better.

customFields.value:
For this year’s Borderland we plan to take part actively in the pre-placement process and collaborate with nearby camps on the Hill to co-create a calm and welcoming neighbourhood oasis for everyone passing through the area.

Last year we co-existed closely with neighbours such as the communal shower and other beachside creators, coordinating shared space and supporting efforts to keep the lakeshore MOOP-free. As the Magic Banya attracts significant foot traffic, we are mindful of flow, sound levels, and gathering areas, and we design our check-in lounge to create a grounded and respectful transition space that supports both participants and neighbouring camps. We also see the Banya as contributing positively to the area by offering rest, warmth, and guided experiences open to the wider community.
The Magic Banya check-in Chill will be a chill zone but some ambient music may make noise close to the lake.
The Shelves are constructed for stability and will not fall over as they are snuggly anchored to the ground as well as the tarps being anchored to surrounding trees and ground.
The feeling from our Magic Banya may linger, but our structures won’t. Everything will be dismantled, packed up, and the space left spotless.
Low. Needed for ambient lighting, soft music,
Coral Ljunggren, ljucor@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Last Borderland there was very high interest in the Magic Banya, with over 800 names in our sign-up book and many additional visitors stopping by between sessions. This created congestion around the entrance area and limited space for participants to transition calmly into sessions.

For this year, we plan to build a dedicated check-in and undressing station near the beach, creating a clearer and more welcoming entry into the first stage of the Magic Banya experience.

During sessions we typically host around 40 participants inside the Banya at a time, while another 40 participants are waiting for the following session, along with additional visitors moving through the area. Because of this high flow, it is important to provide a structured check-in and clothing storage area that supports safe circulation and respectful transitions.

The station will provide:

• structured session check-in

• clothing storage using shelves and hooks

• improved participant flow and reduced congestion around the sauna entrance

This infrastructure helps us safely support a large number of participants while also improving the experience for neighbouring camps and beachside areas.

Yes, we are open to co-creation. We welcome collaboration with neighbouring camps and participants through shared rituals, tea gatherings, guided sessions, music, and body-based practices such as meditation, massage, and movement in the lounge space between Banya sessions.

We are especially happy to co-create a calm and welcoming neighbourhood atmosphere together with nearby chill-out camps and beachside spaces, supporting transitions between experiences and keeping good vibes flowing for everyone passing through the area. We will also invite co-creation in advance through Borderland Discord and Facebook channels so the lounge space can host Borderlanders who wish to gift their experience and wisdom to the community. If we can raise enough money for building the hooks and benches we would like to place them along the lakeside for collective use to add to the lakeside plaza on Sunny Hills.

# **MAGIC BANYA by Mist behavior**

The banya is a Russian-style **steam sauna**, built as a handcrafted tent structure where heat, steam and ritual come together. Using a borrowed banya, the project was a great success in 2025 and this year we come back by engineering our own Borderland Banya, backed by F33!

WEBSITE:[Magic Banya Camp · Borderland 2026](https://magicbanya.com/)

Interested in joining us? fill out our really awesome [form](https://forms.gle/GsaqJdUU2VnWRAsX7)

buckets.title: Temple of Tantra need a Sound System (Tantric Trolls)
buckets.summary: We rely on borrowed gear every year. You’ve visited us. You’ve loved us. Now we need your help.

customFields.value: The Tantric Trolls
Absolutely. We don’t run workshops after 21:00, and we are mindful of our surroundings—respect and consideration for our neighbors are part of our setup.
No — our setup is modest and not intended to function as a sound camp. We aim to keep it simple, respectful, and appropriate for workshops rather than large-scale amplified sound.
Ego dissolution may occur, but no other harm—this is a carefully held, safe space with all necessary precautions in place.
We will fully dismantle everything and do thorough MOOP sweeps to leave no trace—aiming to leave the space better than we found it.
We estimate a power need of around 1 kW, with occasional peaks somewhat above that.

Our camp is a collaborative ecosystem: around 50% of our facilitators are from within our team, and 50% are invited from other camps, all aligned with our core themes—personal development, tantra, sexuality, presence, and authentic connection.

This is our **fourth year** at Borderland, and last year **10% (500 people)** of borderlings **attended our workshops!**

Despite the scale and quality of what we aim to offer, we lack one fundamental component: **_our own sound system_**.

Each year, we spend **significant time and energy** sourcing borrowed equipment, relying on favors and uncertain logistics, and this year it became even more diffictult. This limits our ability to fully focus on what we do best—creating powerful, immersive experiences.

We are seeking funding to invest in a reliable, simple sound system and wireless microphones.

Because **sound is not just a technical detail**—it is the backbone of presence, depth, and transformation. Without clear audio, workshops lose their impact. Without bass, the dance floor cannot come alive.

Here is what we are looking for:

*   Speakers: [https://tinyurl.se/speakers](https://tinyurl.se/speakers)
    
*   Microphones: [https://tinyurl.se/Microphones](https://tinyurl.se/Microphones)
    

With your support, we can remove logistical barriers and elevate the temple experience—allowing more participants to access meaningful growth, embodied insight, and shared magic.
TrollQueen. Want to get in touch? Find us as Tantri C Trolls on Facebook!

buckets.title: MULTI-DAY SITE-WIDE QUEST GAME — Questicles: Getting Worse Every Year
buckets.summary: ~ Cursing your Burn since 2023 ~ A fully immersive, theatrical quest game spanning multiple camps throughout Borderland, with challenges, games and more.

customFields.value: Dickhead of Receipts and Reckoning: emelie.al.ekstroem@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Questicles: The Golden Dickheads

*   Last year, we collaborated with twelve other camps who co-created puzzles and challenges for players. on their quests. If your camp would like to be a station of the quest please comment on this dream with a way to reach you.
    
*   You could be a part-time golden dickhead). Sign up for a shift and cause havoc on the playa.
    
*   Anyone else, find a clue and join the game, or engage with the Golden Dickheads on their wanderings.
    
*   Do not open our box.
We do not anticipate safety risks of note beyond the general walking around BL hazards. Players may opt to interpret the game in physical ways, at their own radical self-reliance.
Yes, but not significant amounts (lighting mainly). Amount to be finalised by placement and integrated in the camp plans and safety measures.
Excited voice level generally, sometimes enhanced with audio equipment to make voices more audible. Nothing crazy loud by any standards

It has a limited impact on the neighbours. It encourages participants to explore other neighbourhoods. Limited noise of chatter, laughter, maybe a little singing every now and again. No significant amplification. The game is active for a couple of hours in the afternoon. The rest of the time, we are very quiet indeed. We welcome our neighbours to be part of the game if they wish. They can play or co-create - see above.

Everything is portable and small scale, and based in our camp's space, It will be easily and quickly taken down and removed off site by the team on the final Sunday. We have storage in southern Sweden. Most will be saved to rerun an adapted version of the game next year or repurposed for other Borderland art projects. Sadly we cannot guarantee we can take the curse of the Borderland with us. Can we just call that bit permanent art?

## If you play just one quest game at The Borderland, don’t play ours!

There’s an ever-growing number of quest games. At Questicles we promise just one thing:

## Ours is the worst.

The most frustrating, time-wasting, overly complex and utterly pointless. No prize. Not even a sticker. (Actually, you do get a sticker.)

Questicles is a site-wide, multi-day, multiplayer immersive quest game / theatre project. It reshapes your event - sending you in new directions, toward new people, giving a kind of focus to your BL experience.

There is a curse on the Borderland. And we cast it. Cost we don't like you! Bad music, weird rashes, and the inability to climax (much like this game).

## Step into a game filled with riddles, mysteries, and monumentally stupid challenges

*   You won’t realise you’re playing.
    
*   We don’t want you to play.
    
*   We don’t even like you.
    
*   But we will play with you - real analogue humans. Remember that?
    
*   The game is co-created. With random camps & puzzles we didn't make and don't understand.  
    **Help us solve it, or we’re stuck at this Burn forever.**
    

## Why we need your money?

A mystery! But we’re making costumes, game props, and supplies for camps to run the game.

buckets.title: Music Ladder - by Dreamer’s Maze
buckets.summary: The Music Ladder is an industrial object made strange & playful. It is an interactive sound installation built around a metal ladder you listen to as you climb.

customFields.value: Dreamers Maze
The ladder is a fixed, stable metal structure secured to the floor. All wiring runs inside the ladder frame and the control enclosure is fully sealed.

Strike of the Music Ladder begins Sunday alongside the broader Dreamer’s Maze strike. Sensors are detached from the rungs and packed, the control enclosure unbolted, and the ladder, speaker, fabrics are removed from the space.
The Music Ladder sound system does not exceed 1000W and can be carried by one person.
Bea Zöllner (0031638858662)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Total estimated power draw is 200-400W including the full sound system. This requires no special power beyond what the Villa already provides.
It’s part of the Dreamer’s Maze and uses one room of the Villa.
There is no co creation planned for the Music Ladder.

There are no screens, no buttons, no instructions. The interface is the ladder itself. Participants engage intuitively, led by curiosity and the physical memory of climbing. You can run at it, or slow down and it will slow down, you could stand still across two rungs. It’s intuitive to be figured out.

The sound palette draws from industrial field recordings, processed metal resonance, low-frequency drones, and spatial textures to instrumental music intros or other unexpected sounds.

The sound system is built around a professional tops and subwoofer configuration. The subwoofer sits on the floor hidden beside the ladder, and physically resonates through the metal frame. The sound is not just heard. It is felt through the structure you are standing on.

The Music Ladder sits at the intersection of sculpture, instrument, and playground.

buckets.title: Relating Arts Workshop Space
buckets.summary: A curated space for connection, presence and human meetings — located in the Secret Garden.

The tent will be removed by the Secret Garden Camp as a part of our team strike Sunday (and Monday).
If you offer workshops or experiences related to connection and presence, you are warmly welcome to reach out.

• Sound system (medium speaker/PA): ~500–1000W

• Tent lighting: ~500–1000W
Ronja Lofstad - [Ronja.lofstad@gmail.com](mailto:Ronja.lofstad@gmail.com)

customFields.value: The space is held within the Secret Garden and cared for by the Gardeners. Both the camp and the workshop space share a focus on presence, care and respectful connection, supporting the peaceful atmosphere of the garden.

Borderland can be intense, fast-paced and overstimulating. This space offers a place to slow down, land and reconnect — with yourself, with others, with nature and with what is actually here.

Throughout the week, we will host a daily circling session as a steady anchor point, alongside a curated program of workshops and gatherings focused on presence and connection.

We are going to rent a 18m diameter starshade tent, pillows, cables, lights etc. from the burner gear back in Copenhagen (gearbox). We will also bring a 6m bell tent that will serve as a nice (heated) spot for smaller workshops.

The paper lanterns and meditation cushions will be donated to the storage space after Borderland and will thus benefit burners and local burns in years to come.
This is not a party space. We will use a medium-sized speaker for workshops when needed, but the overall intention is to maintain a calm and grounded environment.
