buckets.title: DanSINg  - Club Sin
buckets.summary: A roofed 10×10 meter dance floor, where the sinful, the silly, and the sexy collide, and DJs and live acts take you from day into night.

customFields.value:
![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dreamswtf/image/upload/v1775865868/dreams/oyx9kv7w5ayph2hhrclb.jpg)  
We aim to cluster with other camps exploring S+ themes, contributing to the creation of a 18+ zone within the Bison neighbourhood.

We plan for danSINg to run until 02:00 on weekdays and until 04:00 on weekends, though not necessarily every night. We will position ourselves in an “orange” spot according to this year's sound schedule.

To support coexistence with our neighbours, we will implement sound mitigation measures such as tilted speaker setups, directional sub setup, and, if possible, physical sound barriers like hay bales. Sound will be directed toward the south-west, away from complaining outside neighbours.

We are also part of pre-placement process, and open to dialogue for co-creation.
We will follow fire safety procedures, and ensure that all lighting and power cables are properly secured. We have appointed power and safety leads and will bring our own PDUs.

Everything we bring, we will take back with care. A strike lead will be responsible for ensuring a smooth teardown and packing process. Reusable bulky items will be stored in a container in Alversjö, while the rest will be taken back and stored safely in Gothenburg.
The total RMS power of our sound system is 7000W, with the smoke machine, DJ equipment, mixer, and lighting, the peak power consumption is 9000 W.
We will have a relatively powerful sound system consist of 3 18" subs and 4 15" tops, however we will follow the dB levels and sound schedule assigned to our location.

The Club SIN dance floor is conceived as a co-created space. DanSINg offers a platform for DJs, musicians who want to perform live, vocalists, dancers, and performers to co-create the magic together.

Do you want to perform at danSINg? Please fill [this](https://forms.gle/nvVCxv1ek2sZN33J9) form.

Aurimas @Amadeus amadeus00330 on discord

For detailed budget please check the [link](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1O6cO7D64t_AxszPsiIui6F9kl1ezzyRMNG63HUKFWKY/edit?usp=sharing): [https://tinyurl.com/ycy7aesz](https://tinyurl.com/ycy7aesz)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Have you committed sins, indulged in our juicy treats, and happily lost it all again at the casINo? Good. Now it’s time to lose yourself — to forget and to remember forever.

On Club SIN’s dance floor, you contribute to the collective delirium, a mass hysteria of messy, hot joy. As always at Club SIN, pleasure and pain, sexy and silly dance hand in hand (one after another and all at once). We bring you the sounds of the most wicked DJs of Borderland: disco, funk, house.

Do you also wish there was more live music at Borderland? Well, seek no more:

Built to shelter you from rain, wind, and the burdens of default life, our 10×10 m covered dance temple will tempt you with live music performances as the day turns into night. On one side, a large chill-out space invites you to soften and linger; on the other, a cage rises above flickering flames, with two poles inviting dancers to climb, spin, and ignite the night.

Choose glittering disco, groovy house, cool jazz. Let it all out at danSINg!  

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dreamswtf/image/upload/v1775942934/dreams/grwxsdkwskennqdfkrpu.png)

_There will be additions to last year's danSINg, a stage, a cage with two dance poles, and a large chill out area._

**Club SIN**

Club SIN brings the charm of a decadent nightclub to the burn: twisted casino games, a sweaty dance floor, juicy workshops, wicked performances, and a bar full of treats. But nothing comes for free; you’ll need _sincoins_ to access it all: play at the casino, enjoy treats, join workshops, or enter the sex+ luxury lounge or afterparties. Earn them by committing sins or accepting punishments from our carefully curated menus.  
Club SIN dreams: [danSINg](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoq41as0022xnznbk1cltsr?s=dansing&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), [caSINo](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqf1by002bxnzn07tkar8t), [SIN Bar](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoq0sjo001xxnznet8yelcp?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), [House of SIN](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqgx2t000aoyfnkk1azusr?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), and [SIN Salabim](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqi6s1001mbtyovxnh04lr?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA).  
Fill this [form](https://forms.gle/5n8esnHMj151yxvH9) for membership application.

buckets.title: Pierogi Welcome Feast
buckets.summary: A warm Slavic-inspired community kitchen with Babcia-style hospitality, handmade pierogi, a pickle bar, and open dumpling-making workshops.

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Things will be kept clean, sober and hygienic. To the best possibilities.
We keep the setup simple, so it’s easy to pack down. We strike on Sunday and leave the place better than we found it.
Hungry people eating kinda soundscape. We’ll be playing some fine slavic tunes too. Nothing too loud and crazy.
Pierogi bring people together. Pierogi spread love and joy and lets go.
Everyone can come make dumplings with us. No experience needed, we’ll show you how. Join for as long as you want and make sure to be ready to get a bit messy.
Babcia Kamp
We will need a fair amount of electricity to run 4 electric stoves, a fridge, and some small lighting like fairy lights.

As you arrive at the borderland universum, follow the scent before you follow the map. Steam rises from bubbling pots... Come closer and you’ll find Her. Babcia (Granny). Arms wide open, ready to feed you better. The kitchen stays open all through Tuesday and we will host workshops: come fold pierogi with us for as long as you desire, or just join us hungry and let others take care of you. We run a pickle bar too!

Wonder no more, weary seekers. It’s a place to nourish your tummies and give yourselves a warm grandma embrace. From the lands of hospitable Slavs comes a caravan with ultimate delights: dump-lings of all kinds and shapes, fillings to satisfy your hunger and your soul, pickle bar to acidify your smile and clear your palette for the unexpected kiss. Give yourself and your gut flora those gifts, my friends. 

Expect no less than babushkas' love at the counter. Look for colourful aprons, traditional lace and smile wrinkles. We will only charge you up with the dough power and ting-a-ling salty sour filling. Maybe ask you some deep question like only the old and wise ones do. Get you ready for the upcoming adventure, because who embarks on one with empty stomach ey?

buckets.title: Hot sauna 24/7 returns with a fruit bar!
buckets.summary: Last year we re-located one of the most legendary Saunas to Borderland. From arrival to strike the sauna was on 24/7 serving weary hippies. Lets do it again!

customFields.value:
Last year, Kappeli - the legendary hot sauna from Sompasauna - found a new home at Borderland. From arrival to strike, the fire never went out. Day and night, weary hippies stepped inside, and emerged softened, reset, and somehow more human. We also created a real Avanto cold plunge where you can jump in to cool off.

In 2026 we bring it back. This time with more JUICE 🧊💦

We‘re dreaming of adding a little fruit bar, serving frozen fruit and popsicles. Delivered by some irresistible and hot attendants 😏🔥 at unexpected times throughout the week 🤫✨
Hotter dimension

The Hot Sauna wants to preserve the history of Sompasauna. Total communal effort. Everyone is responsible of adding firewood, carrying water and so on! Last year this worked really well and we know it will also allow us to operate 24/7 this year.

We are part of pre-placement and right now it looks like a sauna/wellness area is forming on the lakefront on sunny hill. We would love to be a part of contributing here. We also have a covered clothes rack that we built last year that allows people to hang their clothes while taking a swim and have your towel and clothes covered even during some summer rain.
No sound
The building has been tried and tested as safe over the years at Sompasauna. We will also provide firefighting equipment.

The Sauna will stay in Alversjö for everyone to use during the year however to follow the building permit code we will move it back further away from the lake according to the instructions from the municipality. The placement after Borderland is up to the communityand we are more than happy to take suggestions if the place it stayed over the winter was good or if there are better ideas.
Eero @ Discord

This is not your loud, and super wild cabaret, it is a poetic dream of clown, song, physical theater, music and ritual - and of course a little silly to infuse our bones with lunacy.

It is an ode to the beauty and power of the moon, a moment of sweet togetherness to praise a celestial being

buckets.title: sensual glory
buckets.summary:
Sensual Glory: An Interactive  Installation
.a collaborative installation that invites participants to engage sensualy with others

customFields.value: DR Bill-bull-zohar yarom

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Sensual Glory: An Interactive Installation

_Sensual Glory_\* is a collaborative installation that invites participants to engage with others thruogh a Lycra-based chamber. Those who enter the chamber allow anyone on the outside to touch them in any way they desire; in essence, those outside "take" the touch for themselves from the person within.

The structure is crafted from Lycra—a smooth, cool, and pleasant fabric—which provides the person inside with a unique sensory experience, distinct from those on the outside. Additionally, the space is designed to facilitate a shared experience, allowing several people to inhabit the chamber simultaneously.

## A Bridge for Coexistence

This installation serves as a transitional space for people moving between different camps or areas. It facilitates a new, shared experience that connects separate spaces through a unique sensory encounter. Designed to be harmonious and non-intrusive, it fosters connection without negatively impacting the surrounding environments.

\### Core Concepts:

_Transitional Space:_\* A bridge between "here" and "there."

_Shared Experience:_\* Fosters coexistence through mutual presence.

_Zero Impact:_\* Enhances the journey between camps without disturbing the peace.

_safety :_

_Stability: The structure is 2.5m high, secured by three reinforced poles_\* to prevent movement or falling.

_Materials: Built from lightweight piping_\*, eliminating any physical danger to participants.

_Transparency: A prominent sign_\* explains the experience, ensuring all participants are fully informed before entering.

_Zero Impact:_\* The installation is non-intrusive and safe for both people and the surrounding environment  
Leave No Trace & Restoration Plan

1\. Systematic Deconstruction

_Power & Infrastructure:_\* Disconnect and coil all extension leads and cables.

_Fabric Removal:_\* Carefully remove and fold the Lycra on a clean surface to prevent catching desert debris.

_Framework:_\* Disassemble the flexible piping and remove the three support poles.

2\. Site Clean-up (MOOP Sweep)

_Micro-debris:_\* Conduct a "line sweep" of the area to collect small items like cut zip-ties, tape residue, or scraps.

_Ground Restoration:_\* Fill and level any small depressions caused by poles or foot traffic to match the natural terrain.

_Waste Removal:_\* All trash, including used zip-ties and packaging, will be bagged and hauled away. No waste will be left on-site.

3\. Final Verification

_Inventory Check:_\* Ensure all hardware (pegs, connectors, and tools) is accounted for.

_Visual Inspection:_\* A final walkthrough to confirm the space looks untouched, as if the installation was never there.

buckets.title: The Drop💧
buckets.summary:
Chill out zone ★ ★ ★ 
The frontiers of consciousness built a Forest-Temple-Lab. Drop in!  Observe the observer 👁️

customFields.value:
Where are you going? I'm going to the Drop. Drop in, drop out 💧🌈🌈

What are you dropping? Everything & Nothing 😇😈

We want to build **_The Drop_, a shared chill-out zone and workshop space** ★★★ like nothing you've ever walked into.

This space will be a glowing forest-temple 9-12m structure. Think lanterns, rugs, cushions, a candlelit paths leading inward, bodies resting on blankets. The kind of dream you walk toward without knowing why. Chai is always brewing. A place to luxuriate in being, where self and other dissolve. _A space built for delicious encounters._

We will have:

1.  **Daily** **meditations for altered states, curated and guided with immersive soundscapes**
    
2.  **Fireside-style talks with psychedelic scientists, meditation researchers, and more!**
    
3.  **Experimental workshops and rituals**
    

★ Including a special workshop with the one and only Alexander Bard!

And when there's nothing on, just drop in. Observe the observer. It's serious fun!

Drop in to commune. Drop in to be held. Drop into being.

**"You are not a drop in the ocean. You are the entire ocean in a drop."** — Rumi

We are an ecology: entangled and fundamentally co-creative.

We are psychedelic & meditation researchers, philosophers, psychoanalysts, artists, animists and meditators from ancient lineages. We bring what we do out of our labs, into the forest, and translate it into something you can feel in your body.

Want to bring something to the Drop?

Sound artists, meditators, philosophers, researchers, ritualists, if you have an offering that belongs in a forest-temple, **Drop** **by!**

We need the forest. Ideally near water, definitely somewhere quiet, but not so far from everything that people can't stumble upon us by accident. The Drop is a contemplative space and a natural neighbour for anyone who values calm. We'll work with the pre-placement process to find the right spot.
We'll have a small PA system for guided meditations and sound immersions, designed to be felt inside the space, not heard outside it. Think warmth, not volume. We're not a sound camp.

Strike on Sunday. Canvas tent down, poles stacked, rugs rolled, cushions packed, fire pit cleared and cold. Final MOOP sweep Sunday. We came from the forest, we'll leave it like we were never here. Except maybe with some of the magic of the drop. (Beyond senses)
The canvas tent will be properly storm-pegged and secured. Fire extinguisher on site. Space holders present during all guided sessions.
We will need enough electricity for a small PA system and some lights and mics.

Imagine wandering through the festival grounds on a sunny afternoon when suddenly, in the distance, you spot a colourful flag, hear a burst of laughter, and catch a whiff of something sweet in the air. You follow the sound – and find us.

We are the Care Bears: a small, roaming crew of joy-bringers pulling a wagon full of Katjes gummy bears across the festival grounds. For a few hours each day, across three days, we’ll drift from spot to spot, set up wherever the people are, and turn every corner of the festival into a little moment of sweetness and play.

Want some gummy bears? Win them. A roll of the dice, a round of rock-paper-scissors, a moment of connection – and the bears are yours. Our gummy bears are vegan or vegetarian, so everyone gets a shot at the prize.

We’ll be impossible to miss: dressed in fun, colourful costumes and flying our little Care Bear flag high so you can always find us, no matter where we’ve wandered to.

This is not a stand. This is a roaming dream – three days, a few hours, one wagon, endless smiles.

buckets.title: The rise of Chai-Hulud!
buckets.summary: A mysterious wagon with a long meandering tail that has the ability to bring the heat of the dessert to the bellies of burners of all ages!

customFields.value: Space-Jarl Zaaki, Email: ZackariasHeydorn@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: Nein, the Chai would be prepared over open fire and the rest is run by elbow grease!

If funded most of the building of the artwork would be done before the event by the camp members of Njourunns (space) garden , but anyone would be free to participate in the boiling of the Chai-tea.

The primary opportunity for co-creation would be to enable our ridiculous sketch whenever it is out rolling, and play along with whatever stupidity that might follow from that. And of course to partake in the glorious warm gift dispensed from the innards of the "mighty" sand worm.
There will be some soundboks go levels of atmospheric music while the worm is active. But nothing late or too intrusive.

The preparation of the Chai could cause a bit of jealousy or possibly irritation for anybody sensitive to fragrant smells like Cinnamon and Cummin. The fremen outfits could be a bit scary for young burners, but the ridiculousness of the sand worm will take that down several notches! :)
The whole thing is built on a small wagon that will be brought back home after the burn. If the worm survives it will be saved for future stupidity.
The long tail might be a bit difficult to keep away from things, but it will be surrounded by wanna-be dessert people at all times while its out and about!
Njorunns (Space) Garden

Imagine that you are walking along the playa peacefully, occupied with deep thoughts on the universe, the principles and that extremely cute human you saw dancing at the poles earlier. Then suddenly you hear a ominous and rhythmic thumping in the distance. Oblivious to the danger you are in you decide to check it out, and as you pass around a corner in the landscape you see some people looking like they brought their burning-man outfits to the wrong burn. They singlemindedly spank the ground with evil grins behind their facemasks...

Then from the horizon it comes: a breathtakingly underwhelming contraption built on a small wagon with creaking wheels. It seem to consist mainly of teeth and tail, drawn by more fremen looking types running like the full force of the Harkonnens were behind them. The PVC based lifeform takes aim at you, and before you know it its teeth are right in your face! As you start fearing for your sanity, the innards of the worm reveals its steaming hot treasure, the oat-milk Chai of life! Infused with the heat of the dessert, and of course.... spice!

The idea is to build an 10m long worm-thing with ALOT of teeth, and then serve an epic Chai tea prepared over fire to rejuvenate the community <3

buckets.title: Foxhole 2026 – done properly
buckets.summary:
You know how hot the Foxhole gets. That's where we're starting this year.
And a few other things that are overdue. 🦊

customFields.value: The Foxhole
_We expect to pull about 4500W power from the grid, similar to last year._
_We plan to strike mainly on Sunday, last moop sweep done on Monday._

_We are looking forward to taking part in the placement process and the sound zones /policy discussions. We want to find a neighbourhood where we can have good synergy and relations with our neighbours, like we did in the Citrus Plaza in 2025_

_Are you a musician and you think you fit our vibe? Come collaborate with us, we are looking for collaborations and live acts. Contact us at_ **_foxholeborderland @gmail .com_**

_Also see our_ [Bar dream](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnp4eju80000udjo07x5rhyz) and [Tent dream](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnp3kvsy000qz8vv3h12vtn8)
_We always have 3 foxes (one for each part of the Foxhole) ensuring our guests are safe and comfortable, rotating on 2-3hour shifts. We plan to really improve our fire safety this year._
_We have a sound system which is more precise than loud, so it's a good starting point. We will coordinate with neighbours about timing, & levels. We will fine tune our decibel meter based on 2025._

_OlleR (see co-creators)  
On discord:_ **_.dirty\_fox._**

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
🌡️ **Let's start with the heat.** Last year was too hot & humid. To get more oxygen we opened all the tent windows, which didn't help the atmosphere. This year we're investing in industrial fans and proper airflow ducting.

🦊 **The wider story** 2025 was a comeback, and it worked — but talk to any fox and we'll tell you the same thing: we only just scraped by in terms of inventory. Borrowed lights we can't borrow again. Electrics that weren't great. Decor patched together rather than designed. Not quite enough seating. This dream is about closing the gap between "it worked" and "it's what it should be."

💡 **Lights.** We borrowed our entire LED lighting rig last year and can't do that again.

🧯 **Safety, done properly.** With all that fabric, fire safety isn't optional. We need proper extinguishers and a better emergency exit.

🛋️ **More seats, more style.** More couches, more cushions, and decor that flows through the whole space.

🚪 **An upgraded entrance.** The lobby was a bottleneck last year and made our queues longer. This year we plan proper coat hanging, shoe racks, more shelving.

💋 **Why it matters** We love the Foxhole. 2025 proved we could rebuild. Help us build the version we've been working towards all along.

Dansbanderland, the camp most remembered for their traditional Swedish dance court and for "Oh, nice to hear something else!" before you head back to the techno, needs your support this year!

We've managed to build a dance court, we've held dance workshops for couples, for linedance enthusiasts and for singles looking for the right moves on the dancefloor. buckets.title: Crystal Trees of Life: Magic Maker's Moment
buckets.summary: Grow a tiny tree of life from wire and gemstones. Wear it, hang it, or gift it to someone you love. No experience needed, just your hands and a little wonder.

customFields.value: Jousting Jesters
Quiet. Conversation-level or low gentle music at most.

In the middle of all this beautiful chaos, come sit down and make something with your hands.

You'll twist your own tree of life from gold-toned wire and colourful crystal beads: shaping a trunk, fanning out branches, and decorating crystals until something alive-looking emerges. It's tactile, meditative, and quietly magical.

You choose what form it takes: a hanging dreamcatcher with crystals swaying below, a pendant on a necklace chain, or a pair of earrings. All tools and materials are provided. No experience or skill required, just curiosity and a willingness to get your fingers a little tangled.

The session is drop-in friendly and take roughly 2 hours. Come alone, drag your campmates, or stumble in mid-adventure.
You bring the intention, we bring the materials. You co-create by attending. These will be like a maker's space rather than a very structured workshop.
A calm, seated craft space with no loud music or flashing lights. Just some tools, and good company. We welcome neighbours, wanderers, and anyone who needs a quiet moment to make something beautiful.

buckets.title: Pimp Our Clown Ride
buckets.summary:
This is not just a golf cart.
This is an opportunity to transform something simple into one of the festival’s most beloved and needed little helper.

customFields.value: This cart is open for co-creation, and everyone is welcome to help decorate and bring the concept to life, as long as all added items and decorations can be fully removed at the end. Since the cart is a rental, it is important that it can be returned in its original condition.

Imagine a colorful joy-spreader on wheels, a true clown mobile, rolling through the playa with music, laughter, and an infectious happy energy that lifts the atmosphere wherever it goes. It moves quickly to wherever help is needed, whether that means transporting equipment, assisting staff, or being there in a moment of need, but along the way it does something even more valuable: it creates moments of happiness.

As it comes rolling by, people turn their heads. Children laugh, adults smile, and the whole area feels a little brighter and colorful. It becomes more than just a practical vehicle, it becomes a moving symbol of the festival’s spirit: playful, welcoming, and full of life.

Decorated with bright colors, balloons, sparkling lights, bubble ”jetpacks”, and fun clown-inspired details, the golf cart becomes something special in its own right. A mobile burst of joy that can appear wherever the energy is needed most.

This year, we have the chance to take something functional that we already have access too and make it unforgettable. Let’s bring this dream to life and turn our golf cart into one of this year’s big talking point; a clown mobile that doesn’t just move through the burn, but drives straight into people’s hearts.
Since the cart is a rental, it is important that it can be returned in its original condition.

buckets.title: Bring Reflections to Borderland
buckets.summary:
Geometric mirror structures that transform space into surrealistic, shifting realities.
Hard shapes merge into the organic nature of Borderland

customFields.value: Totally silent

Adam Eliasson  
+46706330445

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: The 40ish Thives

The project builds on 40 mirror sheets (3m² each) already on site, making them a shared resource for co-creation.

We open them up to anyone who has a use for mirrors in their project, to build, reshape, and integrate into their own ideas.

Together, we can use the mirrors across the space!
The sheets should be placed in a way that do not pose any risk to any burners. The material is acrylic and the sheets are fairly light.
For infinity mirrors there will be some electricity needed but the placement is flexible.
The construction should be made in a way so the sheets can be reused.

This dream is intended to co‑exist with its surroundings. Rather than competing with neighboring artworks, it should enhance them. We should actively seek placements where the presence of the work strengthens and elevates the art around it, instead of infringing upon it.

**Reflections to Borderland** is a landscape intervention using large vertical mirror panels and mirrored geometrical shapes placed throughout the forest, paths, and open areas at Borderland. The mirrors are installed as freestanding or lightly suspended planes between trees or on other support structures.

The work does not intend to introduce a new central structure or destination. Instead, it alters how existing spaces are perceived.

The mirrors reflect parts of the environment while hiding others. A tree line may appear to continue where it doesn’t. An artwork may appear twice, partially, or at a distance that isn’t real. In some positions, the mirrors effectively remove parts of the forest from view. In others, they extend it.

Reflections to Borderland is spread across multiple locations rather than gathered in one place. Visitors encounter it while moving. Light, weather, and time of day change how the mirrors behave, meaning the work is never fixed or fully predictable.

The project creates moments where orientation slips slightly—where visitors stop trusting what they see and adjust their movement or attention. Nothing new is imposed on the landscape; perception is the only thing being manipulated.

**Concept Overview:**

Step out of the dusty reality and into a pocket of serenity. **The Zen Zone** is an immersive sensory sanctuary designed to offer a moment of deep peace and cosmic connection. Inside a sheltered, dream-like space, participants are invited to lie down under a sky of glowing, hand-crafted clouds that pulse with a soft, ethereal light.

**The Experience:**

The heart of the installation features a **giant glowing Lotus flower**, symbolizing purity and rebirth, radiating a gentle violet hue. As you settle onto comfortable mattresses, the air is filled with the grounding resonance of **Tibetan singing bowls** and ambient soundscapes. The flickering of candles adds a warm, intimate touch, creating a safe haven for meditation, rest, or quiet conversation.

**Interaction:**

This isn't just a display; it’s a communal dream. We invite burners to take a break from the high energy of the city, breathe deeply, and reconnect with their inner selves amidst the clouds.

Imagine lamps in different shapes and colors hanging, standing, and gently swaying in the wind. Spread throughout the camp, they make Nimenoma easy to find and hard to walk past.

One of the tents is a dark tent where we host workshops during the day. Inside, it is set up with cushions and blankets so you can sit or lie down comfortably. Here we offer small-group, experience-based workshops such as **Sober Psychedelic Light Journey**, **Time Machine** and **Eye Gazing**.

The second tent is a bright party tent that functions as a shared living room. This is where you will find the bar, a small sound system, hay bales, blankets, and cozy places to relax, have a drink or dance. As evening arrives, the atmosphere shifts. The bar opens, the music takes up more space and the camp becomes more lively. We serve mock’n’cocktails as well as salty, delicious fresh fries.

Throughout the week, we host different themed evenings, including early 2000s disco and love songs, a Mexican night with frozen margaritas guided by a sommelier, and a Finnish night with disco and Jaloviina.

Support other parts of what we are building through our related dreams:  
**Sober Psychedelic Light Journey  
TinyFries**

We cannot wait to see you out there!
Our aim is to create awesome vibes and experiences, and we welcome ideas and any projects/dreams that might fit with ours. Facilitators could host sessions in our Nimenoma tent. Reach out to us!

Our camp will be open and inviting. It fits well in an area where people naturally pass by and we would love to be surrounded by lots of daytime workshop/events. Camps not needing access to a Fire road could camp behind us.
Mostly calm background grooves but when the energy is up the music follows. We keep it at a level that’s not disturbing to our neighbours. Our aim is to bring positive vibes.

Drinks will be made fresh, things that need to be chill are stored in a refrigerator and freezer.  
We have fire extinguishers. All electricity will be shielded from rain. Tent lines will be marked.

We will strike on Sunday and we will take care of all our own materials. If any materials bought with dream money makes sense to keep in Alversjö we're open to letting these remain in the community for maximum benefit to Borderland.
Yes, enough to power the fridge (200W), freezer (200W), speakers (300W) and lights (600W). During active times: power consumption around 2000-3000W.

buckets.title: Sinnergirl
buckets.summary: Sinnergirl is a six metre effigy centred on a female figure with one angelic and one demonic face, surrounded by walls of pain, grief, hope, and joy.

customFields.value:
Sinnergirl is a six metre tall effigy installation centred on a human like female figure embodying duality through two faces, one angelic and one demonic. The angelic side presents a large illuminated brain as a gift.

From her shoulders extend wings constructed from timber frames and fabric, reaching the ground where they also contribute to the structural stability of the piece.

The structure is framed by four angled walls arranged in two pairs. On one side are the Wall of Pain and the Wall of Grief, and on the other the Wall of Hope and the Wall of Joy. These walls create a spatial structure that guides movement and interaction. The wings rest along the folding axes of the surrounding walls, visually and structurally linking the elements of the installation. Sinnergirl stands overseeing the walls and the testimonies.

Borderlings are invited to carve, write, and leave testimonies on the walls, making their experiences part of the installation. At night, projection mapping is used to cast visuals onto the wings and the structure, accompanied by dynamic LED lighting that animates the piece. In the final burn, Sinnergirl becomes a collective act of release, transforming what has been created into memory, ash, and light.

Sinnergirl is designed to coexist with the surrounding environment and the wider Borderland community. Its open structure allows Borderlings to approach, pass through, and spend time within the space without creating barriers or separation from its surroundings.

The installation is planned to be built by a plaza in the Bison neighbourhood. The project team will actively participate in the pre-placement process and engage in dialogue with potential neighbouring camps to ensure an organic integration into the area.

The installation invites both individual and collective engagement, accommodating moments of quiet reflection as well as shared rituals and gatherings.
No music or amplified sound is planned as part of the installation. The sound will primarily consist of the presence of people, including conversation, small gatherings, and occasional ceremonies.

The structure will be stabilised with ropes and anchoring screws, with calculations reviewed by our civil engineer project member. For fire safety, the structure remains open for easy access and exit.
The walls will be carried to the selected burn site for Borderland 2026. The rest of the structure will be stored for a future burn.
We expect a total load of around 2 to 4 kW for lighting and visual elements at night time.

Dr.Catman @aslansson  
For detailed budget please check the [link](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IBvT5piEXwDXy3YroivQRIZSJ7NQEcqu5fMZ3Ba50BQ/edit?usp=sharing): [https://tinyurl.com/2n4ybpr5](https://tinyurl.com/2n4ybpr5)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Sinnergirl is conceived as a co created installation, both in its making and in its use. The structure will be built in the two weeks preceding the Borderland build week, ideally together with volunteers and early arriving Borderlings who wish to take part in the creative process.

During the event, the installation will host ceremonies and gatherings, and Borderlings will be invited to actively shape the space by leaving their testimonies on the walls through writing, carving, and other forms of expression. In this way, the work will be not only built by the community, but continuously co-created by it.  
  
**Team**

**Dandelion (Daniel Chadwick)** – lead artist and build lead. A professional carpenter with experience from Burning Man and Nordic burns. Led major builds at Borderland, including Club SIN and a 4 metre effigy.

**Dr. Catman / Mr. Aslan (Devrim Umut Aslan)** – project lead. Responsible for coordination, planning, budgeting, and overall delivery. Co-develops the concept.

**Jonasium (Jonas Åslund)** – civil engineer and safety lead. Responsible for structural calculations and ensuring stability and safety.

**Sufi (Burak Kaan Canbaz)** – artist. Contributes to visual and material expression, including surface work and artistic detailing.

**Björn (Björn Holmkvist)** – electronics engineer. Responsible for power, logistics, and strike.

**Jonas Johansson** – visual and light lead. Works with projections, lighting, and spatial visual design.

**Rose Hallgren** – architect and designer. Supports build process.

**Vladimir Kuznetsov** – engineer. Contributes to structural thinking, build, detailing, and technical problem solving.

buckets.title: MUSEUM OF BAD ART (MoBA)
buckets.summary: Welcome to the worlds first museum solely dedicated to Bad Arts, and the aesthetic, artistic and academic center for the Bad Arts movement.

customFields.value: We will not use scandalous amounts of electricity, other than some lighting, sound and minor artsy stuff.
No safety risks to worry about, except for the visitors expanded notion of art and aesthetics.
The MoBA camp will see too it that the space we occupy will be in as impeccable a shape as it was before our celebrated arrival.
The Museum of Bad Arts will be hosted by the MoBA camp and it's collaborators.

The Museum of Bad Arts aims to be located in one of the rooms at the lower floor of the Barn (most probably in the Living Room), and will have a collaboration with the newly opened office of the Gossip Gazette. Our exhibition halls will provide a well-needed public space for cultural and artistic interchange, and we will be happy to be transparent and collaborative with any neighboring projects.

We are part of the pre-placement process and are already in communication with potential other projects in the Barn and the surrounding area.
TBD, contact Filip until we find someone more suitable

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
**The Museum of Bad Arts (MoBA)** aims to exhibit, educate and evolve expressions and ideas found in the archives of the Bad Arts movement. Further still, the museum will act as an impermanent institution for the movement, and a creative hub developing its different artistic and philosophical outputs.

The Museum will provide several exhibition halls, both for showcasing a representable selection of contemporary examples of Bad Arts aesthetics, and as a dynamic surface on which to project the ever-changing multitude of Bad Art created at the Borderland during the week. As such, the Museum is on one hand educational and inspirational, lifting up the growing importance of a unique strand within the contemporary art scene, and on one hand pushing forward in the creation of works of arts following the movements aesthetic ideals.

If you are unfamiliar with the Bad Arts movement, we can recommend this classic historical overview written by one of the founders of the Museum: [\[link to history pdf\]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JZaRNbktRTaYrmkpUEm1M_0wyhORm_7l/view?usp=drive_link)

MoBA promises a highly conceptual programme to celebrate our opening year, with bad exhibitions, artistic workshops, vernissages and panel debates.
Sound levels will be sparse and mostly pleasantly bad. There might be a lively vernissage at some point, and potentially a DJ-set with only modernist opera.

The Museum of Bad Arts will be facilitated by the MoBA camp, specifically dedicated to the institutional responsibilities of this cultural milestone. But the Bad Arts movement is already spreading in wide circles all over Borderland, and practitioners are strongly encouraged to contact us for collaborative projects, and/or to perform their own Bad Art in their respective premises.

We will have one or two exhibition halls for our non-permanent permanent collections from some of the Bad Arts movements different branches, and one dedicated for different projects and exhibitions throughout the week. We wish to invite anyone who feel drawn to the Bad Arts programme with the possibility of presenting their œuvre in a professional setting, and/or other forms of collaborations.

We will most probably host a number of workshops and panel debates on the subject of Bad Art where you are very welcome to participate.

buckets.title: The "Everything is Political" Chai Stand_2.0
buckets.summary: We are offering homemade chai recipes while intervening on the inevitable, inescapable, and sometimes inconvenient fact that everything is political

customFields.value:
Step into our chai cave where the air hums with sacred vibrations and the aroma of cardamom hangs thick enough to choke capitalism!

Imagine yourself floating in a cocoon of powerful mantras that vibrate your soul while you sip on chai so divine it could make a goddess weep with joy. Perfect for when you've lost your way between getting a tea at the Sanctuary or chasing your friends to Mumimaa. Our chai isn't just a beverage, it's a liquid revolution!

When you emerge from your mantra-induced coma, join us for chai-fueled conversations about how the 11 principles are radical and political - and how great that is!

We welcome:

*   People who already know everything is political
    
*   People who are terrified this is true, but want the opportunity to embrace this fear
    
*   People who want good chai and are prepared to chant for the liberation and joy of all living beings in the meantime
    
*   Anyone who can handle the truth that even in "No-Borders-Land," power dynamics still exist
    

_P.S. And if talking about politics is not your cup of tea at Borderland.. well, sweetie, you've come to the wrong chai stand. But we'll still serve you tea, we're not monsters._
We are open to co-creation to bring in more non-Western cultures into the space, we would especially love to co-create with other POC who want to share their cultures and experiences at Borderland!

We will be on a move-able trolley, probably finding a spot for the day that doesn't disrupt anyone. We won't be taking up a lot of space and will be mindful that if we are to use a simple sound system that we are in the right zones for that. We think we will impact our neighbors only positively by offering them easy access to our delicious chai!
We will have at most a one-speaker sound system that won't be very loud. Since we are on the move we will ensure that we don't disrupt any neighbors in the spots we choose to settle in for the day.
We will ensure their lives are not in danger by ensuring we have the right precautions and safety on all fronts!
Our trolley will be easily dismantled in less than a few hours! Our set-up will be simple and effortless, and we will make sure to collect all of our belongings and THERE WILL BE NO MOOP!
Alex Myerson, alex@myersons.co.uk

customFields.value:
_As you walk through the bustling landscape, you hear a noise.  
There is sounds all around you, Borderland is never quiet. In the distance you can hear the thumping of dancefloors and workshops. Closer by even is the sound of conversation, communal happiness and clanking pans_

Your curiosity have been piqued and your mission has been set.  
You chase the sound, voices raised in a harsh tone, answered in a mild.  
You hear the clanking of metal hitting both wood and bone, but can't place it.

First it hits your eyes.  
A bustling kitchen filled to the brim half-naked and sweaty vikings, armed with knifes and attacking every ingredient to their will.

You get closer and then it hits you like the morning train to Frankfurt. That smell.  
That smell that breaks through and chemical walls and while you feel no hunger, your body craves it.  
The smell of freshly made Fries pierces your nostrils as you realise that what your body craves is fat and carbohydrates in order to function and find the peace you are looking for.

We aim to be a warm and welcoming neighbour.  
Our camp is built around hospitality, but also around practical care: moderate sound levels, thoughtful placement, and systems for water, dishes, and LNT that help us minimise our impact.

We want to create a lively but grounded social space, not just a kitchen, but a homey gathering place in the forest.
Half kitchen and half dancefloor: lively, social, and full of clattering pots rather than pounding bass.
Our camp will include fire extinguishers, fire blankets, first aid kits, and clear routines for handling heat, equipment, and the kitchen workspace.

This dream is built through participation.  
We cook together, build together, clean together, and make the space real together. The kitchen is not only a place where food appears — it is a place of communal effort, shared practice, and many hands working side by side.

Last year we served approximately 1,150 portions during Borderland. That was made possible through a lot of labour, coordination, and care. This year we want to keep feeding people, and strengthen the systems that make large-scale gifting possible in a more sustainable and welcoming way.

If you want to help cook, prep, clean, build, or simply be part of making this space happen, you are warmly welcome to join us  
[https://forms.gle/kobanNSLVjksGVf3A](https://forms.gle/kobanNSLVjksGVf3A)

buckets.title: Touch This Fabric Blanket Book
buckets.summary: Is it a book? Is it a blanket? Is it a tactile textile experimentation? Is it a soft sculpture that you read through your senses?

customFields.value:
_Is it a book? Is it a blanket? Is it a tactile textile experimentation? Is it a soft sculpture that you read through your senses?_ 

_Whatever it is, there are no words, nothing to intellectualise. It can only be sensed, a quiet presence reawakened by caressing the pages. A personal and shared experience, intimate yet collective, the weight of the comforting blanket encloses on you while stories are felt through touch, allowing for tactility as a grounding practice._ 

  
_Touch This Fabric Blanket Book invites you to reconnect with your senses within the stimulating realms of The Borderlands. Participants are encouraged to engage freely: to touch, sit, lie down, or wrap themselves within the piece.This creates a sense of body immersion, transforming reading into a physical and emotional experience. An invitation to slow down, to make moments for textures and mere existence_.

The book is an evergoing project and for any recommendations of what you enjoy touching, I am open for tips and recommendations. If there is interest in co-creation in person, contact Emma Botin, @[emmalovisabotin@gmail.com](mailto:emmalovisabotin@gmail.com)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Between the trees, a volume of light hangs in the air. Vertical lines of colour, arranged in a grid, pulsing and shifting like something alive. You can see it from a distance. You walk closer. You walk in. Now you're inside it.

Flux Capacitor is a scalable light installation — a grid of weatherproof WS2815 LED strips suspended vertically from above, creating a luminous room with no walls. At minimum, it's a 2×2 grid of 2-metre strips — an intimate glowing corridor. At full power, it's an 8×8 grid of 5-metre strips spanning 3.5×3.5 metres on the ground and towering overhead. Sixty-four vertical lines of individually addressable colour surrounding you on all sides.

The patterns are generative, driven by custom-programmed ESP32 microcontrollers on purpose-built PCBs — no breadboard energy. Slow organic gradients, cascading waves, sudden flashes, or gentle breathing light that responds to the darkness around it.

The whole thing runs off-grid. A battery bank charges by day via solar and powers the installation through the night. It turns on at dusk. It turns off at dawn. In between, it catches anyone who walks too close.

You've been warned.

**What we need funding for:**

LED strips, microcontrollers, PCB manufacturing

buckets.title: Discotech Engineering
buckets.summary: A precision-tuned, day time sound camp for warm and inviting dancefloors. Sound you feel as much as you hear, paired with engineered electrolytes!

customFields.value:
🌿 We are a **sound-focused dream**, and we take responsibility for how that affects our surroundings and actions with minimizing noise.

We will actively work with pre-placement to ensure we are positioned where sound belongs. At the same time, we aim to exist in balance with nearby dreams and the beautiful landscape.

Through dialogue, coordination and mutual awareness, we want sound, rest and interaction to complement each other, not compete.

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: ⚡ We need **electricity for sound** mainly. Estimated load is 2-3 kW, with headroom up to 4-5 kW. We request 32A at 230V, or equivalent distribution.
🍃 Strike on Sunday if weather is amazing. Possible strike on Saturday, depending on collaboration and logistics situation with Plutonia. A thorough **M.O.O.P**\-sweep on our final day.
🔊 Our system is built for **clarity** and **physical presence** rather than raw volume. Expect a immersive, warm experience, where sound is felt as much as it is heard. dB tracking with S.O.U.N.D.
🛡️ We build with care through stability. We will provide **water, electrolytes, sunshade, earplugs (for both grown-ups and kids!)**. Fire extinguisher at our disposal.
**Discotech Engineering**

You’re on your way somewhere… maybe down to the lake, or just passing through Sunny Hill.

🌊 _Then you feel it......_

Not music. Not yet.  
A low pulse moving through the ground.  
Soft, precise, calibrated... _Engineered._

🌅 _You slow down......_

Light flickers in the reflections of the lake.  
Sun rays drift through the warm afternoon air.  
Someone turns around and smiles like you’re already part of it.

**Welcome to Discotech Engineering.**

A daytime, golden hour sound camp where we engineer atmosphere in real time. Carefully tuned for a warm, physical, high-fidelity dancefloor. Music matched to the moment, as the Swedish summer sunset slowly approaches.

From years around Europe and beyond: forests, beaches, basements, festival grounds. We have been observing what happens when sound, space and people align. Discotech Engineering is our attempt to recreate that.

_No stage. No distance._  
This is not something you watch.  
It’s something you step into.  
A precision-tuned sound system, designed for intimacy, not scale.

And because calibration also applies to humans operating in heat and sunlight, the bar will serve ⚡**Engineered Electrolytes** ⚡

💗 **Join the build, help us make it real!**

🤝 **Discotech Engineering** is not a closed system. Most equipment will be used from, and in collaboration with, the lovely people of **Plutonia**.

We are also open for collaboration with dreamers in need of a tent in stunning Sunny Hills. We welcome all to reach out: selectors, visual artists, breathworkers etc. If it adds to the feeling, we’re listening!

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
The plan is for this dream to stay in storage (probably with Magic Banya camp) at Alversjö after being taken down to facilitate use coming years.

**Dimensions (packed):** 4.2 x 0.5 x 0.5 m (L x W x H)  
**Weight:** 237 kg

Strike time should be aprox. 2h.
I have joined the Magic Banya Mist camp but we are not sure this exciting dream fits the calm mood of the Banya camp so if any other camp would like to host the swing, do let me know!

This dream is to bring a Kiiking swing from Estonia to Borderland and to gift the thrill of a 360 loop to other burners, to let burners get a thrill and play and to try to swing their way all the way round. Loopers receive a medal!

Kiiking (swinging in Estonian) has a long tradition in Estonian culture, this has evolved into an extreme sport invented in the 1990s which involves a person making a swing gain increasingly more momentum, until you manage to pass over the spindle in the centre.  
In a kiiking swing, a person is fastened to the swing base by their feet. the swing arms are made of steel to enable a person by skillful pumping to swing 360 degrees going over the the centre of the swing.  
[https://youtu.be/xJkjyq\_or70?si=TnJDBt6fDFZeK3jZ](https://youtu.be/xJkjyq_or70?si=TnJDBt6fDFZeK3jZ)

Have applied to have the swing be paid over two year installments (waiting approval) so it would stay in Alversö for future Borderlands so not be a one off expense.

Given the forces and hights involved it is not a toy to play with unsupervised, it would need to be operated by a dedicated team that instructs and helps burners swing safely and to make sure no one wanders in under the swing. For safetly reasons a new swing should be bought, I am in contact with the manufacturer.

buckets.summary: The Spy Bar is a top-secret operation disguised as a bar… or maybe the other way around. Either way, you’re already being watched.

customFields.value: Camp will strike the bar on sunday and leave no trace.
Nothing Suspicious Here

**The Spy Bar** is a top-secret operation disguised as a bar… or maybe the other way around. Either way, you’re already being watched.

To enter, you’ll need to pass through a highly sophisticated security system and might leave with a top secret mission. 

If someone calls you “Agent,” just go with it, you don’t ask questions in a place like this. Conversations are held in hushed tones, mostly because no one wants to look like they don’t know what’s going on.

The drinks? Classified. You don’t order them, you receive them. Some are strong enough to make you forget your mission. Others are strong enough to _be_ your mission. If your drink arrives with a tiny envelope, do not panic, but if you do, there will be newspapers to hide behind.

There will be gadgets. Some work. Some are just there to make you feel like they work. Mirrors, blinking lights, mysterious buttons, pressing them is highly encouraged and strongly not recommended.

If you think you’re just here for a drink…  
you’re already involved.
We will organize it within the camp. Let us know if you feel eager to help or think it would mix well with one of your dreams!
Only secret tracks played, of course, at an appropriate volume.
No extra electricity needed, will use camp electricity.
Invisible spies, will not be noticed. To the trained eye or ear, we will be DELIGHTFUL!
Can't promise anything. Just kidding, we're professional security workers. We will make sure all our guests feel safe and well taken of.

buckets.title: Breadcrumb Bureau
buckets.summary: Expect sidequests of all sizes; tiny clues in the forest, whispered rumors at a bar or artifacts that unlock secrets between dreams that nobody asked for..

customFields.value: Low. We are not a sound camp, which is good news for absolutely everyone, including nearby conversations.
Gingerbread HQ (Witches Welcome)
Most of this dream is portable and reusable. We remove all physical clues and props, leave no trace, and keep the mythology only where it belongs: in people’s heads.

Breadcrumb Bureau is made for co-creation. We welcome camps, bars, artworks, roaming characters, prop makers, clue hiders, symbol designers, rumor spreaders, and anyone who enjoys making things unnecessarily mysterious.

We are currently co-creating with Kishmastle Space Station, Gate of Alvheim and Fungal Refuge, but warmly welcome more dreams, camps, characters, and curious weirdos to join in.
Low to medium risk. Participation stays optional, readable, and easy to opt out of, because nobody should need a permit to leave a weird conversation.
Breadcrumb Bureau is built to sneak between dreams, not sit on top of them. It stays light, optional, and mostly minds its own business while quietly causing trouble in the background.
Very low. The dream runs mostly on humans, rumors, and the occasional battery, which frankly is already more infrastructure than some myths deserve.

HUGR1 / Max  
Discord: hugr.one

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Wanderers, dreamers, and accidental spies... the Breadcrumb Bureau has scattered its first clues across Borderland! At its core, we're about turning Borderland into a more connected world by infusing silly sidequests all over the playa. We'll create playful excuses to drag your lazy ass between spots, talk to strangers, spot details you'll regret noticing, and become part of a shared myth larger than any one camp.

Rather than being a stationary dream, the Breadcrumb Bureau works as a light layer between other dreams: clues in the forest, strange objects, whispered rumors, and small missions that link worlds across the playa. Some may simply stumble onto a clue, others may carry out quests between camps, and a few may dive deeper into rituals, initiations, and emergent nonsense. A whisper overheard at night may lead to a ritual by dawn. Participation is optional, low-threshold, and gloriously unserious.

The long-term vision is a reusable system for participation, discovery, and myth-making that can evolve over multiple years. Breadcrumb Bureau adds a missing layer between dreams: interconnection, making Borderland feel a tad more connected, way stranger, and a lot harder to explain to outsiders.

buckets.title: The Fungal Refuge
buckets.summary: A warm, mushroom-inspired haven where tired bodies and tender hearts can land.

customFields.value: @abw1986 at Discord

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We provide a space where people can feel held emotionally and physically, with focus on consent, comfort, and care. Our construction and electricity is safe.
Fungal Refuge

You are wandering through the mighty forest when you notice a soft glow between the trees, you see warm light radiating in all directions and slow shadows starting to dance. You begin to feel the quiet hum of something alive, you start walking towards the glow, towards warm light, towards safety.

Here, in the heart of the sacred forest of Alvheim, you find Fungal Refuge; your mushroom-themed chill-out sanctuary. We are a safe haven for overstimulated, tired, tripping Borderlanders or Borderlanders simply wanting a relaxing space. We offer a place where elves, fungi, and cosmic travelers can meet in stillness rather than intensity.

Inside our big tipi you will find mattresses, sofas, blankets, pillows and fluffy materials to sink into. The light strings, candles, and slow-moving visual projections create the feeling of resting inside a forest held together by mycelium. We bring you an art experience, a living installation shaped by mushrooms, softness, and care.

The Fungal Refuge is a non-sexual cuddle and chill-out space. A place for closeness without expectation, intimacy without pressure, and presence without performance. Stay for a moment or for hours; nap, breathe, talk softly, cuddle, regulate, or simply exist.
Low to medium.  Music is used to support the atmosphere; we’re going for a grounding and cozy vibe.

We plan to arrive the weekend prior to the event to begin building our structure. Fungal Refuge will be fully struck on Sunday 26th of July, and all materials will be removed. Leave No Trace is part of our core intention, and the space will be restored to its original state.
Estimated simultaneous power usage is around ~500W, mainly for a projector and charging of a Soundboks speaker battery.

The Fungal Refuge is designed to coexist peacefully with its surroundings. We are mindful of our neighbors and adapt sound levels accordingly. Within the shared area, we act as the quiet counterbalance to Kishmastle's sonic intensity and a soft landing space within the elven world of Alvheim.

This space is held by a core crew of seven people, but it is nourished by many. We are hosting gentle offerings during the week, such as morning yoga, body awakening, guided meditation, grounding practices, massage, acroyoga, soft movement, and chai evenings with warm drinks and cozy surprises. Offerings arise organically in harmony with energy and inspiration.

We warmly invite other Borderlanders to use the space for compatible workshops or gatherings, especially if you want to bring something calm, caring, creative or connective to this haven. We also welcome crossover offerings with Alvheim, Kishmastle and Breadcrumb Bureau that help weave together ritual, rest, and intergalactic weirdness.

What this dream gives to Borderland:

The Fungal Refuge gives Borderland a restorative oasis woven into a larger immersive world. It offers softness, grounding, conscious cuddling, chai, visual atmosphere, and space for integration in contrast to the louder and more activating energies around it. As part of the world shared with Alvheim, Kishmastle and Breadcrumb Bureau, it helps create emotional rhythm; landing, recovery, connection.

buckets.title: Boob Mobile
buckets.summary: A Mobile Boob, Sound & Workshop Installation - Dive into an experience, where you explore sound through touch.

customFields.value:
We are committed to respecting the wider event environment.

Boob Mobile is mobile and does not permanently occupy space. Sound levels are moderated and adapted to location and time. The installation does not operate continuously and will respect quiet zones and neighboring camps.

Clear consent principles are visible and communicated. Interaction is always voluntary, respectful, and inclusive.
We would like to use the local power supply with a connection in the garage of Circus the Analog to charge the batteries.

The sound system is designed for playful engagement, not dominance.

The intention is to have an immersive but not overwhelming sound.

🎪 CIRCUS the ANALOG 🎪

Boob Mobile is a collective camp project. It is carried and maintained by the team responsible for technical infrastructure, facilitation, finances, and safety. It grows through shared effort, shared care, and shared responsibility.

Boob Mobile invites active participation.

Planned co-creation elements include:

*   Build workshops (papier-mâché sculpting and surface design)
    
*   Sound sampling sessions where participants record and contribute sounds
    
*   DIY controller building for interactive triggers
    
*   Mini-workshops on playful interaction and consent culture
    

The installation evolves through contributions from the community. Participants become co-creators rather than spectators.

Safety is central to the project.

Vehicle:

*   Roadworthy and mechanically inspected Interaction.
    
*   Clear consent culture.
The installation will leave no trace. It will leave the site with us.

💕 Hop aboard the Boob Mobile — a cheeky, body-loving art adventure on wheels! This rolling wonder transforms a regular vehicle into a cozy, squishy playground. Two large, soft sculptural forms create an immersive seating and interaction area. Dive into an experience, where you explore sound through touch. Creativity, comfort, and good vibes all packed into one fabulous moving masterpiece!

💕 The nipples function as interactive sound triggers connected to a custom audio system. The vehicle already includes speakers, amplifiers, and a subwoofer, creating a mobile yet contained sonic experience.

Discover “Boob Diving” … a metaphor that invites participants to dive into softness, humor, sound, and collective experience. The installation combines absurdity, warmth, and empowerment while encouraging reflection on body perception, consent, and shared play.

❣️ Boob Mobile is not about sexualization — it is about reclaiming humor, intimacy, and body symbolism in a conscious and respectful way.

Alenka  
Responsible for transparent budget handling and financial coordination.

buckets.title: Eye to Eye, Heart to Heart
buckets.summary: Breath until your heartbeat finds the same rythem

customFields.value: This is a low-impact, intimate dream. It takes up very little space (just two chairs) and creates no noise. It’s perfect for a quiet corner, a forest path, or as a cozy addition to a camp’s chill-out area.

The art is created by the participants themselves. We provide the technical vessel, but the heartbeat synchronization and the eye contact are the true co-creation. We invite anyone curious about human-centric technology or meditation to facilitate a session or simply experience the pulse of another.

Sometimes, the most beautiful thing you can do is just be still.

Two chairs, two heartbeats, and a quiet invitation to drop the masks. Sit across from someone - a lover, a friend, or a total stranger - and look into their eyes. As your pulses light up the chairs, you’ll see the invisible thread between you become visible.

It’s a simple, luminous game of breath and presence. When your hearts finally find each other and the lights glow as one, it’s a tiny reminder that beneath all the noise, we are connected.
**None.** This is a purely visual and silent experience
*   We will ensure all cables between the two chairs are taped down or covered with a small rug to prevent tripping.

Everything is designed for easy removal. The electronics (Arduino and sensors) fit in a small kit, and the chairs will be donated or repurposed after the event. **Leave No Trace** is a core part of our plan; we will leave the spot exactly as we found it.

Dana Hertz (Dana Banan aka me)

buckets.title: ❤️ The Heart ❤️
buckets.summary: Feeling lost & lonely? Disconnected? Overwhelmed? Come in dear, get a hug. Cuddle up. Have some tea. Take a deep breath, and land back in yourself. We got you.

customFields.value: The Heart
Sunday and monday
Martin #Mesrsmith

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Where to go if you feel lost, lonely, overwhelmed by the magical chaos that Borderland is? And whom to turn to, if you feel connected with everything, just feeling a deep desire to spread the overflowing bliss of being ONE with all - but your camp mates are all wasted and acting a drama?

The Heart is here for you, always. We welcome you into your home away from home, where you’ll feel like you belong. A space for calm, connection, and deep human bonding — where breath becomes a bridge, touch becomes a language, and simply being is enough. Step into a soft sanctuary where the world slows down and presence comes first. 🌿  
  
During the day, this will be a workshop space away from party & rave energy, where you can always grab a long hug, meet another’s eyes and land inside yourself.

At night, you just grab a hot water bottle, have some tea, and cuddle up in our nest - or you join a sharing circle for integrating the weirdness between dreams and realities.  
  
The Heart offers a deeply needed space to meet each other and let the love flow even if (or maybe, especially when) you’re sober. Let us help you get back into your heart and remember that separation is an illusion. That you are me, and that we are all in this together.

Our cosy workshop aims to host gentle experiences in touch, breath, awareness, creativity, connection and self-discovery — no loud music, no rush, just grounded exploration.  
  
We offer the space for everything not stepping over our boundaries (no sex positive workshops, no guru worshipping). Please reach out to us at Discord - camp The Heart (#mesrsmith)
We aim to not disturb anyone, part of pre-placement - likely joining the cuddle plaza neighbourhood
Sound for workshops or art, no parties or raves, mostly indoor sound levels.
Danger of becoming a better-self or respect others more. This is a family friendly, body-positive space, open for intimacy – but we are not a sex-positive space (hands out of the pants!).
Yes about 6kW, lights, workshop sound, water heater, heater. This is a peak and mostly when the sun goes down.

customFields.value: A bunch

We’ll print around **1,200 physical JOMO Guides** in A6 format; small enough to carry in your pocket all week. i.e twice as many as last year. But about 1/4 of the Borderland memberships.

It’s a simple way to see what’s going on without pulling out your phone every time. You can flip through it at a bar, by the fire, or while wandering, and maybe stumble on something you didn’t plan for.

It ain't feasible to print 5000 exs. Your biggest chance to find a copy, is signing up for shifts, making Borderland happen. Some will be placed in shared spaces like bars, tea lounges, and chill areas, where they can move around between people.

The idea is just to make it easier to discover things, talk to each other, stay a bit more present, and a bit less on phone screens.

buckets.title: The Sapphic Pond 🐸
buckets.summary: The first ever sapphic meeting point at Borderland! The Pond invokes all lesbians, bi, curious and pansexual women to emerge from the waters 💦

customFields.value:
I went to Borderland last year and couldn't find my people. I'm queer, I'm femme, and I spent a week surrounded by 4500 humans without meeting a single sapphic woman. We were there. But we had no way to find each other.

The Sapphic Pond is Borderland's first camp for queer women, lesbians, femmes and nonbinary people. A place to land, be seen, and find who you've been looking for.

**What happens here:**

🌅 Morning Moan: Sapphic Tantric Meditation (daily 11am)  
🍵 The Lesbian Tea Ceremony (daily 12pm)  
💫 Find Your Sapphic Soul Mate (opening night)  
🙈 Sapphic Blindfolded Slow Dating  
🧘 Melt Into Her: Yin Yoga for Queer Women  
🏊 Beavers & Nymphs Go Swimming!  
🍾 Spin the Bottle: Lesbian Edition  
🫧 Submerge: Under the Pond (sapphic non-verbal communication space always open)  
🔥 You Command This Lesbian Orgy  
📌 Soul Matchmaking Board (always open)  
🌙 The Lounge (fairy lights, open all night)

Femme-loving femmes: if you don't have a camp or you got tired of yours, we adopt you. Pitch your tent around the Pond and be home for the week. Follow the glowing frog 🐸

The Sapphic Pond is a gentle neighbor. Our daily programming (tea ceremony, yoga, meditation, dating) is quiet and intimate. The lounge plays low-volume music at night but we're not a sound camp.

The one exception: **Find Your Sapphic Soul Mate** opening night and occasional evenings may get a bit louder with sapphics talking (Or moaning 😏) and a bluetooth speaker. Nothing above what one person can carry. We'll communicate with neighbors during pre-placement and keep it reasonable.

**Submerge** (our silent contact room) is a non-verbal space, but other sounds can be made.

We'd love to be placed near other queer, body-positive, or connection-focused camps. We're the pond, we play well with others. If you're a neighboring camp and want to co-host something sapphic, come talk to us 🐸
No. We bring only a small portable Bluetooth speaker for gentle background music during yoga and meditation sessions, kept at low conversational volume.

We pack light and leave clean. All rugs, cushions, tents, and signs are carried out by our camp. Matchmaking board dismantled, pins collected, red threads saved as keepsakes. Tea station cleared, cups washed. The only trace we leave is the connections we made.

Nyx  
Email: nyxrr@pm.me

Conceptually, this means decorating a cargo bike and using it to transport water sprayers so we can give long-awaited cooling to burners ecstatically shaking their beautiful asses off in the heat of the midday sun.

buckets.title: Safe Walkways at the Sunny Hills Waterfront (Magic Banya)
buckets.summary: Safe, low-built flooring and walkways transform uneven, hazardous ground into stable, well-lit paths—improving flow, safety, and space for co-creation.

customFields.value: Expected to be battery-powered or solar-powered only.

Engineers guide safe design. Flooring stays low, stable, and non-slip. Ligting walkways improve safety on uneven ground. Ground stabilization supports leveling and safer movement along the waterfront.

# **MAGIC BANYA by Mist behavior**

The banya is a Russian-style **steam sauna**, built as a handcrafted tent structure where heat, steam and ritual come together. Using a borrowed banya, the project was a great success in 2025 and this year we come back by engineering our own Borderland Banya, backed by F33!

WEBSITE:[Magic Banya Camp · Borderland 2026](https://magicbanya.com/)

Interested in joining us? fill out our really awesome [form](https://forms.gle/GsaqJdUU2VnWRAsX7)

This year, we are in active dialogue with other sauna camps to co-create a shared neighbourhood atmosphere and are collectively trying to enhance the swimming pier area.

We coexisted well with nearby sound camps with padding last year. We explored collaboration with a massage camp, but space limitations made this not so feasible last ýear. Better flooring would also help opening our space up to others.

## Flooring & Walkways: Safety and Terrain Stabilization

The terrain on the Sunny Hills waterfront near the swimming pier is uneven and contains holes that create tripping hazards. Last year this made movement between sauna areas, changing zones, and lakeshore paths difficult and at times unsafe—especially during high visitor flow and low visibility.

This year we plan to improve safety by combining light terrain leveling and temporary landscaping with stable floor sections and walkways built from reusable wooden pallets and decking materials. These adjustments bridge uneven ground, stabilize soft areas, and create clearer movement routes across the sauna neighbourhood zone.

Our Goals

*   reduce tripping risks on uneven ground
    
*   stabilize high-traffic barefoot pathways near wet sauna areas
    
*   improve surface stability through light ground preparation
    
*   improve visibility at night and in fog through pathway lighting
    

By expanding safe and stable walking surfaces along the Sunny Hills waterfront, this project strengthens accessibility, circulation, and safety for both Magic Banya participants and the wider lakeshore community and makes more effective use of the lakeshore area safely for shared activities.

This project supports co-creation by improving safe access and movement across the Sunny Hills waterfront sauna neighbourhood.

By stabilizing uneven terrain and defining clearer walking routes, the installation helps create smoother transitions between lakeshore activity areas and supports shared use of the space by neighbouring camps, performers, and facilitators offering calm programming near the waterfront.

Safer and more accessible ground surfaces make it easier for nearby sauna camps and chill-out spaces to connect their environments and contribute to a welcoming and navigable lakeside neighbourhood together.

This year we are in active dialogue with other sauna camps to support coordinated improvements around the swimming pier area and are open to collaborating on shared walkway connections along the Sunny Hills waterfront.

Improved flooring will also make it easier for visiting facilitators such as performers and bodyworkers to safely use the space between sessions.

We bring very little sound (chimes/gong) but may collaborate with calm performers.

Better, safer walk ways are not expected to add any sound.

*   Full strike on Sunday, with the final people leaving on Monday
    
*   All materials removed and packed down
    
*   Storage plan for reuse in future years, as required by F33
    
*   Focus on reusable and durable materials
    

The project is designed for **continuity and minimal waste**.
Coral Ljunggren ([ljucor@gmail.com](mailto:ljucor@gmail.com))

Our dream is to build a shrine to celebrate the goddess and the feminine. In this shrine we will leave empty jars that bleeding people may help themselves to, and those who wish can leave their filled up jar there along with ours for everyone to admire.

For bleeding and non-bleeding people alike, we invite everyone to marvel at the feminine goddess. In our shrine you may also find calming lavender cookies, womb-tea and other homemade, on-theme gifts.

The installation will be by our camp, so if you catch us at home, we would love to share stories, connect, read your palms/tarots, have a women's circle - we also take requests on the homemade gifts or ideas in general for our shrine.

Our budget is low for now, but obviously more means more for the goddess - we are dedicated to her and to you either way

buckets.title: HYPERCUBE
buckets.summary: experience the mysteries of the hypercube, an animated art installation placed in the middle of the valley

customFields.value: No sound.
Paul Yance - paul.yance@gmail.com

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Step into the valley after dark and you'll find something otherworldly that you can't quite make sense of: a row of slender metal frames, each stretched with translucent nylon, standing in formation like the slices of something extra dimensional pulled apart in space.

A projector throws animated light across each slice, visualizing patterns that ripple, pulse, and drift from one sheet to the next. The image doesn't just _land_ on a surface; it hangs in the air between the layers. Each layer of sheer fabric catches its share of the projection, and your eye stitches the rest together. No smoke machines, no haze — just geometry doing the work.

The effect is something between a hologram, a zoetrope, and a lucid dream. Walk around it and the piece reshapes itself. Stand still and it breathes. Stay a while and the patterns start to feel like they're watching back.

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dreamswtf/image/upload/v1776026189/dreams/srztiwal9akhjwkload9.png)

HYPERCUBE is an invitation to peek into a different reality and spend a few minutes inside a shape that only exists when the light is on.![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dreamswtf/image/upload/v1776026279/dreams/umvytqtzbjlnlfescs8g.png)
Location is flexible but the idea is to coordinate with valley inhabitants and place the cube at an impactful place that balances accessibility and ambiance.
independent
Visual artists are welcome to create bespoke material to be projected on HYPERCUBE.
The spot will be restored to the state which it was found. The frames are easily disassembled and will be cleared up sat/sun and transported by truck to Stockholm for storage.
The cube doesn't have any heavy, sharp, electrical or moving parts. The frames are robust will be bolted down securely to be able to handle impacts or people leaning on them.
Will only need an outlet to power the projector which has modest electricity consumption. Will try to coordinate with nearest neighbor.
Just grunts from cyclists

the toaster station will be removed after use
Erik.von.ke@gmail.com

# Radical therapist

Have you ever thought: "Maybe there's something wrong with me. I should probably see a professional, but I don't "have the time"". Or maybe you've made it to the therapist's office but still thought: “I wonder what they really think of me. Am I normal?” Spoiler: The answer is no, you are not normal. You are a perfect storm of your parents shortcomings and your own, of symbolic inner pictures of the anger and lust in your heart, and endless love and acceptance of yourself, deep within the caves of your soul. That storm is the most beautiful and interesting thing about you, if you ask us. Choose on the menu which part of you that you would like to explore first, in a quick but impactful session. Face the most radical, fearless and connected therapists your counciousness could ever dream of.

You’re on the dance floor.

Keep it.

Treasure it.

Drink from it.

Dance with it.

Because this bottle means: we saw you.

So.

Dance while the music still plays.

Take a sip.

Then another.

Love your dancing.

Love your bottle.

It’s as unique as you are.
We will make sure that everyone who receives a bottle understands LNT. But honestly, each bottle will be so precious that no one would ever want to leave it behind.
