buckets.title: Passage to Lemuria
buckets.summary: What if you left yourself at the door? Enter House of Lemuria through three ritual doors, shed skin and be digested into an immersive ongoing performance.

customFields.value: House of Lemuria

Yes, **deeply and wholeheartedly**.

House of Lemuria is by nature a collective. Beyond our own performances and rituals, we welcome collaboration with dreamers across Borderland. This can take many forms, hosting workshops or ceremonies for visiting camps, offering our stage to performers passing through, or simply holding space as a warm resting place for participants on their journey.

The Passage is not just an experience, it is a living world that grows richer through every person that goes through it. We see every collaboration as another thread woven into the fabric of Lemuria itself.

When Lemuria is awake and open, she opens her arms to her neighbours to rest, connect and let go. Her sounds drift toward the trees as the placement will be connected to the forest. We are committed to respecting Borderland's sound directives at all times.

Our physical dream will be removed after the closing but Lemuria is released into the world or perhaps carried outward when our collective baby will be born. All decorations, fabrics, light installations, tent structures and will be carefully removed and packed for transport. The forest area will be fully cleared and a thorough MOOP sweep will be conducted across the entire footprint before we leave. Our goal is simple: to leave the land as we found it, or better.
Heléne Schreber (Fkahlo) @fkahlo\_61051 on discord or +46709494141

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value: We would need a 16 to 32 ampere power socket with a distributor with at least 3 phases for the whole camp.
House of Lemuria is a sound camp with intentional and directional sound. 500W - 2000W
Performers and inhabitants of Lemuria are briefed on creating a safe environment. The space welcomes all bodies, identities and states of being without judgment.

House of Lemuria brings you a dream inspired by the myth of Lemuria: A utopian civilization believed to have existed millions of years ago. This is the first time the alternate dimension of Lemuria comes to the Borderland. House of Lemuria unfolds as an **ongoing immersive performance**_,_ inhabited by characters that exist beyond time. _You are invited to enter and to become part of its fabric_. The space functions as a warm, intimate womb: a place to rest, connect with oneself, others and nature. To let go of imposed identities and rehearse new forms of togetherness. It is a collective baby, held by three pillars: **heart-centered community, nature and inclusiveness**.

Opening night will offer a **three door ritualized passage of a mouth, a confession and a butthole**. After you've shed skin and been digested into the house, you will be offered **a lineup of DJs and a space which will be connected to the forest woven by light installations**. The dream remains open during set hours and hosts a series of workshops, concerts and small-scale rituals. On the closing there will be a soft gathering with tea, live music, readings, cuddling or whatever we may need or feel like doing.

buckets.title: House of SIN - Club Sin
buckets.summary: House of SIN is the new multi-purpose playground of Club SIN. A space that shifts with you around the clock, with every hour a different sin!

customFields.value:
Aurimas @Amadeus amadeus00330 on discord  
For detailed budget please check the [link](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NCzFTWpOtLMArzuXPknPamiriPKZ6X8R2_J3YPNaG0g/edit?usp=sharing): [https://tinyurl.com/3wk47myr](https://tinyurl.com/3wk47myr)

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
Welcome to the House of SIN, the new multi-purpose playground of Club SIN. A space that shifts with you and with the hour.

_SINshops:_ By day, we host workshops to develop your sin skills: spanking, shibari, power play, consent, sensual touch, and more. Do you have a fitting workshop? Let’s co-create.

_SINergic Slothing_**:** When the Club SIN dance floor burns too hot, come chill. Cushions, incense, slow bodies, soft gazes. Rest, cuddle, recharge.

**S+ Afterparties**  
When the club closes, the House of SIN opens further:

_SIN Games_ — Think of Squid Game, but full of joy and lust. No one dies when they lose (obviously), quite the opposite. In surrender and play, you may find a new source of life!

_SINema_ — Some sins should be lived, some are made to be watched. We screen the creations of exhibitionist Borderlings: a co-created erotic cinema of pulse and juice.

_Pain in Pleasure_ — Facilitated soft-to-mid BDSM experiences and experiments, grounded in trust and discipline.

_Lazy Vortex_ — Vanillas, horizontal dancers, this is for you. Slow motion, sensual intention, sexual interaction. Come and melt into one big crawling organic being.

For every hour, a different sin,  
House of SIN, when you step in...
During afterparties, we will play low-volume music using two tops (2000W RMS total). We will have three heaters (4500W total) and lights max 500 W.
We will follow fire safety procedures, and ensure that all lighting and power cables are properly secured. We have appointed power and safety leads and will bring our own PDUs.
During the day, there will be only workshops. In the evenings and nights one side will be open towards Club SIN’s dance floor. During afterparties, there will be low ambient music.

We participate in the pre-placement process and aim to cluster with other camps exploring S+ themes, contributing to the creation of an 18+ zone within the Bison neighbourhood.

House of SIN afterparties will continue until early morning, but with little or no music. We will coordinate with our neighbours and follow the sound schedule.

The House of SIN becomes what it is through the people who step into it. It is shaped by those who host SINshops, melt into SINergic slothing, and take part in the S+ afterparties.

You can offer a workshop linked to our theme of the seven sins, participate in workshops, join SIN Games, submit your homemade video to be screened at SINema, or help shape our S+ afterparties.

If you feel called to contribute, reach out, or fill [this](https://forms.gle/nvVCxv1ek2sZN33J9) form.  
![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dreamswtf/image/upload/v1775940516/dreams/kxpks9pg6gbshg3mf4ih.png)

Everything we bring, we will take back with care. A strike lead will be responsible for ensuring a smooth teardown and packing process. Reusable bulky items will be stored in a container in Alversjö, while the rest will be taken back and stored safely in Gothenburg.

**Club SIN**  
Club SIN brings the charm of a decadent nightclub to the burn: twisted casino games, a sweaty dance floor, juicy workshops, wicked performances, and a bar full of treats. But nothing comes for free; you’ll need _sincoins_ to access it all: play at the casino, enjoy treats, join workshops, or enter the sex+ luxury lounge or afterparties. Earn them by committing sins or accepting punishments from our carefully curated menus.  
Club SIN dreams: [danSINg](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoq41as0022xnznbk1cltsr?s=dansing&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), [caSINo](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqf1by002bxnzn07tkar8t), [SIN Bar](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoq0sjo001xxnznet8yelcp?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), [House of SIN](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqgx2t000aoyfnkk1azusr?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA), and [SIN Salabim](https://dreams.theborderland.se/borderland/dreams-2026/cmnoqi6s1001mbtyovxnh04lr?s=sin&f=PENDING_APPROVAL&f=IDEA).  
Fill this [form](https://forms.gle/5n8esnHMj151yxvH9) for membership application.

buckets.title: The Room of Requirements
buckets.summary: A space that becomes what is needed - when it is needed

customFields.value: K9 Coliving
Gustav Orrevad, [Gustavius75@hotmail.com](mailto:Gustavius75@hotmail.com), Discord Orrewhat, Whatsapp +46732639494

customField.name: Designated Dr. Bill-Bull (treasurer of the dream)

customFields.value:
This dream is _not finished_, and that’s the point.

Help us shape it. Add elements. Build structures. Bring strange tools or beautiful objects that enable new kinds of experiences.

Got a weird idea? Perfect. This room was made for it.

Want to help create this dream and make sure it suits the requirements of yours and the many during Borderland? We might be looking for more people. Write us on Whatsapp <3

Each host defines the structure of their session (open / closed / guided).

We encourage:

*   Clear communication
    
*   Consent awareness
    
*   Gentle entry and exit into experiences

Minimal electricity:

*   Projector/TV + media hub 
    
*   Sound system & Mic
    
*   Lights to create atmosphere (soft, warm, inviting)

After each session, the space is reset and prepared for the next use.  
At the end of the event, everything is packed down and the space is returned to nature as it was found.

We leave no physical trace, but hope what happens here leaves something meaningful in people.

Not a sound camp, but not super silent all the time either.

Expect **low-level soundscapes**, gentle music, or live acoustic moments that support the experience or are the experience.

Welcome to “**The Room of Requirements”**. A flexible space that transforms with whoever steps into it. Not just a room, but a container for possibility. A soft stage where ideas can emerge, evolve, and come alive.

You don’t just book the room, you shape it. One hour it might host a meditation, workshop, or quiet session. The next, a presentation, experiment, or a small concert.

There’s no fixed setup or purpose - only what you choose to create. Book a time slot, step in, and adapt the space to your needs. We provide a simple, cosy foundation (seating, light, sound) - you bring the content.

The space is slightly tucked away from the intensity, creating a calm and safe environment while still allowing for shared experiences and sound.

A place for trying ideas, hosting sessions, or creating something that doesn’t need to be perfect to be meaningful.

Because many experiences here invite vulnerability and presence, we prioritize **respect, awareness, and softness**.

*   Some sessions will be open, others closed 
    
*   Clear signage will communicate boundaries 
    
*   We trust both hosts and participants to honour consent and space 
    

If you enter, enter with care

buckets.title: IT*S A SIGN!!!!workshop
buckets.summary: Creating and maintaining a self-organising DIY signmaking workshop and cosy creative hangout space in the barn for all borderlings to use and enjoy ✧˖°࿐

customFields.value: we don't want acrylic paint in the ground water: there will be brush-washing stations with dedicated waste water boxes, kitty litter to absorb the paint water before disposal, and disposable gloves.

same as last year but better: sort all signs into reusable / repaintable / trash. collect all waste water in designated containers, soak with kitty litter, dispose properly. clean the barn space. store reusable materials for next year. leave no trace leave no trace leave no trace leave no trace
indoor work lights, speaker, tool charging. tapping from the barn power as before. multiplugs and extension cords included in the budget.

IT\*S A SIGN!!!!workshop is a self-organising creative space open to all borderlings. you grab a board, grab some markers and paint, and you make something. maybe it's a sign for your camp. maybe it's one someone else ordered - they left a little sketch and now you bring it to life. maybe you're just sitting on a pillow painting something weird on cardboard at 3am because the vibe is right and someone handed you a brush :3

✧˖_°࿐ .　 . • ☆ . ° .• °:._ ₊ ° . ☆

last year was the first year and it was grrreat. the barn was full of people during build already. the workshop ran day and night, strangers made signs for strangers, beautiful fae appeared to wash brushes, clean up and vanish back into the playa. the whole thing ran basically on trust and co-creation and it was one of those borderland things that makes you go "oh right, THIS is why we do this"  

this year we're levelling up ° . ☆・❥・  
✧ cosy pillows to sit on while you paint. ✧ carpets that don't mind catching some paint. ✧ armchairs that have lived a life. ✧ a little tea corner where you sip something warm and watch the art happen around you. a co-creative living room / artelier in the barn

this space runs itself but it doesn't SET itself up

if you want to help me build during build week, take a shift keeping things tidy during the event, or just be one of those beautiful fae who appears and washes brushes and vanishes - you're welcome to reach out to me! i'm zoe, you can find me on discord @synesynesynes

ALSO if we don't make the stretch goal and you have things collecting dust:

✧ a GOOD SPEAKER (quality sound, plays loud, can survive hippies) ✧ a drill or a saw ✧ pillows, carpets, a couch, armchairs - if you're driving past second hand markets and want to grab something cosy for the space PLEASE talk to me

this is a co-created space!! the more people pour their love into it the better it gets

thanks to everyone who helped last year - to the magical fae who kept the space tidy, to everyone who poured love into the workshop, to everyone who showed up and contributed to the co-creative vibe. being there, alone together, crafting with random lovely borderlings in all hours of the day - that was amaaahzinggg <3 <3 <3

I'd love a good quality bluetooth speaker--------- nothing over the top, just enough to set the mood. a good one that stays at alversjö for future use chained to the table so it doesn't get "borrowed"

we'll likely be in the barn again - it was the perfect spot last year, visible, accessible, people stumbling in during build already curiously walking the playa. the barn has good energy. the barn wants us there

.　 . • ☆ . ° .• °:. \*₊ ° .

**what's new and what's more:**

✧ a proper sign ordering system - heavy quality sketch paper where you draw your order, sturdy trays so they don't fly around, metal clips and rope so the orders hang visible for anyone to grab and make. you sketch it, someone makes it, it's cute and nobody's in charge

✧ real hand-washing stations and brush-washing stations - big sturdy boxes with water so you can clean up properly without leaving paint crimes all over the land.

✧ SO MANY MORE MARKERS. professional refillable markers in different sizes, plenty of black (there is never enough black), with refill ink to keep them going all week

✧ proper indoor work lights so painting after dark is actually possible (fairy lights are great but kinda hard to see what you're doing indoors heh)

✧ GLOVES FOR DAYS. six boxes this time - oh, AND APRONS!!

✧ kitty litter for the acrylic waste water - soak it up, throw it in the trash, nothing goes into the ground. LNT for life

✧ if we hit the stretch goal: power tools for cutting and assembling signs, a quality speaker that stays at alversjö (chained to the table so nobody walks off with it), outdoor floodlights for nighttime painting, and even more paint in big beautiful buckets

come paint, come order a sign, come drink tea and watch other people paint, come sit on a pillow and do nothing. all of these are valid and valuable uses of this space

this dream is a place where you can show up as you are and leave having made something. or having watched someone make something. or just having sat on a pillow drinking tea surrounded by paint-stained hippies in a barn in the swedish forest while chill tunes play in the background.

_"Aaaah best spot EVER - Such great execution"_

_"I loved that this was part of BL with its impact enjoyable across the whole site"_

_"There were really good signs this year, and it was SO appreciated to be able to go there and make some, when signs were needed! Loved that space."_

"I am your facilitator/ gusmaster/ shaman for todays journey/ experience/ session, if you have any questions please don't hesitate to ask them after I have given you the following information."  
"This will be a 1 hour and 20 minute session consisting of three 20 minute reps and two 10 minute breaks to run to the lake for a quick dip or basking in the glow of the fire before reentering the silent embrace of the lodge/ breathing exercises"  
"The scent menu will consist of pine and lemon for the first round, cedar and eucalyptus for the second and finally star anis and camphor for the third! "  
"There will be birch shoots available for those of you who don't mind a little sting for increased blood circulation, just don't hit your neighbors in the eyes!"  
"Once inside you are encouraged to stay throughout! If you feel lightheaded sit down on the ground or lie down if there is space for it. If you have to leave for one reason or another you will not enter again until the next break." "There will be tea and salty snacks served in the breaks"  
"If anybody has any medical conditions I should be aware of please let me know now"

We want to manifest a magical space which can accomodate and facilitate introspection. Any who feel called are welcome to reach out and arrange a journey into the ether of the self.  
In short, we welcome co-creation in the form of facilitation of a sweatlodge experience.

She is a quiet peaceful presence who protects and watches over the Borderlings. She is sturdy and static and will be kind to all neighbours who are kind to her. Yes! We would love support to create Iris. Foragers and woodworkers welcome to craft and adorn our guardian spirit.

**Have you heard the tales of Iris, the Forest Guardian?** This year, she may emerge from the animate woodlands of Alversjö to join us in frivolity and fun.

But Forest Guardians aren't quite so easily summoned...

So to encourage her to appear, we need your support.

When we asked Iris to take shape during this year's Borderland, she agreed on two conditions:

1.  She wants to be crafted mostly from the living textures of the surrounding forest.
    
2.  She wants Borderlings to be allowed to see the world through her eyes.
    

A protector of land and people, Iris will rise from materials of the surrounding woodlands. Part creature, part shelter, she is a space you can crawl into and explore. Inside her, you will find cushioning, an ambient soundscape, and a view through her eyes. Dissolve into her cushioned tipi-skirt, rest in her body, peek through her internal periscope to observe fellow borderlings below from the viewpoint of a great protective being.

To help bring Iris into being, we need your support!

Deep in the heart of the dust, where the night chill begins to creep in, we are lighting a beacon of warmth. We invite you to step out of the chaos and into the glow of our tried-and-tested recipe. This brew is perfected by the spirits of last year, so it’s guaranteed to make your heart feel several sizes larger.

What awaits you by the campfire:

*   The Elixir: Our legendary Chai, brewed by us with patience, fragrant spices, and a dash of starlight. It is vegan and get's creamy by adding gluten-free oatmilk.
    
*   The Feast: A curated spread of the "Virtuous" and the "Wicked"—healthy nibbles to fuel your dance and not-so-healthy treats to fuel your soul.
    
*   The Vibe: A sanctuary for singing, cuddling (with each other, us tea-brewers, or our "cozy stuff"), and the kind of deep, wandering conversations that only happen when the wood smoke meets the night sky.
    

All kind sould are welcome!

Whether you are a weary traveler looking for a soft landing or a bright spark seeking a song, there is a spot on the log for you. Bring your cup, bring your voice, or just bring your presence.

Let's get cozy, let's get warm and let's shimmer up the forest edge <3

## The Golden Foxes – a playful, sex-positive den of transformation

The Golden Foxes is a shared archetype for exploring closeness, curiosity, and connection in a playful, embodied way. By becoming foxes, we soften identity, lower defenses, and open new ways of relating.

### The project has two parts:

1.  **The Foxes (performance & presence)**
    

We create a presence at Borderland through costuming — fox ears, tails, and body elements. The foxes move between performance and interaction: sometimes observed, sometimes inviting.

2.  **The Den (immersive intimate space)**
    

Participants are guided through a tunnel into the fox den — a soft, contained space for intimate, consent-based exploration. The space feels warm and otherworldly, encouraging curiosity, boundaries, and play.

This creates a held environment where play becomes a tool for transformation.

### **Funding will support:**

– Costumes (fox ears, tails, materials for visual identity)

– Tunnel entrance and den structure

– Soft interior elements to create an inviting atmosphere
